-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\conhost.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potentially Suspicious Child Processes Spawned by ConHost

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1202, T1218 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects suspicious child processes related to Windows Shell utilities spawned by `conhost.exe`, which could indicate malicious activity using trusted system components.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Child Processes Spawned by ConHost
-- Sigma ID:     dfa03a09-8b92-4d83-8e74-f72839b1c407
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1202, T1218
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_susp_winshell_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative tasks using `conhost.exe` to spawn child processes such as `cmd.exe`, `powershell.exe`, or `regsvr32.exe`.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('cmd.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'powershell_ise.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'regsvr32.exe', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\conhost.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative tasks using `conhost.exe` to spawn child processes such as `cmd.exe`, `powershell.exe`, or `regsvr32.exe`.

Conhost Spawned By Uncommon Parent Process

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects when the Console Window Host (conhost.exe) process is spawned by an uncommon parent process, which could be indicative of potential code injection activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Conhost Spawned By Uncommon Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     cbb9e3d1-2386-4e59-912e-62f1484f7a89
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_uncommon_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\lsass.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\smss.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\spoolsv.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\userinit.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wininit.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\winlogon.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Control Panel Items

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1218.002, T1546 Author: Kyaw Min Thein, Furkan Caliskan (@caliskanfurkan_) Status: test
Detects the malicious use of a control panel item
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Control Panel Items
-- Sigma ID:     0ba863e6-def5-4e50-9cea-4dd8c7dc46a4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1218.002, T1546
-- Author:       Kyaw Min Thein, Furkan Caliskan (@caliskanfurkan_)
-- Date:         2020-06-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_control_panel_item.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CurrentVersion\\Control Panel\\CPLs%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reg.exe')))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cpl')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

CreateDump Process Dump

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036, T1003.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects uses of the createdump.exe LOLOBIN utility to dump process memory
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        CreateDump Process Dump
-- Sigma ID:     515c8be5-e5df-4c5e-8f6d-a4a2f05e4b48
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_createdump_lolbin_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Command lines that use the same flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --full %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -f %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --name %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\createdump.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'FX_VER_INTERNALNAME_STR')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Command lines that use the same flags

Windows Credential Guard Registry Tampering Via CommandLine

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects attempts to add, modify, or delete Windows Credential Guard related registry keys or values via command line tools such as Reg.exe or PowerShell. Credential Guard uses virtualization-based security to isolate secrets so that only privileged system software can access them. Adversaries may disable Credential Guard to gain access to sensitive credentials stored in the system, such as NTLM hashes and Kerberos tickets, which can be used for lateral movement and privilege escalation. The rule matches suspicious command lines that target DeviceGuard or LSA registry paths and manipulate keys like EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity, RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures, or LsaCfgFlags. Such activity may indicate an attempt to disable or tamper with Credential Guard, potentially exposing sensitive credentials for misuse.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Credential Guard Registry Tampering Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     c17d47b7-dcd6-4109-87eb-d1817bd4cbc9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-12-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_credential_guard_registry_tampering.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%si %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%delete %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%del %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rp %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Control\\DeviceGuard%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Control\\LSA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Software\\Policies\\Microsoft\\Windows\\DeviceGuard%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LsaCfgFlags%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Dynamic .NET Compilation Via Csc.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1027.004 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "csc.exe" to compile .NET code. Attackers often leverage this to compile code on the fly and use it in other stages.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Dynamic .NET Compilation Via Csc.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     dcaa3f04-70c3-427a-80b4-b870d73c94c4
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-08-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csc_susp_dynamic_compilation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate software from program files - https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897; Legitimate Microsoft software - https://twitter.com/gabriele_pippi/status/1206907900268072962; Ansible
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\csc.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate software from program files - https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897; Legitimate Microsoft software - https://twitter.com/gabriele_pippi/status/1206907900268072962; Ansible

Csc.EXE Execution Form Potentially Suspicious Parent

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.005, T1059.007, T1218.005, T1027.004 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a potentially suspicious parent of "csc.exe", which could be a sign of payload delivery.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Csc.EXE Execution Form Potentially Suspicious Parent
-- Sigma ID:     b730a276-6b63-41b8-bcf8-55930c8fc6ee
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.005, T1059.007, T1218.005, T1027.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-02-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csc_susp_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\csc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'csc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Csi.exe Usage

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1072, T1218 Author: Konstantin Grishchenko, oscd.community Status: test
Csi.exe is a signed binary from Microsoft that comes with Visual Studio and provides C# interactive capabilities. It can be used to run C# code from a file passed as a parameter in command line. Early version of this utility provided with Microsoft “Roslyn” Community Technology Preview was named 'rcsi.exe'
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Csi.exe Usage
-- Sigma ID:     40b95d31-1afc-469e-8d34-9a3a667d058e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1072, T1218
-- Author:       Konstantin Grishchenko, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csi_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage by software developers
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'Microsoft Corporation')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\csi.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rcsi.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('csi.exe', 'rcsi.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage by software developers

Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1127 Author: Michael R. (@nahamike01) Status: test
Detects the execution of CSharp interactive console by PowerShell
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console
-- Sigma ID:     a9e416a8-e613-4f8b-88b8-a7d1d1af2f61
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1127
-- Author:       Michael R. (@nahamike01)
-- Date:         2020-03-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csi_use_of_csharp_console.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible depending on environment. Pair with other factors such as net connections, command-line args, etc.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\csi.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'csi.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Possible depending on environment. Pair with other factors such as net connections, command-line args, etc.

Active Directory Structure Export Via Csvde.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: exfiltration, discovery, T1087.002 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of "csvde.exe" in order to export organizational Active Directory structure.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Active Directory Structure Export Via Csvde.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     e5d36acd-acb4-4c6f-a13f-9eb203d50099
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration, discovery | T1087.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csvde_export.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Cookies Session Hijacking

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "-c" flag in order to save cookie data.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Cookies Session Hijacking
-- Sigma ID:     5a6e1e16-07de-48d8-8aae-faa766c05e88
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_cookie_hijacking.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\s-c\s')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--cookie-jar%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Curl Web Request With Potential Custom User-Agent

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "curl.exe" with a potential custom "User-Agent". Attackers can leverage this to download or exfiltrate data via "curl" to a domain that only accept specific "User-Agent" strings
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Curl Web Request With Potential Custom User-Agent
-- Sigma ID:     85de1f22-d189-44e4-8239-dc276b45379b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_custom_user_agent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%User-Agent:%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

  reptDevIpAddrV4,

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1

LIMIT 1000;

Suspicious File Download From IP Via Curl.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious file downloads directly from IP addresses using curl.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Download From IP Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     5cb299fc-5fb1-4d07-b989-0644c68b6043
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_download_direct_ip_susp_extensions.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs''))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -O%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--remote-name%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--output%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '://[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious File Download From File Sharing Domain Via Curl.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious file download from file sharing domains using curl.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Download From File Sharing Domain Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     56454143-524f-49fb-b1c6-3fb8b1ad41fb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_download_susp_file_sharing_domains.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1"'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -O%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--remote-name%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--output%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%github.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pages.dev%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pixeldrain.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trycloudflare.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ufile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%w3spaces.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%workers.dev%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Insecure Transfer Via Curl.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "--insecure" flag.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Insecure Transfer Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     cb9cc1d1-e84e-4bdc-b7ad-c31b1b7908ec
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_insecure_connection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Access to badly maintained internal or development systems
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\s-k\s')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--insecure%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Access to badly maintained internal or development systems

Insecure Proxy/DOH Transfer Via Curl.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "insecure" flag over proxy or DOH.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Insecure Proxy/DOH Transfer Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     2c1486f5-02e8-4f86-9099-b97f2da4ed77
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_insecure_proxy_or_doh.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Access to badly maintained internal or development systems
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--doh-insecure%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--proxy-insecure%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Access to badly maintained internal or development systems

Local File Read Using Curl.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "file://" protocol handler in order to read local files.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Local File Read Using Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     aa6f6ea6-0676-40dd-b510-6e46f02d8867
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_local_file_read.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%file:///%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Curl.EXE Download

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1105 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious curl process start on Windows and outputs the requested document to a local file
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Curl.EXE Download
-- Sigma ID:     e218595b-bbe7-4ee5-8a96-f32a24ad3468
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_susp_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'The curl executable'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious CustomShellHost Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1216 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of CustomShellHost.exe where the child isn't located in 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe'. CustomShellHost is a known LOLBin that can be abused by attackers for defense evasion techniques.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious CustomShellHost Execution
-- Sigma ID:     84b14121-9d14-416e-800b-f3b829c5a14d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_customshellhost_susp_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives are unlikely, investigate matches carefully.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\CustomShellHost.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False positives are unlikely, investigate matches carefully.

ManageEngine Endpoint Central Dctask64.EXE Potential Abuse

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1055.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of "dctask64.exe", a signed binary by ZOHO Corporation part of ManageEngine Endpoint Central. This binary can be abused for DLL injection, arbitrary command and process execution.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ManageEngine Endpoint Central Dctask64.EXE Potential Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     6345b048-8441-43a7-9bed-541133633d7a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-01-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_dctask64_arbitrary_command_and_dll_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% executecmd64 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% invokeexe %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% injectDll %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\dctask64.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6834B1B94E49701D77CCB3C0895E1AFD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1BB6F93B129F398C7C4A76BB97450BBA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=FAA2AC19875FADE461C8D89DCF2710A3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=F1039CED4B91572AB7847D26032E6BBF%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Uncommon Child Process Of Defaultpack.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects uncommon child processes of "DefaultPack.EXE" binary as a proxy to launch other programs
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Child Process Of Defaultpack.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b2309017-4235-44fe-b5af-b15363011957
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defaultpack_uncommon_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\DefaultPack.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Defender Threat Severity Default Action Set to 'Allow' or 'NoAction'

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Matt Anderson (Huntress) Status: experimental
Detects the use of PowerShell to execute the 'Set-MpPreference' cmdlet to configure Windows Defender's threat severity default action to 'Allow' (value '6') or 'NoAction' (value '9'). This is a highly suspicious configuration change that effectively disables Defender's ability to automatically mitigate threats of a certain severity level. An attacker might use this technique via the command line to bypass defenses before executing payloads.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Defender Threat Severity Default Action Set to 'Allow' or 'NoAction'
-- Sigma ID:     1e8a9b4d-3c2a-4f9b-8d1e-7c6a5b4f3d2e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2025-07-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defender_default_action_modified.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Highly unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-LowThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ModerateThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-HighThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-SevereThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ltdefac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-mtdefac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-htdefac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-stdefac %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MpPreference%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Allow%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NoAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%9%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Highly unlikely

Windows Defender Context Menu Removed

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Matt Anderson (Huntress) Status: experimental
Detects the use of reg.exe or PowerShell to delete the Windows Defender context menu handler registry keys. This action removes the "Scan with Microsoft Defender" option from the right-click menu for files, directories, and drives. Attackers may use this technique to hinder manual, on-demand scans and reduce the visibility of the security product.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Defender Context Menu Removed
-- Sigma ID:     b9e8c7d6-a5f4-4e3d-8b1a-9f0c8d7e6a5b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2025-07-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defender_remove_context_menu.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    May be part of a system customization or "debloating" script, but this is highly unusual in a managed corporate environment.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%del%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-Item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ri %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('powershell_ise.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\shellex\\ContextMenuHandlers\\EPP%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: May be part of a system customization or "debloating" script, but this is highly unusual in a managed corporate environment.

Remote File Download Via Desktopimgdownldr Utility

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1105 Author: Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects the desktopimgdownldr utility being used to download a remote file. An adversary may use desktopimgdownldr to download arbitrary files as an alternative to certutil.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote File Download Via Desktopimgdownldr Utility
-- Sigma ID:     214641c2-c579-4ecb-8427-0cf19df6842e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_desktopimgdownldr_remote_file_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\desktopimgdownldr.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\desktopimgdownldr.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/lockscreenurl:http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Desktopimgdownldr Command

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1105 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious Microsoft desktopimgdownldr execution with parameters used to download files from the Internet
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Desktopimgdownldr Command
-- Sigma ID:     bb58aa4a-b80b-415a-a2c0-2f65a4c81009
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_desktopimgdownldr_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg delete%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\PersonalizationCSP%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment

Devcon Execution Disabling VMware VMCI Device

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003, T1562.001 Author: Matt Anderson, Dray Agha, Anna Pham (Huntress) Status: experimental
Detects execution of devcon.exe with commands that disable the VMware Virtual Machine Communication Interface (VMCI) device. This can be legitimate during VMware Tools troubleshooting or driver conflicts, but may also indicate malware attempting to hijack communication with the hardware via the VMCI device. This has been used to facilitate VMware ESXi vulnerability exploits to escape VMs and execute code on the ESXi host.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Devcon Execution Disabling VMware VMCI Device
-- Sigma ID:     85f520e7-6f5e-43ca-874c-222e5bf9c0de
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003, T1562.001
-- Author:       Matt Anderson, Dray Agha, Anna Pham (Huntress)
-- Date:         2026-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_devcon_disable_vmci_driver.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate VMware administration, Tools installation/uninstallation, or troubleshooting driver conflicts.; Automated scripts in virtualized environments for device cleanup.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% disable %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\devcon.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'DevCon.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%15AD&DEV\_0740%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VMWVMCIHOSTDEV%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate VMware administration, Tools installation/uninstallation, or troubleshooting driver conflicts.; Automated scripts in virtualized environments for device cleanup.

DeviceCredentialDeployment Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of DeviceCredentialDeployment to hide a process from view.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DeviceCredentialDeployment Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b8b1b304-a60f-4999-9a6e-c547bde03ffd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_device_credential_deployment.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\DeviceCredentialDeployment.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential DLL Sideloading Via DeviceEnroller.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1574.001 Author: @gott_cyber Status: test
Detects the use of the PhoneDeepLink parameter to potentially sideload a DLL file that does not exist. This non-existent DLL file is named "ShellChromeAPI.dll". Adversaries can drop their own renamed DLL and execute it via DeviceEnroller.exe using this parameter
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential DLL Sideloading Via DeviceEnroller.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     e173ad47-4388-4012-ae62-bd13f71c18a8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1574.001
-- Author:       @gott_cyber
-- Date:         2022-08-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_deviceenroller_dll_sideloading.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/PhoneDeepLink%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\deviceenroller.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'deviceenroller.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Arbitrary MSI Download Via Devinit.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a certain command line flag combination used by "devinit.exe", which can be abused as a LOLBIN to download arbitrary MSI packages on a Windows system
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary MSI Download Via Devinit.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     90d50722-0483-4065-8e35-57efaadd354d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_devinit_lolbin_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t msi-install %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -i http%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potentially Suspicious Child Process Of ClickOnce Application

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious child processes of a ClickOnce deployment application
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Child Process Of ClickOnce Application
-- Sigma ID:     67bc0e75-c0a9-4cfc-8754-84a505b63c04
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_dfsvc_suspicious_child_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Apps\\2.0\\%')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\explorer.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\nltest.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\notepad.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\werfault.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

DirLister Execution

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: discovery, T1083 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detect the usage of "DirLister.exe" a utility for quickly listing folder or drive contents. It was seen used by BlackCat ransomware to create a list of accessible directories and files.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DirLister Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b4dc61f5-6cce-468e-a608-b48b469feaa2
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1083
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_dirlister_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by users
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'DirLister.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\DirLister.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by users

System Information Discovery via Registry Queries

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: discovery, T1082 Author: lazarg Status: experimental
Detects attempts to query system information directly from the Windows Registry.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        System Information Discovery via Registry Queries
-- Sigma ID:     0022869c-49f7-4ff2-ba03-85ac42ddac58
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1082
-- Author:       lazarg
-- Date:         2025-06-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_discovery_via_reg_queries.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\TimeZoneInformation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potentially Suspicious Child Process Of DiskShadow.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious child processes of "Diskshadow.exe". This could be an attempt to bypass parent/child relationship detection or application whitelisting rules.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Child Process Of DiskShadow.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     9f546b25-5f12-4c8d-8532-5893dcb1e4b8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_diskshadow_child_process_susp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False postitve can occur in cases where admin scripts levreage the "exec" flag to execute applications
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\diskshadow.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False postitve can occur in cases where admin scripts levreage the "exec" flag to execute applications

Diskshadow Script Mode - Uncommon Script Extension Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "Diskshadow.exe" in script mode to execute an script with a potentially uncommon extension. Initial baselining of the allowed extension list is required.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Diskshadow Script Mode - Uncommon Script Extension Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1dde5376-a648-492e-9e54-4241dd9b0c7f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_diskshadow_script_mode_susp_ext.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False postitve might occur with legitimate or uncommon extensions used internally. Initial baseline is required.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False postitve might occur with legitimate or uncommon extensions used internally. Initial baseline is required.

Diskshadow Script Mode - Execution From Potential Suspicious Location

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "Diskshadow.exe" in script mode using the "/s" flag where the script is located in a potentially suspicious location.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Diskshadow Script Mode - Execution From Potential Suspicious Location
-- Sigma ID:     fa1a7e52-3d02-435b-81b8-00da14dd66c1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_diskshadow_script_mode_susp_location.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives may occur if you execute the script from one of the paths mentioned in the rule. Apply additional filters that fits your org needs.
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-s %'
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'diskshadow.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\diskshadow.exe')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\ProgramData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False positives may occur if you execute the script from one of the paths mentioned in the rule. Apply additional filters that fits your org needs.

PowerShell Web Access Feature Enabled Via DISM

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1548.002 Author: Michael Haag Status: test
Detects the use of DISM to enable the PowerShell Web Access feature, which could be used for remote access and potential abuse
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Web Access Feature Enabled Via DISM
-- Sigma ID:     7e8f2d3b-9c1a-4f67-b9e8-8d9006e0e51f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1548.002
-- Author:       Michael Haag
-- Date:         2024-09-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_dism_enable_powershell_web_access_feature.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate PowerShell Web Access installations by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WindowsPowerShellWebAccess%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/online%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/enable-feature%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\dism.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'DISM.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate PowerShell Web Access installations by administrators

Dism Remove Online Package

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: frack113 Status: test
