HackTool - SharpDPAPI Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1134.001, T1134.003 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of the SharpDPAPI tool based on CommandLine flags and PE metadata. SharpDPAPI is a C# port of some DPAPI functionality from the Mimikatz project.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpDPAPI Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c7d33b50-f690-4b51-8cfb-0fb912a31e57
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.001, T1134.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-06-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_dpapi_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpDPAPI.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpDPAPI.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% backupkey %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% blob %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% certificates %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% credentials %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% keepass %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% masterkeys %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% rdg %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% vaults %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpImpersonation Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1134.001, T1134.003 Author: Sai Prashanth Pulisetti @pulisettis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of the SharpImpersonation tool. Which can be used to manipulate tokens on a Windows computers remotely (PsExec/WmiExec) or interactively
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpImpersonation Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f89b08d0-77ad-4728-817b-9b16c5a69c7a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.001, T1134.003
-- Author:       Sai Prashanth Pulisetti @pulisettis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_impersonation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% user:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% binary:%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% user:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% shellcode:%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% technique:CreateProcessAsUserW%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% technique:ImpersonateLoggedOnuser%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharpImpersonation.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpImpersonation.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpLDAPmonitor Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of the SharpLDAPmonitor. Which can monitor the creation, deletion and changes to LDAP objects.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpLDAPmonitor Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9f8fc146-1d1a-4dbf-b8fd-dfae15e08541
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_ldap_monitor.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/user:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/pass:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/dcip:%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharpLDAPmonitor.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpLDAPmonitor.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharPersist Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of the hacktool SharPersist - used to deploy various different kinds of persistence mechanisms
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharPersist Execution
-- Sigma ID:     26488ad0-f9fd-4536-876f-52fea846a2e4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpersist.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t schtask -c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t startupfolder -c %'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t reg -c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m add%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t service -c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m add%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t schtask -c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m add%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharPersist.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SharPersist'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpEvtMute Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of SharpEvtHook, a tool that tampers with the Windows event logs
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpEvtMute Execution
-- Sigma ID:     bedfc8ad-d1c7-4e37-a20e-e2b0dbee759c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpevtmute.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpEvtMute.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'SharpEvtMute')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--Filter "rule %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--Encoded --Filter \\"%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpLdapWhoami Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1033 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects SharpLdapWhoami, a whoami alternative that queries the LDAP service on a domain controller
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpLdapWhoami Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d9367cbb-c2e0-47ce-bdc0-128cb6da898d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpldapwhoami.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Programs that use the same command line flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /method:ntlm' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /method:kerb' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /method:nego' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /m:nego' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /m:ntlm' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /m:kerb'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\SharpLdapWhoami.exe'
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%SharpLdapWhoami%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SharpLdapWhoami'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Programs that use the same command line flags

HackTool - SharpMove Tool Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1021.002 Author: Luca Di Bartolomeo (CrimpSec) Status: test
Detects the execution of SharpMove, a .NET utility performing multiple tasks such as "Task Creation", "SCM" query, VBScript execution using WMI via its PE metadata and command line options.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpMove Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     055fb54c-a8f4-4aee-bd44-f74cf30a0d9d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021.002
-- Author:       Luca Di Bartolomeo (CrimpSec)
-- Date:         2024-01-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpmove.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpMove.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpMove.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=create%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=dcom%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=executevbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=hijackdcom%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=modschtask%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=modsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=query%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=scm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=startservice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=taskscheduler%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computername=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HKTL - SharpSuccessor Privilege Escalation Tool Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1068 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects the execution of SharpSuccessor, a tool used to exploit the BadSuccessor attack for privilege escalation in WinServer 2025 Active Directory environments. Successful usage of this tool can let the attackers gain the domain admin privileges by exploiting the BadSuccessor vulnerability.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HKTL - SharpSuccessor Privilege Escalation Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     38a1ac5f-9c74-47d2-a345-dd6f5eb4e7c8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1068
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-06-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpsuccessor_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpSuccessor.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpSuccessor.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SharpSuccessor%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% add %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /impersonate%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /path%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /account%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /name%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpUp PrivEsc Tool Execution

critical FSM Severity: 9 MITRE: persistence, discovery, execution, T1615, T1569.002, T1574.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of SharpUp, a tool for local privilege escalation
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpUp PrivEsc Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c484e533-ee16-4a93-b6ac-f0ea4868b2f1
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, discovery, execution | T1615, T1569.002, T1574.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpup.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpUp.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'SharpUp')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HijackablePaths%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UnquotedServicePath%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProcessDLLHijack%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ModifiableServiceBinaries%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ModifiableScheduledTask%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DomainGPPPassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CachedGPPPassword%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpView Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1049, T1069.002, T1482, T1135, T1033 Author: frack113 Status: test
Adversaries may look for details about the network configuration and settings of systems they access or through information discovery of remote systems
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpView Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b2317cfa-4a47-4ead-b3ff-297438c0bc2d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1049, T1069.002, T1482, T1135, T1033
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpview.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpView.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharpView.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-RemoteConnection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Convert-ADName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-SID%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-UACValue%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Convert-SidToName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Export-PowerViewCSV%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-DomainObjectPropertyOutlier%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-DomainProcess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-DomainShare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-DomainUserEvent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-DomainUserLocation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-ForeignGroup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-ForeignUser%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-GPOComputerAdmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-GPOLocation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-Interesting%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-LocalAdminAccess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Find-ManagedSecurityGroups%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-CachedRDPConnection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DFSshare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainComputer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainController%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainDFSShare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainDNSRecord%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainFileServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainForeign%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainGPO%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainGroup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainGUIDMap%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainManagedSecurityGroup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainOU%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainPolicy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainSID%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainSite%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainSPNTicket%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainSubnet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainTrust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-DomainUserEvent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ForestDomain%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ForestGlobalCatalog%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ForestTrust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-LastLoggedOn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-LoggedOnLocal%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetComputer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetDomain%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetFileServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetForest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetGPO%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetGroupMember%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetLocalGroup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetLoggedon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetOU%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetProcess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetRDPSession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetSession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetShare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetSite%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetSubnet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-NetUser%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-PathAcl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-PrincipalContext%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-RegistryMountedDrive%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-RegLoggedOn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WMIRegCachedRDPConnection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WMIRegLastLoggedOn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WMIRegMountedDrive%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WMIRegProxy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ACLScanner%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-CheckLocalAdminAccess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Kerberoast%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-MapDomainTrust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RevertToSelf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Sharefinder%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-UserImpersonation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-DomainObjectAcl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-RemoteConnection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Request-SPNTicket%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-DomainObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Test-AdminAccess%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SharpWSUS/WSUSpendu Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1210 Author: @Kostastsale, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of SharpWSUS or WSUSpendu, utilities that allow for lateral movement through WSUS. Windows Server Update Services (WSUS) is a critical component of Windows systems and is frequently configured in a way that allows an attacker to circumvent internal networking limitations.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpWSUS/WSUSpendu Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b0ce780f-10bd-496d-9067-066d23dc3aa5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1210
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpwsus_wsuspendu_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Inject %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -PayloadArgs %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -PayloadFile %')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% approve %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% create %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% check %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% delete %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /payload:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /payload=%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /updateid:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /updateid=%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - SILENTTRINITY Stager Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1071 Author: Aleksey Potapov, oscd.community Status: test
Detects SILENTTRINITY stager use via PE metadata
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SILENTTRINITY Stager Execution
-- Sigma ID:     03552375-cc2c-4883-bbe4-7958d5a980be
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1071
-- Author:       Aleksey Potapov, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_silenttrinity_stager.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%st2stager%'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

HackTool - Sliver C2 Implant Activity Pattern

critical FSM Severity: 9 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects process activity patterns as seen being used by Sliver C2 framework implants
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Sliver C2 Implant Activity Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     42333b2c-b425-441c-b70e-99404a17170f
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sliver_c2_execution_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-NoExit -Command [Console]::OutputEncoding=[Text.UTF8Encoding]::UTF8%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

HackTool - SOAPHound Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1087 Author: @kostastsale Status: test
Detects the execution of SOAPHound, a .NET tool for collecting Active Directory data, using specific command-line arguments that may indicate an attempt to extract sensitive AD information.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SOAPHound Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e92a4287-e072-4a40-9739-370c106bb750
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087
-- Author:       @kostastsale
-- Date:         2024-01-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_soaphound_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --buildcache %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --bhdump %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --certdump %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --dnsdump %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --cachefilename %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --outputdirectory%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - Stracciatella Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059, T1562.001 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects Stracciatella which executes a Powershell runspace from within C# (aka SharpPick technique) with AMSI, ETW and Script Block Logging disabled based on PE metadata characteristics.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Stracciatella Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7a4d9232-92fc-404d-8ce1-4c92e7caf539
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1562.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_stracciatella_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Stracciatella.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Stracciatella.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Stracciatella')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=9d25e61ec1527e2a69d7c2a4e3fe2fe15890710c198a66a9f25d99fdf6c7b956%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=fd16609bd9830c63b9413671678bb159b89c357d21942ddbb6b93add808d121a%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

HackTool - SysmonEOP Execution

critical FSM Severity: 9 MITRE: T1068 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of the PoC that can be used to exploit Sysmon CVE-2022-41120
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SysmonEOP Execution
-- Sigma ID:     8a7e90c5-fe6e-45dc-889e-057fe4378bd9
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1068
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sysmoneop.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=22F4089EB8ABA31E1BB162C6D9BF72E5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5123FA4C4384D431CD0D893EEB49BBEC%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\SysmonEOP.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

HackTool - TruffleSnout Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1482 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the use of TruffleSnout.exe an iterative AD discovery toolkit for offensive operators, situational awareness and targeted low noise enumeration.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - TruffleSnout Execution
-- Sigma ID:     69ca006d-b9a9-47f5-80ff-ecd4d25d481a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1482
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_trufflesnout.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'TruffleSnout.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\TruffleSnout.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - UACMe Akagi Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1548.002 Author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of UACMe, a tool used for UAC bypasses, via default PE metadata
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - UACMe Akagi Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d38d2fa4-98e6-4a24-aff1-410b0c9ad177
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_uacme.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=767637C23BB42CD5D7397CF58B0BE688%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=14C4E4C72BA075E9069EE67F39188AD8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3C782813D4AFCE07BBFC5A9772ACDBDC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=7D010C6BB6A3726F327F7E239166D127%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=89159BA4DD04E4CE5559F132A9964EB3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6F33F4A5FC42B8CEC7314947BD13F30F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5834ED4291BDEB928270428EBBAF7604%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5A8A8A43F25485E7EE1B201EDCBC7A38%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=DC7D30B90B2D8ABF664FBED2B1B59894%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=41923EA1F824FE63EA5BEB84DB7A3E74%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3DE09703C8E79ED2CA3F01074719906B%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\Akagi64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Akagi.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'UACMe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] IN ('REvol Corp', 'APT 92', 'UG North', 'Hazardous Environments', 'CD Project Rekt')))
  OR (rawEventMsg IN ('UACMe main module', 'Pentesting utility'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Akagi.exe', 'Akagi64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

HackTool - Windows Credential Editor (WCE) Execution

critical FSM Severity: 9 MITRE: T1003.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of Windows Credential Editor (WCE), a popular post-exploitation tool used to extract plaintext passwords, hash, PIN code and Kerberos tickets from memory. It is often used by threat actors for credential dumping and lateral movement within compromised networks.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Windows Credential Editor (WCE) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7aa7009a-28b9-4344-8c1f-159489a390df
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
