Potential Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, execution, T1615, T1059.005 Author: blueteamer8699 Status: test
Detects execution of the built-in script located in "C:\Windows\System32\gatherNetworkInfo.vbs". Which can be used to gather information about the target machine
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS
-- Sigma ID:     575dce0c-8139-4e30-9295-1ee75969f7fe
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, execution | T1615, T1059.005
-- Author:       blueteamer8699
-- Date:         2022-01-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_gather_network_info.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gatherNetworkInfo.vbs%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('cscript.exe', 'wscript.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity

Gpscript Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of the LOLBIN gpscript, which executes logon or startup scripts configured in Group Policy
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Gpscript Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1e59c230-6670-45bf-83b0-98903780607e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_gpscript.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate uses of logon scripts distributed via group policy
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate uses of logon scripts distributed via group policy

Ie4uinit Lolbin Use From Invalid Path

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detect use of ie4uinit.exe to execute commands from a specially prepared ie4uinit.inf file from a directory other than the usual directories
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Ie4uinit Lolbin Use From Invalid Path
-- Sigma ID:     d3bf399f-b0cf-4250-8bb4-dfc192ab81dc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_ie4uinit.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    ViberPC updater calls this binary with the following commandline "ie4uinit.exe -ClearIconCache"
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ie4uinit.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'IE4UINIT.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: ViberPC updater calls this binary with the following commandline "ie4uinit.exe -ClearIconCache"

Launch-VsDevShell.PS1 Proxy Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1216.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of the 'Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' Microsoft signed script to execute commands.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Launch-VsDevShell.PS1 Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     45d3a03d-f441-458c-8883-df101a3bb146
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_launch_vsdevshell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the script by a developer
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VsWherePath %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VsInstallationPath %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Launch-VsDevShell.ps1%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the script by a developer

Potential Manage-bde.wsf Abuse To Proxy Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1216 Author: oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potential abuse of the "manage-bde.wsf" script as a LOLBIN to proxy execution
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Manage-bde.wsf Abuse To Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c363385c-f75d-4753-a108-c1a8e28bdbda
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_manage_bde.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%manage-bde.wsf%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wscript.exe')))
  OR (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%manage-bde.wsf%'))
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1055.001, T1218.013 Author: frack113, Florian Roth Status: test
Detects process injection using the signed Windows tool "Mavinject" via the "INJECTRUNNING" flag
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process
-- Sigma ID:     4f73421b-5a0b-4bbf-a892-5a7fb99bea66
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001, T1218.013
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2021-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_mavinject_process_injection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /INJECTRUNNING %')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\System32\AppVClient.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

MpiExec Lolbin

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a certain command line flag combination used by mpiexec.exe LOLBIN from HPC pack that can be used to execute any other binary
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MpiExec Lolbin
-- Sigma ID:     729ce0ea-5d8f-4769-9762-e35de441586d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_mpiexec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\mpiexec.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=d8b52ef6aaa3a81501bdfff9dbb96217%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /n 1 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -n 1 %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Execute Files with Msdeploy.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community Status: test
Detects file execution using the msdeploy.exe lolbin
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Files with Msdeploy.exe
-- Sigma ID:     646bc99f-6682-4b47-a73a-17b1b64c9d34
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Beyu Denis, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_msdeploy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    System administrator Usage
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verb:sync%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-source:RunCommand%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-dest:runCommand%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\msdeploy.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: System administrator Usage

Use of OpenConsole

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of OpenConsole binary as a LOLBIN to launch other binaries to bypass application Whitelisting
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of OpenConsole
-- Sigma ID:     814c95cc-8192-4378-a70a-f1aafd877af1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_openconsole.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by an administrator
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'OpenConsole.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\OpenConsole.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE 'C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.WindowsTerminal%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by an administrator

OpenWith.exe Executes Specified Binary

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218 Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community (rule), @harr0ey (idea) Status: test
The OpenWith.exe executes other binary
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        OpenWith.exe Executes Specified Binary
-- Sigma ID:     cec8e918-30f7-4e2d-9bfa-a59cc97ae60f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Beyu Denis, oscd.community (rule), @harr0ey (idea)
-- Date:         2019-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_openwith.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\OpenWith.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Use of Pcalua For Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community Status: test
Detects execition of commands and binaries from the context of The program compatibility assistant (Pcalua.exe). This can be used as a LOLBIN in order to bypass application whitelisting.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of Pcalua For Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0955e4e1-c281-4fb9-9ee1-5ee7b4b754d2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2022-06-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcalua.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by a via a batch script or by an administrator.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\pcalua.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -a%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by a via a batch script or by an administrator.

Indirect Command Execution By Program Compatibility Wizard

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: A. Sungurov , oscd.community Status: test
Detect indirect command execution via Program Compatibility Assistant pcwrun.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Indirect Command Execution By Program Compatibility Wizard
-- Sigma ID:     b97cd4b1-30b8-4a9d-bd72-6293928d52bc
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       A. Sungurov , oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwrun.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Need to use extra processing with 'unique_count' / 'filter' to focus on outliers as opposed to commonly seen artifacts; Legit usage of scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pcwrun.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Need to use extra processing with 'unique_count' / 'filter' to focus on outliers as opposed to commonly seen artifacts; Legit usage of scripts

Execute Pcwrun.EXE To Leverage Follina

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects indirect command execution via Program Compatibility Assistant "pcwrun.exe" leveraging the follina (CVE-2022-30190) vulnerability
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Pcwrun.EXE To Leverage Follina
-- Sigma ID:     6004abd0-afa4-4557-ba90-49d172e0a299
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwrun_follina.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\pcwrun.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%../%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Code Execution via Pcwutl.dll

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218.011 Author: Julia Fomina, oscd.community Status: test
Detects launch of executable by calling the LaunchApplication function from pcwutl.dll library.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Code Execution via Pcwutl.dll
-- Sigma ID:     9386d78a-7207-4048-9c9f-a93a7c2d1c05
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwutl.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Use of Program Compatibility Troubleshooter Helper
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pcwutl%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LaunchApplication%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Use of Program Compatibility Troubleshooter Helper

Execute Code with Pester.bat as Parent

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1216 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detects code execution via Pester.bat (Pester - Powershell Modulte for testing)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Code with Pester.bat as Parent
-- Sigma ID:     18988e1b-9087-4f8a-82fe-0414dce49878
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1216
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pester.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%{ Invoke-Pester -EnableExit ;%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%{ Get-Help "%'))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%\\WindowsPowerShell\\Modules\\Pester\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules

Execute Code with Pester.bat

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1216 Author: Julia Fomina, oscd.community Status: test
Detects code execution via Pester.bat (Pester - Powershell Modulte for testing)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Code with Pester.bat
-- Sigma ID:     59e938ff-0d6d-4dc3-b13f-36cc28734d4e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1216
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pester_1.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Pester%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Help%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pester%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%help%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\?%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules

PrintBrm ZIP Creation of Extraction

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1105, T1564.004 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of the LOLBIN PrintBrm.exe, which can be used to create or extract ZIP files. PrintBrm.exe should not be run on a normal workstation.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PrintBrm ZIP Creation of Extraction
-- Sigma ID:     cafeeba3-01da-4ab4-b6c4-a31b1d9730c7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105, T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_printbrm.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\PrintBrm.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -f%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Pubprn.vbs Proxy Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1216.001 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the use of the 'Pubprn.vbs' Microsoft signed script to execute commands.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Pubprn.vbs Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1fb76ab8-fa60-4b01-bddd-71e89bf555da
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pubprn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\pubprn.vbs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%script:%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

DLL Execution via Rasautou.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Julia Fomina, oscd.community Status: test
Detects using Rasautou.exe for loading arbitrary .DLL specified in -d option and executes the export specified in -p.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DLL Execution via Rasautou.exe
-- Sigma ID:     cd3d1298-eb3b-476c-ac67-12847de55813
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_rasautou_dll_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -d %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rasautou.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'rasdlui.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

REGISTER_APP.VBS Proxy Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of a Microsoft signed script 'REGISTER_APP.VBS' to register a VSS/VDS Provider as a COM+ application.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        REGISTER_APP.VBS Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1c8774a0-44d4-4db0-91f8-e792359c70bd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_register_app.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the script. Always investigate what's being registered to confirm if it's benign
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\register\_app.vbs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-register%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the script. Always investigate what's being registered to confirm if it's benign

Use of Remote.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1127 Author: Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io Status: test
Remote.exe is part of WinDbg in the Windows SDK and can be used for AWL bypass and running remote files.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of Remote.exe
-- Sigma ID:     4eddc365-79b4-43ff-a9d7-99422dc34b93
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io
-- Date:         2022-06-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_remote.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Approved installs of Windows SDK with Debugging Tools for Windows (WinDbg).
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\remote.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'remote.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Approved installs of Windows SDK with Debugging Tools for Windows (WinDbg).

Replace.exe Usage

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1105 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the use of Replace.exe which can be used to replace file with another file
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Replace.exe Usage
-- Sigma ID:     9292293b-8496-4715-9db6-37028dcda4b3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-03-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_replace.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\replace.exe'
  AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%-a%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Lolbin Runexehelper Use As Proxy

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detect usage of the "runexehelper.exe" binary as a proxy to launch other programs
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Lolbin Runexehelper Use As Proxy
-- Sigma ID:     cd71385d-fd9b-4691-9b98-2b1f7e508714
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_runexehelper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\runexehelper.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Runscripthelper.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059, T1202 Author: Victor Sergeev, oscd.community Status: test
Detects execution of powershell scripts via Runscripthelper.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Runscripthelper.exe
-- Sigma ID:     eca49c87-8a75-4f13-9c73-a5a29e845f03
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1202
-- Author:       Victor Sergeev, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_runscripthelper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Runscripthelper.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%surfacecheck%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Use of Scriptrunner.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
The "ScriptRunner.exe" binary can be abused to proxy execution through it and bypass possible whitelisting
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of Scriptrunner.exe
-- Sigma ID:     64760eef-87f7-4ed3-93fd-655668ea9420
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_scriptrunner.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use when App-v is deployed
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -appvscript %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ScriptRunner.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ScriptRunner.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use when App-v is deployed

Using SettingSyncHost.exe as LOLBin

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1574.008 Author: Anton Kutepov, oscd.community Status: test
Detects using SettingSyncHost.exe to run hijacked binary
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Using SettingSyncHost.exe as LOLBin
-- Sigma ID:     b2ddd389-f676-4ac4-845a-e00781a48e5f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1574.008
-- Author:       Anton Kutepov, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_settingsynchost.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (NOT ((procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%RoamDiag.cmd%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%-outputpath%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Use Of The SFTP.EXE Binary As A LOLBIN

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the usage of the "sftp.exe" binary as a LOLBIN by abusing the "-D" flag
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use Of The SFTP.EXE Binary As A LOLBIN
-- Sigma ID:     a85ffc3a-e8fd-4040-93bf-78aff284d801
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-11-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_sftp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sftp.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -D ..%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -D C:\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Driver Install by pnputil.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1547 Author: Hai Vaknin @LuxNoBulIshit, Avihay eldad @aloneliassaf, Austin Songer @austinsonger Status: test
Detects when a possible suspicious driver is being installed via pnputil.exe lolbin
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Driver Install by pnputil.exe
-- Sigma ID:     a2ea3ae7-d3d0-40a0-a55c-25a45c87cac1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1547
-- Author:       Hai Vaknin @LuxNoBulIshit, Avihay eldad  @aloneliassaf, Austin Songer @austinsonger
-- Date:         2021-09-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_susp_driver_installed_by_pnputil.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Pnputil.exe being used may be performed by a system administrator.; Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes in your environment.; Pnputil.exe being executed from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-i%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/install%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-a%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/add-driver%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.inf%'))
    AND procName LIKE '%\\pnputil.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Pnputil.exe being used may be performed by a system administrator.; Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes in your environment.; Pnputil.exe being executed from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.

Suspicious GrpConv Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1547 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the suspicious execution of a utility to convert Windows 3.x .grp files or for persistence purposes by malicious software or actors
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious GrpConv Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f14e169e-9978-4c69-acb3-1cff8200bc36
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1547
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_susp_grpconv.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%grpconv.exe -o%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%grpconv -o%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Dumping Process via Sqldumper.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1003.001 Author: Kirill Kiryanov, oscd.community Status: test
Detects process dump via legitimate sqldumper.exe binary
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Dumping Process via Sqldumper.exe
-- Sigma ID:     23ceaf5c-b6f1-4a32-8559-f2ff734be516
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Kirill Kiryanov, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_susp_sqldumper_activity.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate MSSQL Server actions
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sqldumper.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0x0110%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0x01100:40%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate MSSQL Server actions

SyncAppvPublishingServer Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Executes arbitrary PowerShell code using SyncAppvPublishingServer.exe.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SyncAppvPublishingServer Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code
-- Sigma ID:     fbd7c32d-db2a-4418-b92c-566eb8911133
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_syncappvpublishingserver_execute_psh.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    App-V clients
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%"n; %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SyncAppvPublishingServer.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'syncappvpublishingserver.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: App-V clients

SyncAppvPublishingServer VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218, T1216 Author: frack113 Status: test
Executes arbitrary PowerShell code using SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SyncAppvPublishingServer VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code
-- Sigma ID:     36475a7d-0f6d-4dce-9b01-6aeb473bbaf1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1216
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_syncappvpublishingserver_vbs_execute_psh.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential DLL Injection Or Execution Using Tracker.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1055.001 Author: Avneet Singh @v3t0_, oscd.community Status: test
Detects potential DLL injection and execution using "Tracker.exe"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential DLL Injection Or Execution Using Tracker.exe
-- Sigma ID:     148431ce-4b70-403d-8525-fcc2993f29ea
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001
-- Author:       Avneet Singh @v3t0_, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_tracker.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Use of TTDInject.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1127 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the executiob of TTDInject.exe, which is used by Windows 10 v1809 and newer to debug time travel (underlying call of tttracer.exe)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of TTDInject.exe
-- Sigma ID:     b27077d6-23e6-45d2-81a0-e2b356eea5fd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_ttdinject.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%ttdinject.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'TTDInject.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

Time Travel Debugging Utility Usage

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218, T1003.001 Author: Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative Status: test
Detects usage of Time Travel Debugging Utility. Adversaries can execute malicious processes and dump processes, such as lsass.exe, via tttracer.exe.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Time Travel Debugging Utility Usage
-- Sigma ID:     0b4ae027-2a2d-4b93-8c7e-962caaba5b2a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1003.001
-- Author:       Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative
-- Date:         2020-10-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_tttracer_mod_load.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage by software developers/testers
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\tttracer.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage by software developers/testers

Lolbin Unregmp2.exe Use As Proxy

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detect usage of the "unregmp2.exe" binary as a proxy to launch a custom version of "wmpnscfg.exe"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Lolbin Unregmp2.exe Use As Proxy
-- Sigma ID:     727454c0-d851-48b0-8b89-385611ab0704
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_unregmp2.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% /HideWMP%'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\unregmp2.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'unregmp2.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1216 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the use of a Microsoft signed script executing a managed DLL with PowerShell.

-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_utilityfunctions.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UtilityFunctions.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RegSnapin %'))

Visual Basic Command Line Compiler Usage

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1027.004 Author: Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative Status: test
Detects successful code compilation via Visual Basic Command Line Compiler that utilizes Windows Resource to Object Converter.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Visual Basic Command Line Compiler Usage
-- Sigma ID:     7b10f171-7f04-47c7-9fa2-5be43c76e535
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.004
-- Author:       Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative
-- Date:         2020-10-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_visual_basic_compiler.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Utilization of this tool should not be seen in enterprise environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\vbc.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\cvtres.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Utilization of this tool should not be seen in enterprise environment

Use of VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io Status: test
VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe is a Windows SDK that can be used for AWL bypass and is listed in Microsoft's recommended block rules.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe
-- Sigma ID:     b30a8bc5-e21b-4ca2-9420-0a94019ac56a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io
-- Date:         2022-06-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_visualuiaverifynative.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate testing of Microsoft UI parts.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate testing of Microsoft UI parts.

Use of VSIISExeLauncher.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1127 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
The "VSIISExeLauncher.exe" binary part of the Visual Studio/VS Code can be used to execute arbitrary binaries
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of VSIISExeLauncher.exe
-- Sigma ID:     18749301-f1c5-4efc-a4c3-276ff1f5b6f8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_vsiisexelauncher.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -a %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\VSIISExeLauncher.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'VSIISExeLauncher.exe')))

The Workflow Command-line Compiler can be used for AWL bypass and is listed in Microsoft's recommended block rules.

  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wfc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
