Detects usage of the "Import-Module" cmdlet to load the "Microsoft.ActiveDirectory.Management.dl" DLL. Which is often used by attackers to perform AD enumeration.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Active Directory Enumeration Using AD Module - ProcCreation
-- Sigma ID:     70bc5215-526f-4477-963c-a47a5c9ebd12
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        reconnaissance, discovery, impact
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2023-01-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_active_directory_module_dll_import.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the library for administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Microsoft.ActiveDirectory.Management.dll%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of the library for administrative activity

Add Windows Capability Via PowerShell Cmdlet

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of the "Add-WindowsCapability" cmdlet to add Windows capabilities. Notable capabilities could be "OpenSSH" and others.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Add Windows Capability Via PowerShell Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     b36d01a3-ddaf-4804-be18-18a6247adfcd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_add_windows_capability.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the capabilities by administrators or users. Add additional filters accordingly.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenSSH.%')
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-WindowsCapability%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the capabilities by administrators or users. Add additional filters accordingly.

Potential AMSI Bypass Via .NET Reflection

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Markus Neis, @Kostastsale Status: test
Detects Request to "amsiInitFailed" that can be used to disable AMSI Scanning
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential AMSI Bypass Via .NET Reflection
-- Sigma ID:     30edb182-aa75-42c0-b0a9-e998bb29067c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Markus Neis, @Kostastsale
-- Date:         2018-08-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_amsi_init_failed_bypass.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%System.Management.Automation.AmsiUtils%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%amsiInitFailed%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[Ref].Assembly.GetType%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SetValue($null,$true)%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NonPublic,Static%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential AMSI Bypass Using NULL Bits

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of special strings/null bits in order to potentially bypass AMSI functionalities
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential AMSI Bypass Using NULL Bits
-- Sigma ID:     92a974db-ab84-457f-9ec0-55db83d7a825
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_amsi_null_bits_bypass.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%if(0){{{0}}}' -f $(0 -as [char]) +%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#<NULL>%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Audio Capture via PowerShell

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1123 Author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects audio capture via PowerShell Cmdlet.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Audio Capture via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     932fb0d8-692b-4b0f-a26e-5643a50fe7d6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1123
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_audio_capture.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate audio capture by legitimate user.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WindowsAudioDevice-Powershell-Cmdlet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Toggle-AudioDevice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-AudioDevice %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-AudioDevice %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Write-AudioDevice %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate audio capture by legitimate user.

Suspicious Encoded PowerShell Command Line

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community Status: test
Detects suspicious powershell process starts with base64 encoded commands (e.g. Emotet)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Encoded PowerShell Command Line
-- Sigma ID:     ca2092a1-c273-4878-9b4b-0d60115bf5ea
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community
-- Date:         2018-09-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_encoded_cmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    (none)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -ENCOD %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% BA^J e-%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;

Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command Patterns

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects PowerShell command line patterns in combincation with encoded commands that often appear in malware infection chains
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command Patterns
-- Sigma ID:     b9d9cc83-380b-4ba3-8d8f-60c0e7e2930c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_encoded_cmd_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Other tools that work with encoded scripts in the command line instead of script files
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Other tools that work with encoded scripts in the command line instead of script files

Suspicious Obfuscated PowerShell Code

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious UTF16 and base64 encoded and often obfuscated PowerShell code often used in command lines
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Obfuscated PowerShell Code
-- Sigma ID:     8d01b53f-456f-48ee-90f6-bc28e67d4e35
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_encoded_obfusc.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IAAtAGIAeABvAHIAIAAwAHgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AALQBiAHgAbwByACAAMAB4A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gAC0AYgB4AG8AcgAgADAAeA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AC4ASQBuAHYAbwBrAGUAKAApACAAfAAg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AuAEkAbgB2AG8AawBlACgAKQAgAHwAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ALgBJAG4AdgBvAGsAZQAoACkAIAB8AC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHsAMQB9AHsAMAB9ACIAIAAtAGYAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%B7ADEAfQB7ADAAfQAiACAALQBmAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AewAxAH0AewAwAH0AIgAgAC0AZgAg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHsAMAB9AHsAMwB9ACIAIAAtAGYAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%B7ADAAfQB7ADMAfQAiACAALQBmAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AewAwAH0AewAzAH0AIgAgAC0AZgAg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHsAMgB9AHsAMAB9ACIAIAAtAGYAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%B7ADIAfQB7ADAAfQAiACAALQBmAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AewAyAH0AewAwAH0AIgAgAC0AZgAg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHsAMQB9AHsAMAB9ACcAIAAtAGYAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%B7ADEAfQB7ADAAfQAnACAALQBmAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AewAxAH0AewAwAH0AJwAgAC0AZgAg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHsAMAB9AHsAMwB9ACcAIAAtAGYAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%B7ADAAfQB7ADMAfQAnACAALQBmAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AewAwAH0AewAzAH0AJwAgAC0AZgAg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHsAMgB9AHsAMAB9ACcAIAAtAGYAI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%B7ADIAfQB7ADAAfQAnACAALQBmAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AewAyAH0AewAwAH0AJwAgAC0AZgAg%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Base64 Encoded FromBase64String Cmdlet

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1140, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of a base64 encoded "FromBase64String" cmdlet in a process command line
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Base64 Encoded FromBase64String Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     fdb62a13-9a81-4e5c-a38f-ea93a16f6d7c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1140, T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-08-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_frombase64string.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'OjpGcm9tQmFzZTY0U3RyaW5n|Do6RnJvbUJhc2U2NFN0cmluZw|A6OkZyb21CYXNlNjRTdHJpbm')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6AEYAcgBvAG0AQgBhAHMAZQA2ADQAUwB0AHIAaQBuAGcA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgBGAHIAbwBtAEIAYQBzAGUANgA0AFMAdAByAGkAbgBnA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoARgByAG8AbQBCAGEAcwBlADYANABTAHQAcgBpAG4AZw%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Malicious Base64 Encoded PowerShell Keywords in Command Lines

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: John Lambert (rule) Status: test
Detects base64 encoded strings used in hidden malicious PowerShell command lines
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Malicious Base64 Encoded PowerShell Keywords in Command Lines
-- Sigma ID:     f26c6093-6f14-4b12-800f-0fcb46f5ffd0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       John Lambert (rule)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_hidden_flag.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AGkAdABzAGEAZABtAGkAbgAgAC8AdAByAGEAbgBzAGYAZQByA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%aXRzYWRtaW4gL3RyYW5zZmVy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IAaQB0AHMAYQBkAG0AaQBuACAALwB0AHIAYQBuAHMAZgBlAHIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JpdHNhZG1pbiAvdHJhbnNmZX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%YgBpAHQAcwBhAGQAbQBpAG4AIAAvAHQAcgBhAG4AcwBmAGUAcg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Yml0c2FkbWluIC90cmFuc2Zlc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AGMAaAB1AG4AawBfAHMAaQB6AGUA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JABjAGgAdQBuAGsAXwBzAGkAegBlA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JGNodW5rX3Npem%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAYwBoAHUAbgBrAF8AcwBpAHoAZQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RjaHVua19zaXpl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Y2h1bmtfc2l6Z%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AE8ALgBDAG8AbQBwAHIAZQBzAHMAaQBvAG4A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kATwAuAEMAbwBtAHAAcgBlAHMAcwBpAG8Abg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lPLkNvbXByZXNzaW9u%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQBPAC4AQwBvAG0AcAByAGUAcwBzAGkAbwBuA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SU8uQ29tcHJlc3Npb2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ty5Db21wcmVzc2lvb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AE8ALgBNAGUAbQBvAHIAeQBTAHQAcgBlAGEAbQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kATwAuAE0AZQBtAG8AcgB5AFMAdAByAGUAYQBtA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lPLk1lbW9yeVN0cmVhb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQBPAC4ATQBlAG0AbwByAHkAUwB0AHIAZQBhAG0A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SU8uTWVtb3J5U3RyZWFt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ty5NZW1vcnlTdHJlYW%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARwBlAHQAQwBoAHUAbgBrA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%5HZXRDaHVua%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AEcAZQB0AEMAaAB1AG4Aaw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LgBHAGUAdABDAGgAdQBuAGsA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LkdldENodW5r%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%R2V0Q2h1bm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AEgAUgBFAEEARABfAEkATgBGAE8ANgA0A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QASABSAEUAQQBEAF8ASQBOAEYATwA2ADQA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RIUkVBRF9JTkZPNj%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SFJFQURfSU5GTzY0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VABIAFIARQBBAEQAXwBJAE4ARgBPADYANA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VEhSRUFEX0lORk82N%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHIAZQBhAHQAZQBSAGUAbQBvAHQAZQBUAGgAcgBlAGEAZA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmVhdGVSZW1vdGVUaHJlYW%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MAcgBlAGEAdABlAFIAZQBtAG8AdABlAFQAaAByAGUAYQBkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NyZWF0ZVJlbW90ZVRocmVhZ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Q3JlYXRlUmVtb3RlVGhyZWFk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QwByAGUAYQB0AGUAUgBlAG0AbwB0AGUAVABoAHIAZQBhAGQA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0AZQBtAG0AbwB2AGUA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%1lbW1vdm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AGUAbQBtAG8AdgBlA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bQBlAG0AbQBvAHYAZQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bWVtbW92Z%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZW1tb3Zl%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% hidden %')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Base64 Encoded IEX Cmdlet

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of a base64 encoded "IEX" cmdlet in a process command line
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Base64 Encoded IEX Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     88f680b8-070e-402c-ae11-d2914f2257f1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-08-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_iex.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'SUVYIChb|ElFWCAoWw|BJRVggKF|aWV4IChb|GlleCAoWw|BpZXggKF|aWV4IChOZXc|GlleCAoTmV|BpZXggKE5ldw|SUVYIChOZXc|ElFWCAoTmV|BJRVggKE5ldw|SUVYKFs|ElFWCh|BJRVgoWw|aWV4KFs|GlleCh|BpZXgoWw|aWV4KE5ldw|GlleChOZXc|BpZXgoTm|SUVYKE5ldw|ElFWChOZXc|BJRVgoTm|SUVYKCgn|ElFWCgoJw|BJRVgoKC|aWV4KCgn|GlleCgoJw|BpZXgoKC')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQBFAFgAIAAoAFsA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kARQBYACAAKABbA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JAEUAWAAgACgAWw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%aQBlAHgAIAAoAFsA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAZQB4ACAAKABbA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pAGUAeAAgACgAWw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%aQBlAHgAIAAoAE4AZQB3A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAZQB4ACAAKABOAGUAdw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pAGUAeAAgACgATgBlAHcA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQBFAFgAIAAoAE4AZQB3A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kARQBYACAAKABOAGUAdw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JAEUAWAAgACgATgBlAHcA%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Base64 Encoded Invoke Keyword

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1027 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems), Harjot Singh, @cyb3rjy0t Status: test
Detects UTF-8 and UTF-16 Base64 encoded powershell 'Invoke-' calls
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Base64 Encoded Invoke Keyword
-- Sigma ID:     6385697e-9f1b-40bd-8817-f4a91f40508e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), Harjot Singh, @cyb3rjy0t
-- Date:         2022-05-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_invoke.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -e%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQBuAHYAbwBrAGUALQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAbgB2AG8AawBlAC0A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JAG4AdgBvAGsAZQAtA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SW52b2tlL%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ludm9rZS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%JbnZva2Ut%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Powershell Base64 Encoded MpPreference Cmdlet

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects base64 encoded "MpPreference" PowerShell cmdlet code that tries to modifies or tamper with Windows Defender AV
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Base64 Encoded MpPreference Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     c6fb44c6-71f5-49e6-9462-1425d328aee3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_mppreference.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'QWRkLU1wUHJlZmVyZW5jZSA|EFkZC1NcFByZWZlcmVuY2U|BBZGQtTXBQcmVmZXJlbmNlIA|U2V0LU1wUHJlZmVyZW5jZSA|FNldC1NcFByZWZlcmVuY2U|BTZXQtTXBQcmVmZXJlbmNlIA|YWRkLW1wcHJlZmVyZW5jZSA|GFkZC1tcHByZWZlcmVuY2U|BhZGQtbXBwcmVmZXJlbmNlIA|c2V0LW1wcHJlZmVyZW5jZSA|HNldC1tcHByZWZlcmVuY2U|BzZXQtbXBwcmVmZXJlbmNlIA')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QQBkAGQALQBNAHAAUAByAGUAZgBlAHIAZQBuAGMAZQAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAZABkAC0ATQBwAFAAcgBlAGYAZQByAGUAbgBjAGUAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BAGQAZAAtAE0AcABQAHIAZQBmAGUAcgBlAG4AYwBlACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UwBlAHQALQBNAHAAUAByAGUAZgBlAHIAZQBuAGMAZQAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MAZQB0AC0ATQBwAFAAcgBlAGYAZQByAGUAbgBjAGUAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TAGUAdAAtAE0AcABQAHIAZQBmAGUAcgBlAG4AYwBlACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%YQBkAGQALQBtAHAAcAByAGUAZgBlAHIAZQBuAGMAZQAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAZABkAC0AbQBwAHAAcgBlAGYAZQByAGUAbgBjAGUAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hAGQAZAAtAG0AcABwAHIAZQBmAGUAcgBlAG4AYwBlACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cwBlAHQALQBtAHAAcAByAGUAZgBlAHIAZQBuAGMAZQAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MAZQB0AC0AbQBwAHAAcgBlAGYAZQByAGUAbgBjAGUAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zAGUAdAAtAG0AcABwAHIAZQBmAGUAcgBlAG4AYwBlACAA%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Base64 Encoded Reflective Assembly Load

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1027, T1620 Author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), pH-T (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects base64 encoded .NET reflective loading of Assembly
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Base64 Encoded Reflective Assembly Load
-- Sigma ID:     62b7ccc9-23b4-471e-aa15-6da3663c4d59
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027, T1620
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_reflection_assembly_load.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WwBSAGUAZgBsAGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuAC4AQQBzAHMAZQBtAGIAbAB5AF0AOgA6AEwAbwBhAGQAKA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sAUgBlAGYAbABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAuAEEAcwBzAGUAbQBiAGwAeQBdADoAOgBMAG8AYQBkACgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bAFIAZQBmAGwAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4ALgBBAHMAcwBlAG0AYgBsAHkAXQA6ADoATABvAGEAZAAoA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AFsAcgBlAGYAbABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAuAGEAcwBzAGUAbQBiAGwAeQBdADoAOgAoACIATABvAGEAZAAiAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BbAHIAZQBmAGwAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4ALgBhAHMAcwBlAG0AYgBsAHkAXQA6ADoAKAAiAEwAbwBhAGQAIgAp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AWwByAGUAZgBsAGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuAC4AYQBzAHMAZQBtAGIAbAB5AF0AOgA6ACgAIgBMAG8AYQBkACIAK%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WwBSAGUAZgBsAGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuAC4AQQBzAHMAZQBtAGIAbAB5AF0AOgA6ACgAIgBMAG8AYQBkACIAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sAUgBlAGYAbABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAuAEEAcwBzAGUAbQBiAGwAeQBdADoAOgAoACIATABvAGEAZAAiACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bAFIAZQBmAGwAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4ALgBBAHMAcwBlAG0AYgBsAHkAXQA6ADoAKAAiAEwAbwBhAGQAIgApA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WwByAGUAZgBsAGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuAC4AYQBzAHMAZQBtAGIAbAB5AF0AOgA6AEwAbwBhAGQAKA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sAcgBlAGYAbABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAuAGEAcwBzAGUAbQBiAGwAeQBdADoAOgBMAG8AYQBkACgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bAHIAZQBmAGwAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4ALgBhAHMAcwBlAG0AYgBsAHkAXQA6ADoATABvAGEAZAAoA%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Encoded And Obfuscated Reflection Assembly Load Function Call

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1027 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious base64 encoded and obfuscated "LOAD" keyword used in .NET "reflection.assembly"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Encoded And Obfuscated Reflection Assembly Load Function Call
-- Sigma ID:     9c0295ce-d60d-40bd-bd74-84673b7592b1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_reflection_assembly_load_obfusc.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6ACgAIgBMACIAKwAiAG8AYQBkACIAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgAoACIATAAiACsAIgBvAGEAZAAiACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoAKAAiAEwAIgArACIAbwBhAGQAIgApA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6ACgAIgBMAG8AIgArACIAYQBkACIAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgAoACIATABvACIAKwAiAGEAZAAiACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoAKAAiAEwAbwAiACsAIgBhAGQAIgApA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6ACgAIgBMAG8AYQAiACsAIgBkACIAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgAoACIATABvAGEAIgArACIAZAAiACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoAKAAiAEwAbwBhACIAKwAiAGQAIgApA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6ACgAJwBMACcAKwAnAG8AYQBkACcAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgAoACcATAAnACsAJwBvAGEAZAAnACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoAKAAnAEwAJwArACcAbwBhAGQAJwApA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6ACgAJwBMAG8AJwArACcAYQBkACcAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgAoACcATABvACcAKwAnAGEAZAAnACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoAKAAnAEwAbwAnACsAJwBhAGQAJwApA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OgA6ACgAJwBMAG8AYQAnACsAJwBkACcAKQ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oAOgAoACcATABvAGEAJwArACcAZAAnACkA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6ADoAKAAnAEwAbwBhACcAKwAnAGQAJwApA%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

PowerShell Base64 Encoded WMI Classes

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1027 Author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects calls to base64 encoded WMI class such as "Win32_ShadowCopy", "Win32_ScheduledJob", etc.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Base64 Encoded WMI Classes
-- Sigma ID:     1816994b-42e1-4fb1-afd2-134d88184f71
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_base64_wmi_classes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Process Execution Proxy Via CL_Invocation.ps1

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1216 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova Status: test
Detects calls to "SyncInvoke" that is part of the "CL_Invocation.ps1" script to proxy execution using "System.Diagnostics.Process"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Process Execution Proxy Via CL_Invocation.ps1
-- Sigma ID:     a0459f02-ac51-4c09-b511-b8c9203fc429
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova
-- Date:         2020-10-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_cl_invocation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SyncInvoke %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Assembly Loading Via CL_LoadAssembly.ps1

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1216 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects calls to "LoadAssemblyFromPath" or "LoadAssemblyFromNS" that are part of the "CL_LoadAssembly.ps1" script. This can be abused to load different assemblies and bypass App locker controls.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Assembly Loading Via CL_LoadAssembly.ps1
-- Sigma ID:     c57872c7-614f-4d7f-a40d-b78c8df2d30d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_cl_loadassembly.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LoadAssemblyFromPath %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LoadAssemblyFromNS %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Script Proxy Execution Via CL_Mutexverifiers.ps1

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1216 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, frack113 Status: test
Detects the use of the Microsoft signed script "CL_mutexverifiers" to proxy the execution of additional PowerShell script commands
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Script Proxy Execution Via CL_Mutexverifiers.ps1
-- Sigma ID:     1e0e1a81-e79b-44bc-935b-ddb9c8006b3d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_cl_mutexverifiers.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
    AND procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nologo -windowstyle minimized -file %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

ConvertTo-SecureString Cmdlet Usage Via CommandLine

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1027, T1059.001 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton Status: test
Detects usage of the "ConvertTo-SecureString" cmdlet via the commandline. Which is fairly uncommon and could indicate potential suspicious activity
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ConvertTo-SecureString Cmdlet Usage Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     74403157-20f5-415d-89a7-c505779585cf
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027, T1059.001
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2020-10-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_cmdline_convertto_securestring.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use to pass password to different powershell commands
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-SecureString%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use to pass password to different powershell commands

Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via Reversed Commands

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1027, T1059.001 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton Status: test
Detects the presence of reversed PowerShell commands in the CommandLine. This is often used as a method of obfuscation by attackers
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via Reversed Commands
-- Sigma ID:     b6b49cd1-34d6-4ead-b1bf-176e9edba9a4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027, T1059.001
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2020-10-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_cmdline_reversed_strings.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential PowerShell Command Line Obfuscation

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1027, T1059.001 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton (fp) Status: test
Detects the PowerShell command lines with special characters
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Command Line Obfuscation
-- Sigma ID:     d7bcd677-645d-4691-a8d4-7a5602b780d1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027, T1059.001
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton (fp)
-- Date:         2020-10-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_cmdline_special_characters.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Amazon SSM Document Worker; Windows Defender ATP
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Amazon SSM Document Worker; Windows Defender ATP

Obfuscated PowerShell MSI Install via WindowsInstaller COM

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1027.010, T1218.007, T1059.001 Author: Meroujan Antonyan (vx3r) Status: experimental
Detects the execution of obfuscated PowerShell commands that attempt to install MSI packages via the Windows Installer COM object (`WindowsInstaller.Installer`). The technique involves manipulating strings to hide functionality, such as constructing class names using string insertion (e.g., 'indowsInstaller.Installer'.Insert(0,'W')) and correcting malformed URLs (e.g., converting 'htps://' to 'https://') at runtime. This behavior is commonly associated with malware loaders or droppers that aim to bypass static detection by hiding intent in runtime-generated strings and using legitimate tools for code execution. The use of `InstallProduct` and COM object creation, particularly combined with hidden window execution and suppressed UI, indicates an attempt to install software (likely malicious) without user interaction.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Obfuscated PowerShell MSI Install via WindowsInstaller COM
-- Sigma ID:     7b6a7418-3afc-11f0-aff4-000d3abf478c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027.010, T1218.007, T1059.001
-- Author:       Meroujan Antonyan (vx3r)
-- Date:         2025-05-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_comobject_msi.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ComObject%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%InstallProduct(%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Insert(%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UILevel%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell MSI Install via WindowsInstaller COM From Remote Location

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1218, T1105 Author: Meroujan Antonyan (vx3r) Status: experimental
Detects the execution of PowerShell commands that attempt to install MSI packages via the Windows Installer COM object (`WindowsInstaller.Installer`) hosted remotely. This could be indication of malicious software deployment or lateral movement attempts using Windows Installer functionality. And the usage of WindowsInstaller COM object rather than msiexec could be an attempt to bypass the detection.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell MSI Install via WindowsInstaller COM From Remote Location
-- Sigma ID:     222720a7-047f-4054-baa5-bab9be757db0
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1218, T1105
-- Author:       Meroujan Antonyan (vx3r)
-- Date:         2025-06-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_comobject_msi_remote.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Computer Discovery And Export Via Get-ADComputer Cmdlet

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1033 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of the Get-ADComputer cmdlet to collect computer information and output it to a file
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Computer Discovery And Export Via Get-ADComputer Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     435e10e4-992a-4281-96f3-38b11106adde
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-11-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_computer_discovery_get_adcomputer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate admin scripts may use the same technique, it's better to exclude specific computers or users who execute these commands or scripts often
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADComputer %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Filter \\*%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% > %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | Select %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Out-File%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Content%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-Content%')))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate admin scripts may use the same technique, it's better to exclude specific computers or users who execute these commands or scripts often

Potential PowerShell Console History Access Attempt via History File

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1552.001 Author: Luc Génaux Status: experimental
Detects potential access attempts to the PowerShell console history directly via history file (ConsoleHost_history.txt). This can give access to plaintext passwords used in PowerShell commands or used for general reconnaissance.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Console History Access Attempt via History File
-- Sigma ID:     f4ff7323-b5fc-4323-8b52-6b9408e15788
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1552.001
-- Author:       Luc Génaux
-- Date:         2025-04-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_console_history_file_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate access of the console history file is possible
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConsoleHost\_history.txt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%(Get-PSReadLineOption).HistorySavePath%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate access of the console history file is possible

New Service Creation Using PowerShell

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003 Author: Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community Status: test
Detects the creation of a new service using powershell.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        New Service Creation Using PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     c02e96b7-c63a-4c47-bd83-4a9f74afcfb2
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
-- Date:         2023-02-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_create_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator or user creates a service for legitimate reasons.; Software installation
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-Service%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-BinaryPathName%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrator or user creates a service for legitimate reasons.; Software installation

Gzip Archive Decode Via PowerShell

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1132.001 Author: Hieu Tran Status: test
Detects attempts of decoding encoded Gzip archives via PowerShell.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Gzip Archive Decode Via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     98767d61-b2e8-4d71-b661-e36783ee24c1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1132.001
-- Author:       Hieu Tran
-- Date:         2023-03-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_decode_gzip.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative scripts may use this functionality. Use "ParentImage" in combination with the script names and allowed users and applications to filter legitimate executions
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GZipStream%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::Decompress%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative scripts may use this functionality. Use "ParentImage" in combination with the script names and allowed users and applications to filter legitimate executions

PowerShell Execution With Potential Decryption Capabilities

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects PowerShell commands that decrypt an ".LNK" "file to drop the next stage of the malware.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Execution With Potential Decryption Capabilities
-- Sigma ID:     434c08ba-8406-4d15-8b24-782cb071a691
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_decrypt_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ChildItem %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dir %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gci %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ls %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Content %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cat %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ReadAllBytes%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ^| %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\*.lnk%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Recurse%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Skip %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExpandProperty %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\*.lnk%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WriteAllBytes%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% .length %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Powershell Defender Disable Scan Feature

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects requests to disable Microsoft Defender features using PowerShell commands
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Defender Disable Scan Feature
-- Sigma ID:     1ec65a5f-9473-4f12-97da-622044d6df21
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_defender_disable_feature.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible administrative activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-MpPreference %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MpPreference %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableArchiveScanning %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableRealtimeMonitoring %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableIOAVProtection %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableBehaviorMonitoring %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableBlockAtFirstSeen %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableCatchupFullScan %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableCatchupQuickScan %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%$true%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 1 %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBSAGUAYQBsAHQAaQBtAGUATQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAUgBlAGEAbAB0AGkAbQBlAE0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAFIAZQBhAGwAdABpAG0AZQBNAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBJAE8AQQBWAFAAcgBvAHQAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUASQBPAEEAVgBQAHIAbwB0AGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEkATwBBAFYAUAByAG8AdABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBCAGUAaABhAHYAaQBvAHIATQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAQgBlAGgAYQB2AGkAbwByAE0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEIAZQBoAGEAdgBpAG8AcgBNAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBCAGwAbwBjAGsAQQB0AEYAaQByAHMAdABTAGUAZQBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAQgBsAG8AYwBrAEEAdABGAGkAcgBzAHQAUwBlAGUAbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEIAbABvAGMAawBBAHQARgBpAHIAcwB0AFMAZQBlAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQByAGUAYQBsAHQAaQBtAGUAbQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAcgBlAGEAbAB0AGkAbQBlAG0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAHIAZQBhAGwAdABpAG0AZQBtAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBpAG8AYQB2AHAAcgBvAHQAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAaQBvAGEAdgBwAHIAbwB0AGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGkAbwBhAHYAcAByAG8AdABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBiAGUAaABhAHYAaQBvAHIAbQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAYgBlAGgAYQB2AGkAbwByAG0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGIAZQBoAGEAdgBpAG8AcgBtAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBiAGwAbwBjAGsAYQB0AGYAaQByAHMAdABzAGUAZQBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAYgBsAG8AYwBrAGEAdABmAGkAcgBzAHQAcwBlAGUAbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGIAbABvAGMAawBhAHQAZgBpAHIAcwB0AHMAZQBlAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBDAGEAdABjAGgAdQBwAEYAdQBsAGwAUwBjAGEAbgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBDAGEAdABjAGgAdQBwAFEAdQBpAGMAawBTAGMAYQBuAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBBAHIAYwBoAGkAdgBlAFMAYwBhAG4AbgBpAG4AZwA%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'ZGlzYWJsZWFyY2hpdmVzY2FubmluZyA|GRpc2FibGVhcmNoaXZlc2Nhbm5pbmc|BkaXNhYmxlYXJjaGl2ZXNjYW5uaW5nIA|RGlzYWJsZUFyY2hpdmVTY2FubmluZyA|ERpc2FibGVBcmNoaXZlU2Nhbm5pbmc|BEaXNhYmxlQXJjaGl2ZVNjYW5uaW5nIA|ZGlzYWJsZWJlaGF2aW9ybW9uaXRvcmluZyA|GRpc2FibGViZWhhdmlvcm1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BkaXNhYmxlYmVoYXZpb3Jtb25pdG9yaW5nIA|RGlzYWJsZUJlaGF2aW9yTW9uaXRvcmluZyA|ERpc2FibGVCZWhhdmlvck1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BEaXNhYmxlQmVoYXZpb3JNb25pdG9yaW5nIA|ZGlzYWJsZWJsb2NrYXRmaXJzdHNlZW4g|GRpc2FibGVibG9ja2F0Zmlyc3RzZWVuIA|BkaXNhYmxlYmxvY2thdGZpcnN0c2Vlbi|RGlzYWJsZUJsb2NrQXRGaXJzdFNlZW4g|ERpc2FibGVCbG9ja0F0Rmlyc3RTZWVuIA|BEaXNhYmxlQmxvY2tBdEZpcnN0U2Vlbi|ZGlzYWJsZWNhdGNodXBmdWxsc2NhbiA|GRpc2FibGVjYXRjaHVwZnVsbHNjYW4|BkaXNhYmxlY2F0Y2h1cGZ1bGxzY2FuIA|RGlzYWJsZUNhdGNodXBGdWxsU2NhbiA|ERpc2FibGVDYXRjaHVwRnVsbFNjYW4|BEaXNhYmxlQ2F0Y2h1cEZ1bGxTY2FuIA|ZGlzYWJsZWNhdGNodXBxdWlja3NjYW4g|GRpc2FibGVjYXRjaHVwcXVpY2tzY2FuIA|BkaXNhYmxlY2F0Y2h1cHF1aWNrc2Nhbi|RGlzYWJsZUNhdGNodXBRdWlja1NjYW4g|ERpc2FibGVDYXRjaHVwUXVpY2tTY2FuIA|BEaXNhYmxlQ2F0Y2h1cFF1aWNrU2Nhbi|ZGlzYWJsZWlvYXZwcm90ZWN0aW9uIA|GRpc2FibGVpb2F2cHJvdGVjdGlvbiA|BkaXNhYmxlaW9hdnByb3RlY3Rpb2|RGlzYWJsZUlPQVZQcm90ZWN0aW9uIA|ERpc2FibGVJT0FWUHJvdGVjdGlvbiA|BEaXNhYmxlSU9BVlByb3RlY3Rpb2|ZGlzYWJsZXJlYWx0aW1lbW9uaXRvcmluZyA|GRpc2FibGVyZWFsdGltZW1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BkaXNhYmxlcmVhbHRpbWVtb25pdG9yaW5nIA|RGlzYWJsZVJlYWx0aW1lTW9uaXRvcmluZyA|ERpc2FibGVSZWFsdGltZU1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BEaXNhYmxlUmVhbHRpbWVNb25pdG9yaW5nIA'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Possible administrative activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters

Powershell Defender Exclusion

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects requests to exclude files, folders or processes from Antivirus scanning using PowerShell cmdlets
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Defender Exclusion
-- Sigma ID:     17769c90-230e-488b-a463-e05c08e9d48f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-04-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_defender_exclusion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible Admin Activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-MpPreference %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MpPreference %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionPath %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionExtension %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionProcess %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionIpAddress %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Possible Admin Activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters

Disable Windows Defender AV Security Monitoring

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: ok @securonix invrep-de, oscd.community, frack113 Status: test
Detects attackers attempting to disable Windows Defender using Powershell
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Disable Windows Defender AV Security Monitoring
-- Sigma ID:     a7ee1722-c3c5-aeff-3212-c777e4733217
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       ok @securonix invrep-de, oscd.community, frack113
-- Date:         2020-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_defender_av_security_monitoring.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Minimal, for some older versions of dev tools, such as pycharm, developers were known to sometimes disable Windows Defender to improve performance, but this generally is not considered a good security practice.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-DisableRuntimeMonitoring $true%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'sc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Minimal, for some older versions of dev tools, such as pycharm, developers were known to sometimes disable Windows Defender to improve performance, but this generally is not considered a good security practice.

Windows Firewall Disabled via PowerShell

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1562 Author: Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects attempts to disable the Windows Firewall using PowerShell
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Firewall Disabled via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     12f6b752-042d-483e-bf9c-915a6d06ad75
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_firewall.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
