metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DAFT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DCSync%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DinvokeKatz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DllInjection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DNSUpdate%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DNSExfiltrator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DomainPasswordSpray%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-DowngradeAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-EgressCheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Eyewitness%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-FakeLogonScreen%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Farmer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Get-RBCD-Threaded%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Gopher%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Grouper%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-HandleKatz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ImpersonatedProcess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ImpersonateSystem%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-InteractiveSystemPowerShell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Internalmonologue%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Inveigh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-InveighRelay%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-KrbRelay%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-LdapSignCheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Lockless%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-MalSCCM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Mimikatz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Mimikittenz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-MITM6%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-NanoDump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-NetRipper%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Nightmare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-NinjaCopy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-OfficeScrape%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-OxidResolver%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-P0wnedshell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Paranoia%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PortScan%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PoshRatHttp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PostExfil%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PowerDump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PowerDPAPI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PowerShellTCP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PowerShellWMI%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PPLDump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PsExec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PSInject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-PsUaCme%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ReflectivePEInjection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ReverseDNSLookup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Rubeus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RunAs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SafetyKatz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SauronEye%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SCShell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Seatbelt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ServiceAbuse%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ShadowSpray%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Sharp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Shellcode%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SMBScanner%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Snaffler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Spoolsample%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SpraySinglePassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SSHCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-StandIn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-StickyNotesExtract%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SystemCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Tasksbackdoor%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Tater%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Thunderfox%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ThunderStruck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-TokenManipulation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Tokenvator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-TotalExec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-UrbanBishop%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-UserHunter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-VoiceTroll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Whisker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WinEnum%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-winPEAS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WireTap%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WmiCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WMIExec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WScriptBypassUAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Zerologon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MailRaider%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ADIDNSNode%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-DNSRecordArray%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-HoneyHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-InMemoryModule%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-MachineAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-SOASerialNumberArray%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Out-Minidump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Port-Scan%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PowerBreach%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powercat %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PowerUp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PowerView%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-ADIDNSNode%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-MachineAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-Update%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Rename-ADIDNSNode%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Revoke-ADIDNSPermission%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADIDNSNode%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MacAttribute%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MachineAccountAttribute%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Wallpaper%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Show-TargetScreen%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Start-CaptureServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Start-Dnscat2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Start-WebcamRecorder%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Veeam-Get-Creds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VolumeShadowCopyTools%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

MSExchange Transport Agent Installation

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1505.002 Author: Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the Installation of a Exchange Transport Agent
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
-- Sigma ID:     83809e84-4475-4b69-bc3e-4aad8568612f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1505.002
-- Author:       Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-06-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_msexchange_transport_agent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate installations of exchange TransportAgents. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Install-TransportAgent%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate installations of exchange TransportAgents. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.

Non Interactive PowerShell Process Spawned

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g (rule), oscd.community (improvements) Status: test
Detects non-interactive PowerShell activity by looking at the "powershell" process with a non-user GUI process such as "explorer.exe" as a parent.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Non Interactive PowerShell Process Spawned
-- Sigma ID:     f4bbd493-b796-416e-bbf2-121235348529
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g (rule), oscd.community (improvements)
-- Date:         2019-09-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_non_interactive_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Likely. Many admin scripts and tools leverage PowerShell in their BAT or VB scripts which may trigger this rule often. It is best to add additional filters or use this to hunt for anomalies
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Likely. Many admin scripts and tools leverage PowerShell in their BAT or VB scripts which may trigger this rule often. It is best to add additional filters or use this to hunt for anomalies

Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via WCHAR/CHAR

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1027 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious encoded character syntax often used for defense evasion
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via WCHAR/CHAR
-- Sigma ID:     e312efd0-35a1-407f-8439-b8d434b438a6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_obfuscation_via_utf8.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[char]0x%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%(WCHAR)0x%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Execution of Powershell Script in Public Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) Status: test
This rule detects execution of PowerShell scripts located in the "C:\Users\Public" folder
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution of Powershell Script in Public Folder
-- Sigma ID:     fb9d3ff7-7348-46ab-af8c-b55f5fbf39b4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_public_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f \%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fi C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fi "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fi \%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fil C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fil "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fil \%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-file C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-file "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-file \%Public\%%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

RemoteFXvGPUDisablement Abuse Via AtomicTestHarnesses

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects calls to the AtomicTestHarnesses "Invoke-ATHRemoteFXvGPUDisablementCommand" which is designed to abuse the "RemoteFXvGPUDisablement.exe" binary to run custom PowerShell code via module load-order hijacking.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        RemoteFXvGPUDisablement Abuse Via AtomicTestHarnesses
-- Sigma ID:     a6fc3c46-23b8-4996-9ea2-573f4c4d88c5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_remotefxvgpudisablement_abuse.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ATHRemoteFXvGPUDisablementCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ATHRemoteFXvGPUDisableme%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Tamper Windows Defender Remove-MpPreference

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects attempts to remove Windows Defender configurations using the 'MpPreference' cmdlet
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Tamper Windows Defender Remove-MpPreference
-- Sigma ID:     07e3cb2c-0608-410d-be4b-1511cb1a0448
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_remove_mppreference.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate PowerShell scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-MpPreference%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ControlledFolderAccessProtectedFolders %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AttackSurfaceReductionRules\_Ids %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AttackSurfaceReductionRules\_Actions %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-CheckForSignaturesBeforeRunningScan %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate PowerShell scripts

Potential Powershell ReverseShell Connection

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: FPT.EagleEye, wagga, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: stable
Detects usage of the "TcpClient" class. Which can be abused to establish remote connections and reverse-shells. As seen used by the Nishang "Invoke-PowerShellTcpOneLine" reverse shell and other.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Powershell ReverseShell Connection
-- Sigma ID:     edc2f8ae-2412-4dfd-b9d5-0c57727e70be
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       FPT.EagleEye, wagga, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_reverse_shell_connection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    In rare administrative cases, this function might be used to check network connectivity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Net.Sockets.TCPClient%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.GetStream(%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Write(%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: In rare administrative cases, this function might be used to check network connectivity

Run PowerShell Script from ADS

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: Sergey Soldatov, Kaspersky Lab, oscd.community Status: test
Detects PowerShell script execution from Alternate Data Stream (ADS)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Run PowerShell Script from ADS
-- Sigma ID:     45a594aa-1fbd-4972-a809-ff5a99dd81b8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       Sergey Soldatov, Kaspersky Lab, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_run_script_from_ads.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Content%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Stream%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Run PowerShell Script from Redirected Input Stream

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Moriarty Meng (idea), Anton Kutepov (rule), oscd.community Status: test
Detects PowerShell script execution via input stream redirect
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Run PowerShell Script from Redirected Input Stream
-- Sigma ID:     c83bf4b5-cdf0-437c-90fa-43d734f7c476
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Moriarty Meng (idea), Anton Kutepov (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_run_script_from_input_stream.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\s-\s*<')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell SAM Copy

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1003.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious PowerShell scripts accessing SAM hives
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell SAM Copy
-- Sigma ID:     1af57a4b-460a-4738-9034-db68b880c665
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_sam_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some rare backup scenarios; PowerShell scripts fixing HiveNightmare / SeriousSAM ACLs
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%System32\\config\\sam%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Copy-Item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cp $\_.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cpi $\_.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy $\_.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.File]::Copy(%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Some rare backup scenarios; PowerShell scripts fixing HiveNightmare / SeriousSAM ACLs

Suspicious PowerShell Invocation From Script Engines

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious powershell invocations from interpreters or unusual programs
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Invocation From Script Engines
-- Sigma ID:     95eadcb2-92e4-4ed1-9031-92547773a6db
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_script_engine_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Microsoft Operations Manager (MOM); Other scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Microsoft Operations Manager (MOM); Other scripts

Suspicious Service DACL Modification Via Set-Service Cmdlet

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious DACL modifications via the "Set-Service" cmdlet using the "SecurityDescriptorSddl" flag (Only available with PowerShell 7) that can be used to hide services or make them unstopable
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Service DACL Modification Via Set-Service Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     a95b9b42-1308-4735-a1af-abb1c5e6f5ac
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_service_dacl_modification_set_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'pwsh.dll'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-SecurityDescriptorSddl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sd %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Service %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%D;;%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;IU%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;SU%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;BA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;SY%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;WD%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Script Change Permission Via Set-Acl

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects PowerShell execution to set the ACL of a file or a folder
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Script Change Permission Via Set-Acl
-- Sigma ID:     bdeb2cff-af74-4094-8426-724dc937f20a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_acl.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Acl %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AclObject %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PowerShell Set-Acl On Windows Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects PowerShell scripts to set the ACL to a file in the Windows folder
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Set-Acl On Windows Folder
-- Sigma ID:     0944e002-e3f6-4eb5-bf69-3a3067b53d73
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_acl_susp_location.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Acl %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AclObject %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path "C:\\Windows%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path 'C:\\Windows%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path \%windir\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path $env:windir%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FullControl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Allow%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Change PowerShell Policies to an Insecure Level

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects changing the PowerShell script execution policy to a potentially insecure level using the "-ExecutionPolicy" flag.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Change PowerShell Policies to an Insecure Level
-- Sigma ID:     87e3c4e8-a6a8-4ad9-bb4f-46e7ff99a180
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_policies_to_unsecure_level.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrator scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrator scripts

Service StartupType Change Via PowerShell Set-Service

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of the PowerShell "Set-Service" cmdlet to change the startup type of a service to "disabled" or "manual"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Service StartupType Change Via PowerShell Set-Service
-- Sigma ID:     62b20d44-1546-4e61-afce-8e175eb9473c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_service_disabled.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives may occur with troubleshooting scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Service%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-StartupType%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Disabled%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Manual%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PowerShell.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False positives may occur with troubleshooting scripts

Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1490 Author: Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects deletion of Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     21ff4ca9-f13a-41ad-b828-0077b2af2e40
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1490
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_shadowcopy_deletion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Delete()%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-WmiObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rwmi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-CimInstance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rcim%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WmiObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gwmi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-CimInstance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gcim%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_ShadowCopy%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, collection, T1059.001, T1114 Author: FPT.EagleEye, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects adding and using Exchange PowerShell snap-ins to export mailbox data. As seen used by HAFNIUM and APT27
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage
-- Sigma ID:     25676e10-2121-446e-80a4-71ff8506af47
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, collection | T1059.001, T1114
-- Author:       FPT.EagleEye, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_snapins_hafnium.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Stop Windows Service Via PowerShell Stop-Service

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: impact, T1489 Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the PowerShell Cmdlet "Stop-Service"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Stop Windows Service Via PowerShell Stop-Service
-- Sigma ID:     c49c5062-0966-4170-9efd-9968c913a6cf
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489
-- Author:       Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_stop_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    There are many legitimate reasons to stop a service. This rule isn't looking for any suspicious behaviour in particular. Filter legitimate activity accordingly
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Stop-Service %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: There are many legitimate reasons to stop a service. This rule isn't looking for any suspicious behaviour in particular. Filter legitimate activity accordingly

Suspicious PowerShell Download and Execute Pattern

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious PowerShell download patterns that are often used in malicious scripts, stagers or downloaders (make sure that your backend applies the strings case-insensitive)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Download and Execute Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     e6c54d94-498c-4562-a37c-b469d8e9a275
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_download_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software installers that pull packages from remote systems and execute them
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX ((New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX((New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -command (New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c (New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile(%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Software installers that pull packages from remote systems and execute them

Suspicious PowerShell Parameter Substring

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Daniel Bohannon (idea), Roberto Rodriguez (Fix) Status: test
Detects suspicious PowerShell invocation with a parameter substring
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Parameter Substring
-- Sigma ID:     36210e0d-5b19-485d-a087-c096088885f0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Daniel Bohannon (idea), Roberto Rodriguez (Fix)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_parameter_variation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowstyle h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowstyl h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowsty h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowst h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windows h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windo h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -wind h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -wi h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hid %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hidd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hidde %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoPr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoPro %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoProf %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoProfi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoProfil %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nonin %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nonint %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninte %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninter %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nonintera %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninterac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninteract %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninteracti %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninteractiv %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedComman %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedComma %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedComm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedCom %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedCo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedC %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encoded %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encode %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encod %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enco %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -en %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpolic %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpoli %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpol %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -execution bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executio bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executi bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -execut bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -execu bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -exec bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -exe bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ex bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ep bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowstyle h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowstyl h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowsty h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowst h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windows h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windo h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /wind h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /wi h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hid %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hidd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hidde %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoPr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoPro %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoProf %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoProfi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoProfil %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /nonin %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /nonint %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninte %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninter %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /nonintera %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninterac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninteract %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninteracti %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninteractiv %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedComman %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedComma %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedComm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedCom %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedCo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedC %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encoded %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encode %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encod %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /enco %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /en %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpolic %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpoli %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpol %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /execution bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executio bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executi bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /execut bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /execu bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /exec bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /exe bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ex bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ep bypass%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious PowerShell Parent Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Harish Segar Status: test
Detects a suspicious or uncommon parent processes of PowerShell
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     754ed792-634f-40ae-b3bc-e0448d33f695
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Harish Segar
-- Date:         2020-03-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_parent_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Other scripts
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%tomcat%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\amigo.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\browser.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\firefox.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\httpd.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\iexplore.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\jbosssvc.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\microsoftedge.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\microsoftedgecp.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\MicrosoftEdgeSH.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\nginx.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\outlook.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\php-cgi.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\safari.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sqlagent.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sqlserver.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sqlservr.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\w3wp.exe')))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c pwsh%')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Windows PowerShell')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'PowerShell Core 6'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Other scripts

PowerShell Script Run in AppData

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community Status: test
Detects a suspicious command line execution that invokes PowerShell with reference to an AppData folder
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Script Run in AppData
-- Sigma ID:     ac175779-025a-4f12-98b0-acdaeb77ea85
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-01-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_ps_appdata.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\pwsh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwsh.exe%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Roaming\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative scripts

Powershell Token Obfuscation - Process Creation

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1027.009 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects TOKEN OBFUSCATION technique from Invoke-Obfuscation
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Token Obfuscation - Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     deb9b646-a508-44ee-b7c9-d8965921c6b6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.009
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_token_obfuscation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\w+`(\w+|-|.)`[\w+|\s]')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '"(\{\d\})+"\s*-f')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '(?i)\$\{`?e`?n`?v`?:`?p`?a`?t`?h`?\}')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Uninstall of Windows Defender Feature via PowerShell

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: yxinmiracle Status: experimental
Detects the use of PowerShell with Uninstall-WindowsFeature or Remove-WindowsFeature cmdlets to disable or remove the Windows Defender GUI feature, a common technique used by adversaries to evade defenses.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Uninstall of Windows Defender Feature via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     c443012c-7928-43bf-ac20-7eda5efe61ad
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       yxinmiracle
-- Date:         2025-08-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_uninstall_defender_feature.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Windows-Defender%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Uninstall-WindowsFeature%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-WindowsFeature%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

User Discovery And Export Via Get-ADUser Cmdlet

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1033 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of the Get-ADUser cmdlet to collect user information and output it to a file
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Discovery And Export Via Get-ADUser Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     1114e048-b69c-4f41-bc20-657245ae6e3f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_user_discovery_get_aduser.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate admin scripts may use the same technique, it's better to exclude specific computers or users who execute these commands or scripts often
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADUser %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Filter \\*%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% > %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | Select %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Out-File%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Content%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-Content%')))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate admin scripts may use the same technique, it's better to exclude specific computers or users who execute these commands or scripts often

Net WebClient Casing Anomalies

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects PowerShell command line contents that include a suspicious abnormal casing in the Net.Webclient (e.g. nEt.WEbCliEnT) string as used in obfuscation techniques
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Net WebClient Casing Anomalies
-- Sigma ID:     c86133ad-4725-4bd0-8170-210788e0a7ba
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_webclient_casing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAFQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQBUAC4AdwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAVAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAHQALgB3AGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQB0AC4AdwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAdAAuAHcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBFAHQALgB3AGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAEUAdAAuAHcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAFQALgB3AGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQBUAC4AdwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAVAAuAHcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAFQALgB3AGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAVAAuAHcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAFQALgB3AGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQBUAC4AdwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAVAAuAHcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAHQALgBXAGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQB0AC4AVwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAdAAuAFcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAHQALgBXAGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQB0AC4AVwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAdAAuAFcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBFAHQALgBXAGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAEUAdAAuAFcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAFQALgBXAGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQBUAC4AVwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAVAAuAFcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAFQALgBXAGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAVAAuAFcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAFQALgBXAGUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQBUAC4AVwBlAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAVAAuAFcAZQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAHQALgB3AEUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQB0AC4AdwBFAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAdAAuAHcARQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAHQALgB3AEUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAdAAuAHcARQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAHQALgB3AEUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQB0AC4AdwBFAGIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAdAAuAHcARQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBFAHQALgB3AEUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAEUAdAAuAHcARQBiA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAFQALgB3AEUAYg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQBUAC4AdwBFAGIA%' OR
