metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAHQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQB0AC4AdwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAdAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAHQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAdAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAHQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQB0AC4AdwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAdAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBFAHQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAEUAdAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAFQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAVAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAFQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQBUAC4AdwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAVAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBFAFQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAEUAVAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAHQALgBXAEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQB0AC4AVwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAdAAuAFcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAHQALgBXAEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQB0AC4AVwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAdAAuAFcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBFAHQALgBXAEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAEUAdAAuAFcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBlAFQALgBXAEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQBUAC4AVwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAGUAVAAuAFcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAFQALgBXAEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAVAAuAFcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAFQALgBXAEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4ARQBUAC4AVwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%uAEUAVAAuAFcARQBCA%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious X509Enrollment - Process Creation

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1553.004 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detect use of X509Enrollment
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious X509Enrollment - Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     114de787-4eb2-48cc-abdb-c0b449f93ea4
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_x509enrollment.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative script
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%X509Enrollment.CBinaryConverter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%884e2002-217d-11da-b2a4-000e7bbb2b09%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative script

Suspicious XOR Encoded PowerShell Command

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001, T1140, T1027 Author: Sami Ruohonen, Harish Segar, Tim Shelton, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Vasiliy Burov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detects presence of a potentially xor encoded powershell command
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious XOR Encoded PowerShell Command
-- Sigma ID:     bb780e0c-16cf-4383-8383-1e5471db6cf9
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1140, T1027
-- Author:       Sami Ruohonen, Harish Segar, Tim Shelton, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Vasiliy Burov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2018-09-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_xor_commandline.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ForEach%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join'%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join`%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::Join%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[char]%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bxor%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Windows PowerShell')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'PowerShell Core 6')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Folder Compress To Potentially Suspicious Output Via Compress-Archive Cmdlet

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1074.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 Status: test
Detects PowerShell scripts that make use of the "Compress-Archive" Cmdlet in order to compress folders and files where the output is stored in a potentially suspicious location that is used often by malware for exfiltration. An adversary might compress data (e.g., sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Folder Compress To Potentially Suspicious Output Via Compress-Archive Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     85a8e5ba-bd03-4bfb-bbfa-a4409a8f8b98
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1074.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_zip_compress.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath $env:TEMP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*:\\Windows\\Temp\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Arbitrary File Download Via PresentationHost.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of "PresentationHost" which is a utility that runs ".xbap" (Browser Applications) files to download arbitrary files
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via PresentationHost.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b124ddf4-778d-418e-907f-6dd3fc0d31cd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_presentationhost_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\presentationhost.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PresentationHost.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

XBAP Execution From Uncommon Locations Via PresentationHost.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of ".xbap" (Browser Applications) files via PresentationHost.EXE from an uncommon location. These files can be abused to run malicious ".xbap" files any bypass AWL
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        XBAP Execution From Uncommon Locations Via PresentationHost.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     d22e2925-cfd8-463f-96f6-89cec9d9bc5f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_presentationhost_uncommon_location_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate ".xbap" being executed via "PresentationHost"
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate ".xbap" being executed via "PresentationHost"

Visual Studio NodejsTools PressAnyKey Arbitrary Binary Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects child processes of Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe that can be used to execute any other binary
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Visual Studio NodejsTools PressAnyKey Arbitrary Binary Execution
-- Sigma ID:     a20391f8-76fb-437b-abc0-dba2df1952c6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pressanykey_lolbin_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by developers as part of NodeJS development with Visual Studio Tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by developers as part of NodeJS development with Visual Studio Tools

Abusing Print Executable

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Furkan CALISKAN, @caliskanfurkan_, @oscd_initiative Status: test
Attackers can use print.exe for remote file copy
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Abusing Print Executable
-- Sigma ID:     bafac3d6-7de9-4dd9-8874-4a1194b493ed
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Furkan CALISKAN, @caliskanfurkan_, @oscd_initiative
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_print_remote_file_copy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\print.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE 'print%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/D%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe%'))
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%print.exe%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

File Download Using ProtocolHandler.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects usage of "ProtocolHandler" to download files. Downloaded files will be located in the cache folder (for example - %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Windows\INetCache\IE)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download Using ProtocolHandler.exe
-- Sigma ID:     104cdb48-a7a8-4ca7-a453-32942c6e5dcb
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_protocolhandler_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\protocolhandler.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ProtocolHandler.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Provlaunch.EXE Binary Proxy Execution Abuse

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel Status: test
Detects child processes of "provlaunch.exe" which might indicate potential abuse to proxy execution.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Provlaunch.EXE Binary Proxy Execution Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     7f5d1c9a-3e83-48df-95a7-2b98aae6c13c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2023-08-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_provlaunch_potential_abuse.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\provlaunch.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Provlaunch.EXE Child Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious child processes of "provlaunch.exe" which might indicate potential abuse to proxy execution.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Provlaunch.EXE Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     f9999590-1f94-4a34-a91e-951e47bedefd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-08-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_provlaunch_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\notepad.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%:\\PerfLogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\provlaunch.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Screen Capture Activity Via Psr.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1113 Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community Status: test
Detects execution of Windows Problem Steps Recorder (psr.exe), a utility used to record the user screen and clicks.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Screen Capture Activity Via Psr.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     2158f96f-43c2-43cb-952a-ab4580f32382
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1113
-- Author:       Beyu Denis, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_psr_capture_screenshots.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Psr.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/start%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-start%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - 3Proxy Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1572 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of 3proxy, a tiny free proxy server
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - 3Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f38a82d2-fba3-4781-b549-525efbec8506
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_3proxy_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\3proxy.exe'
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -i127.0.0.1 -p%')
  OR rawEventMsg = '3proxy - tiny proxy server'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity

PUA - Suspicious ActiveDirectory Enumeration Via AdFind.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1087.002 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects active directory enumeration activity using known AdFind CLI flags
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Suspicious ActiveDirectory Enumeration Via AdFind.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     455b9d50-15a1-4b99-853f-8d37655a4c1b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_enumeration.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Authorized administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc admincountdmp%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc exchaddresses%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lockoutduration%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lockoutthreshold%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lockoutobservationwindow%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%maxpwdage%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%minpwdage%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%minpwdlength%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwdhistorylength%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwdproperties%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Authorized administrative activity

PUA - AdFind.EXE Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1087.002 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects execution of Adfind.exe utility, which can be used for reconnaissance in an Active Directory environment
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdFind.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     514e7e3e-b3b4-4a67-af60-be20f139198b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087.002
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\AdFind.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AdFind.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=d144de8117df2beceaba2201ad304764%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=12ce1c0f3f5837ecc18a3782408fa975%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=bca5675746d13a1f246e2da3c2217492%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=4fbf3f084fbbb2470b80b2013134df35%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=49b639b4acbecc49d72a01f357aa4930%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=53e117a96057eaf19c41380d0e87f1c2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=680dad9e300346e05a85023965867201%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=21aa085d54992511b9f115355e468782%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - AdFind Suspicious Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002 Author: Janantha Marasinghe (https://github.com/blueteam0ps), FPT.EagleEye Team, omkar72, oscd.community Status: test
Detects AdFind execution with common flags seen used during attacks
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdFind Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9a132afa-654e-11eb-ae93-0242ac130002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002
-- Author:       Janantha Marasinghe (https://github.com/blueteam0ps), FPT.EagleEye Team, omkar72, oscd.community
-- Date:         2021-02-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_susp_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate admin activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%domainlist%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trustdmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dcmodes%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%adinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc dclist%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computer\_pwdnotreqd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%objectcategory=%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-subnets -f%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%name="Domain Admins"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc u:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%domainncs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dompol%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% oudmp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%subnetdmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gpodmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fspdmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%users\_noexpire%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computers\_active%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computers\_pwdnotreqd%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate admin activity

PUA - Advanced IP Scanner Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1046, T1135 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @ROxPinTeddy Status: test
Detects the use of Advanced IP Scanner. Seems to be a popular tool for ransomware groups.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Advanced IP Scanner Execution
-- Sigma ID:     bef37fa2-f205-4a7b-b484-0759bfd5f86f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046, T1135
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @ROxPinTeddy
-- Date:         2020-05-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advanced_ip_scanner.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative use
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/portable%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/lng%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\advanced\_ip\_scanner%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%advanced\_ip\_scanner%'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Advanced IP Scanner%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative use

  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/portable%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/lng%')

  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0

PUA - AdvancedRun Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1564.003, T1134.002, T1059.003 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of AdvancedRun utility
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdvancedRun Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d2b749ee-4225-417e-b20e-a8d2193cbb84
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1564.003, T1134.002, T1059.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advancedrun.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AdvancedRun.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /EXEFilename %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /Run%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /WindowState 0%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /CommandLine %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - AdvancedRun Suspicious Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1134.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of AdvancedRun utility in the context of the TrustedInstaller, SYSTEM, Local Service or Network Service accounts
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdvancedRun Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     fa00b701-44c6-4679-994d-5a18afa8a707
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advancedrun_priv_user.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/EXEFilename%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/CommandLine%'))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 8 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 4 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 10 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 11 %')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 8' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 4' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 10' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 11'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - Chisel Tunneling Tool Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1090.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of the Chisel tunneling tool via the commandline arguments
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Chisel Tunneling Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     8b0e12da-d3c3-49db-bb4f-256703f380e5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_chisel.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some false positives may occur with other tools with similar commandlines
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\chisel.exe'
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%exe client %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%exe server %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-socks5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-reverse%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% r:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:127.0.0.1:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-tls-skip-verify %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:socks%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Some false positives may occur with other tools with similar commandlines

PUA - CleanWipe Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of CleanWipe a tool usually used to delete Symantec antivirus.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - CleanWipe Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f44800ac-38ec-471f-936e-3fa7d9c53100
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_cleanwipe.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative use (Should be investigated either way)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\SepRemovalToolNative\_x64.exe'
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\CATClean.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--uninstall%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\NetInstaller.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-r%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WFPUnins.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/uninstall%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/enterprise%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative use (Should be investigated either way)

PUA - Crassus Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, reconnaissance, T1590.001 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects Crassus, a Windows privilege escalation discovery tool, based on PE metadata characteristics.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Crassus Execution
-- Sigma ID:     2c32b543-1058-4808-91c6-5b31b8bed6c5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, reconnaissance | T1590.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_crassus.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Crassus.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Crassus.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Crassus%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

PUA - CsExec Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1587.001, T1569.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of the lesser known remote execution tool named CsExec a PsExec alternative

-- Title:        PUA - CsExec Execution

-- Unmapped:     Description

-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\csexec.exe'
  OR rawEventMsg = 'csexec'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - DefenderCheck Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1027.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of DefenderCheck, a tool to evaluate the signatures used in Microsoft Defender. It can be used to figure out the strings / byte chains used in Microsoft Defender to detect a tool and thus used for AV evasion.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - DefenderCheck Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f0ca6c24-3225-47d5-b1f5-352bf07ecfa7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_defendercheck.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\DefenderCheck.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'DefenderCheck')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

PUA - DIT Snapshot Viewer

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1003.003 Author: Furkan Caliskan (@caliskanfurkan_) Status: test
Detects the use of Ditsnap tool, an inspection tool for Active Directory database, ntds.dit.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - DIT Snapshot Viewer
-- Sigma ID:     d3b70aad-097e-409c-9df2-450f80dc476b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test

-- Author:       Furkan Caliskan (@caliskanfurkan_)
-- Date:         2020-07-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_ditsnap.yml

-- False Pos:    Legitimate admin usage
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ditsnap.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ditsnap.exe%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate admin usage

PUA - Fast Reverse Proxy (FRP) Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1090 Author: frack113, Florian Roth Status: test
Detects the use of Fast Reverse Proxy. frp is a fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the Internet.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Fast Reverse Proxy (FRP) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     32410e29-5f94-4568-b6a3-d91a8adad863
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2022-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_frp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\frpc.ini%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=7D9C233B8C9E3F0EA290D2B84593C842%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=06DDC9280E1F1810677935A2477012960905942F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=57B0936B8D336D8E981C169466A15A5FD21A7D5A2C7DAF62D5E142EE860E387C%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\frpc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\frps.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

PUA- IOX Tunneling Tool Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1090 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of IOX - a tool for port forwarding and intranet proxy purposes
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA- IOX Tunneling Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d7654f02-e04b-4934-9838-65c46f187ebc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_iox.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\iox.exe'
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe fwd -l %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe fwd -r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe proxy -l %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe proxy -r %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=9DB2D314DD3F704A02051EF5EA210993%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=039130337E28A6623ECF9A0A3DA7D92C5964D8DD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=C6CF82919B809967D9D90EA73772A8AA1C1EB3BC59252D977500F64F1A0D6731%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

PUA - Kernel Driver Utility (KDU) Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003 Author: Matt Anderson, Dray Agha, Anna Pham (Huntress) Status: experimental
Detects execution of the Kernel Driver Utility (KDU) tool. KDU can be used to bypass driver signature enforcement and load unsigned or malicious drivers into the Windows kernel. Potentially allowing for privilege escalation, persistence, or evasion of security controls.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Kernel Driver Utility (KDU) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e76ca062-4de0-4d79-8d90-160a0d335eca
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Matt Anderson, Dray Agha, Anna Pham (Huntress)
-- Date:         2026-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_kdu_driver_tool.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate driver development, testing, or administrative troubleshooting (e.g., enabling/disabling hardware)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-map %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-prv %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-dse %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ps %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\kdu.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\hamakaze.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'hamakaze.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate driver development, testing, or administrative troubleshooting (e.g., enabling/disabling hardware)

PUA - Mouse Lock Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1056.002 Author: Cian Heasley Status: test
In Kaspersky's 2020 Incident Response Analyst Report they listed legitimate tool "Mouse Lock" as being used for both credential access and collection in security incidents.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Mouse Lock Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c9192ad9-75e5-43eb-8647-82a0a5b493e3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1056.002
-- Author:       Cian Heasley
-- Date:         2020-08-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_mouselock_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate uses of Mouse Lock software
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%Mouse Lock%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] LIKE '%Misc314%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Mouse Lock\_%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate uses of Mouse Lock software

PUA - Netcat Suspicious Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1095 Author: frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of Netcat. Adversaries may use a non-application layer protocol for communication between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Netcat Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e31033fc-33f0-4020-9a16-faf9b31cbf08
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1095
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_netcat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate ncat use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -lvp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -lvnp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -l -v -p %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -lv -p %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -l --proxy-type http %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vnl --exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vnl -e %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --lua-exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --sh-exec %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\nc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ncat.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\netcat.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate ncat use

PUA - SoftPerfect Netscan Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1046 Author: @d4ns4n_ (Wuerth-Phoenix) Status: test
Detects usage of SoftPerfect's "netscan.exe". An application for scanning networks. It is actively used in-the-wild by threat actors to inspect and understand the network architecture of a victim.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - SoftPerfect Netscan Execution
-- Sigma ID:     ca387a8e-1c84-4da3-9993-028b45342d30
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046
-- Author:       @d4ns4n_ (Wuerth-Phoenix)
-- Date:         2024-04-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_netscan.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\netscan.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Network Scanner'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Application for scanning networks')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrator activity

PUA - Ngrok Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1572 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of Ngrok, a utility used for port forwarding and tunneling, often used by threat actors to make local protected services publicly available. Involved domains are bin.equinox.io for download and *.ngrok.io for connections.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Ngrok Execution
-- Sigma ID:     ee37eb7c-a4e7-4cd5-8fa4-efa27f1c3f31
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-05-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_ngrok.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Another tool that uses the command line switches of Ngrok; Ngrok http 3978 (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/bot-service/bot-service-debug-channel-ngrok?view=azure-bot-service-4.0)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 139%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 445%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 3389%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 5985%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 5986%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% start %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--all%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--config%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.yml%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%ngrok.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% http %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% authtoken %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe authtoken %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe start --all%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Another tool that uses the command line switches of Ngrok; Ngrok http 3978 (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/bot-service/bot-service-debug-channel-ngrok?view=azure-bot-service-4.0)

PUA - Nimgrab Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1105 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the usage of nimgrab, a tool bundled with the Nim programming framework and used for downloading files.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Nimgrab Execution
-- Sigma ID:     74a12f18-505c-4114-8d0b-8448dd5485c6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-08-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nimgrab.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Nim on a developer systems
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=2DD44C3C29D667F5C0EF5F9D7C7FFB8B%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=F266609E91985F0FE3E31C5E8FAEEEC4FFA5E0322D8B6F15FE69F4C5165B9559%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=C07FDDD21D123EA9B3A08EEF44AAAC45%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\nimgrab.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of Nim on a developer systems

PUA - NimScan Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1046 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of NimScan, a portscanner utility. In early 2025, adversaries were observed using this utility to scan for open ports on remote hosts in a compromised environment. This rule identifies the execution of NimScan based on the process image name and specific hash values associated with different versions of the tool.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NimScan Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4fd6b1c7-19b8-4488-97f6-00f0924991a3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nimscan.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\NimScan.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=41BB1C7571B3A724EB83A1D2B96DBB8C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=B1B6ADACB172795480179EFD18A29549%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=0D1F896DC7642AD8384F9042F30279C2%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrator activity

PUA - NirCmd Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1569.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of NirCmd tool for command execution, which could be the result of legitimate administrative activity
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NirCmd Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4e2ed651-1906-4a59-a78a-18220fca1b22
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nircmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% execmd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe script %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe shexec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% runinteractive %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\NirCmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'NirCmd.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% exec2 %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% show %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% hide %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by administrators

PUA - NirCmd Execution As LOCAL SYSTEM

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1569.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of NirCmd tool for command execution as SYSTEM user
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NirCmd Execution As LOCAL SYSTEM
-- Sigma ID:     d9047477-0359-48c9-b8c7-792cedcdc9c4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nircmd_as_system.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% runassystem %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by administrators

PUA - Nmap/Zenmap Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1046 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects usage of namp/zenmap. Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts, including those that may be vulnerable to remote software exploitation
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Nmap/Zenmap Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f6ecd1cf-19b8-4488-97f6-00f0924991a3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nmap_zenmap.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\nmap.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\zennmap.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('nmap.exe', 'zennmap.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrator activity

PUA - NPS Tunneling Tool Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1090 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of NPS, a port forwarding and intranet penetration proxy server
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NPS Tunneling Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     68d37776-61db-42f5-bf54-27e87072d17e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nps.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -server=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vkey=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -password=%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -config=npc%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=AE8ACF66BFE3A44148964048B826D005%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=CEA49E9B9B67F3A13AD0BE1C2655293EA3C18181%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=5A456283392FFCEEEACA3D3426C306EB470304637520D72FED1CC1FEBBBD6856%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\npc.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

PUA - NSudo Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1569.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detects the use of NSudo tool for command execution
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NSudo Execution
-- Sigma ID:     771d1eb5-9587-4568-95fb-9ec44153a012
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nsudo.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U:S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U:T %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U:E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-P:E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M:S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M:H %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U=S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U=T %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U=E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-P=E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M=S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M=H %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ShowWindowMode:Hide%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\NSudo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NSudoLC.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NSudoLG.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('NSudo.exe', 'NSudoLC.exe', 'NSudoLG.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by administrators

PUA - PingCastle Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: reconnaissance, T1595 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of PingCastle, a tool designed to quickly assess the Active Directory security level.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - PingCastle Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b1cb4ab6-ac31-43f4-adf1-d9d08957419c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        reconnaissance | T1595
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113
-- Date:         2024-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_pingcastle.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=f741f25ac909ee434e50812d436c73ff%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=d40acbfc29ee24388262e3d8be16f622%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=01bb2c16fadb992fa66228cd02d45c60%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=9e1b18e62e42b5444fc55b51e640355b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=74e10a9989e0ec8fe075537ac802bd3031ae7e08%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=3a515551814775df0ccbe09f219bc972eae45a10%' OR
