metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=b489d3cdd158f040322ae5c8d0139ad28eff743c738a10f2d0255c7e149bd92a%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=ca7ecf04a8ad63aff330492c15270d56760cb223a607cdb1431fb00e1b9985d1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=c00d2aee59bac087d769e09b5b7f832176f7714fefdc6af2502e6031e3eb37c2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=c143de99c57965d3a44c1fce6a97c2773b050609c1ea7f45688a4ca2422a5524%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=01d1efd5e552c59baa70c0778902233c05fde7de6e5cc156c62607df0804d36b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=9a8dfeb7e3174f3510691e2b32d0f9088e0ed67d9ed1b2afbe450d70dec2016b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=63b92a114075d855f706979d50ed3460fe39f8a2f5498b7657f0d14865117629%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=2eb014130ff837b6481c26f0d0152f84de22ca7370b15a4f51921e0054a2a358%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=7d5bb4271bf8ca2b63a59e731f3ec831dbda53adb8e28665e956afb4941f32ca%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=e57098a75bf32e127c214b61bfba492d6b209e211f065fcc84ff10637a2143ea%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=dd14dbcdbcfcf4bc108a926b9667af4944a3b6faf808cf1bb9a3a2554722e172%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=dca2b1b824cb28bd15577eace45bde7ff8f8f44705b17085524659de31761de4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=8b95f339a07d59a8c8d8580283dffb9e8dfabdeb9171e42c948ab68c71afe7f2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=5428a840fab6ac4a0ecb2fc20dbc5f928432b00b9297dd1cb6e69336f44eba66%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=e2517ae0fccaa4aefe039026a4fc855964f0c2a5f84177140200b0e58ddbfd27%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=75d05880de2593480254181215dd9a0075373876f2f4a2a4a9a654b2e0729a41%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=56490e14ce3817c3a1ddc0d97b96e90d6351bcd29914e7c9282f6a998cca84b1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=f25d0a5e77e4ed9e7c4204a33cfc8e46281b43adbee550b15701dd00f41bdbe0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=845a5fdcbb08e7efa7e0eabfcd881c9eebc0eec0a3a2f8689194e6b91b6eeaf8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=9a89e6652e563d26a3f328ba23d91f464c9549da734557c5a02559df24b2700d%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=5614f2bc9b2ed414aab2c5c7997bdcbe8236e67ced8f91a63d1b6cfbe6e08726%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=37bf92dcedb47a90d8d38ebda8d8dd168ef5803dcb01161f8cf6d68b70d49d90%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=ec8590f91f5cc21e931c57345425f0625a6e37dfba026b222260450de40459f5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=3994eb72b1c227c593e14b8cad7001de11d1c247d4fbf84d0714bb8a17853140%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=d654f870436d63c9d8e4390d9d4d898abdf0456736c7654d71cdf81a299c3f87%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=63fbfabd4d8afb497dee47d112eb9d683671b75a8bf6407c4bd5027fd211b892%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=47028053f05188e6a366fff19bedbcad2bc4daba8ff9e4df724b77d0181b7054%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=7c1b1e8c880a30c43b3a52ee245f963a977e1f40284f4b83f4b9afe3821753dd%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\PingCastle.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PingCastle.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Ping Castle'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner aclcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner computerversion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner foreignusers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner laps\_bitlocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner localadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession-trust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner oxidbindings%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner share%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb3querynetwork%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner spooler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner startup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner zerologon%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-enum-limit%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--level Full%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--server %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - PingCastle Execution From Potentially Suspicious Parent

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: reconnaissance, T1595 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of PingCastle, a tool designed to quickly assess the Active Directory security level via a script located in a potentially suspicious or uncommon location.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - PingCastle Execution From Potentially Suspicious Parent
-- Sigma ID:     b37998de-a70b-4f33-b219-ec36bf433dc0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        reconnaissance | T1595
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_pingcastle_script_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.chm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.htm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.html%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.wsf%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\PingCastle.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PingCastle.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Ping Castle'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner aclcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner computerversion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner foreignusers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner laps\_bitlocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner localadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession-trust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner oxidbindings%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner share%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb3querynetwork%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner spooler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner startup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner zerologon%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-enum-limit%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--level Full%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--server %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - Process Hacker Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, persistence, T1622, T1564, T1543 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of Process Hacker based on binary metadata information (Image, Hash, Imphash, etc). Process Hacker is a tool to view and manipulate processes, kernel options and other low level options. Threat actors abused older vulnerable versions to manipulate system processes.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Process Hacker Execution
-- Sigma ID:     811e0002-b13b-4a15-9d00-a613fce66e42
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, persistence | T1622, T1564, T1543
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_process_hacker.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    While sometimes 'Process Hacker is used by legitimate administrators, the execution of Process Hacker must be investigated and allowed on a case by case basis
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ProcessHacker\_%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\ProcessHacker.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('ProcessHacker.exe', 'Process Hacker')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Process Hacker')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Process Hacker'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=68F9B52895F4D34E74112F3129B3B00D%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=B365AF317AE730A67C936F21432B9C71%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=A0BDFAC3CE1880B32FF9B696458327CE352E3B1D%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=C5E2018BF7C0F314FED4FD7FE7E69FA2E648359E%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=D4A0FE56316A2C45B9BA9AC1005363309A3EDC7ACF9E4DF64D326A0FF273E80F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=BD2C2CF0631D881ED382817AFCCE2B093F4E412FFB170A719E2762F250ABFEA4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3695333C60DEDECDCAFF1590409AA462%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=04DE0AD9C37EB7BD52043D2ECAC958DF%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: While sometimes 'Process Hacker is used by legitimate administrators, the execution of Process Hacker must be investigated and allowed on a case by case basis

PUA - Radmin Viewer Utility Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1072 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of Radmin which can be abused by an adversary to remotely control Windows machines
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Radmin Viewer Utility Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5817e76f-4804-41e6-8f1d-5fa0b3ecae2d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1072
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_radmin.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'Radmin Viewer')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Radmin Viewer'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Radmin.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - Potential PE Metadata Tamper Using Rcedit

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1036.003, T1036, T1027.005, T1027 Author: Micah Babinski Status: test
Detects the use of rcedit to potentially alter executable PE metadata properties, which could conceal efforts to rename system utilities for defense evasion.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Potential PE Metadata Tamper Using Rcedit
-- Sigma ID:     0c92f2e6-f08f-4b73-9216-ecb0ca634689
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003, T1036, T1027.005, T1027
-- Author:       Micah Babinski
-- Date:         2022-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_rcedit_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the tool by administrators or users to update metadata of a binary
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OriginalFileName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CompanyName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FileDescription%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProductName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProductVersion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LegalCopyright%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--set-%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\rcedit-x64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rcedit-x86.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Edit resources of exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'rcedit')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of the tool by administrators or users to update metadata of a binary

PUA - Rclone Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: exfiltration, T1567.002 Author: Bhabesh Raj, Sittikorn S, Aaron Greetham (@beardofbinary) - NCC Group Status: test
Detects execution of RClone utility for exfiltration as used by various ransomwares strains like REvil, Conti, FiveHands, etc
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Rclone Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e37db05d-d1f9-49c8-b464-cee1a4b11638
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1567.002
-- Author:       Bhabesh Raj, Sittikorn S, Aaron Greetham (@beardofbinary) - NCC Group
-- Date:         2021-05-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_rclone_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--config %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-check-certificate %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% copy %')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%user%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sync%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pcloud%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ignore-existing%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%auto-confirm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%multi-thread-streams%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%no-check-certificate %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rclone.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Rsync for cloud storage'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - Restic Backup Tool Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: exfiltration, T1048, T1567.002 Author: Nounou Mbeiri, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects the execution of the Restic backup tool, which can be used for data exfiltration. Threat actors may leverage Restic to back up and exfiltrate sensitive data to remote storage locations, including cloud services. If not legitimately used in the enterprise environment, its presence may indicate malicious activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Restic Backup Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     6ddff2e8-ea1a-45d0-8938-93dfc1d67ae7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1048, T1567.002
-- Author:       Nounou Mbeiri, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_restic.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Restic for backup purposes within the organization.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sftp:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rest:http%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%s3:s3.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%s3.http%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%azure:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% gs:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rclone:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%swift:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% b2:%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% init %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -r %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--password-file%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%init%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -r %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--use-fs-snapshot%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%backup%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -r %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of Restic for backup purposes within the organization.

PUA - RunXCmd Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1569.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of the RunXCmd tool to execute commands with System or TrustedInstaller accounts
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - RunXCmd Execution
-- Sigma ID:     93199800-b52a-4dec-b762-75212c196542
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_runxcmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /account=system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /account=ti %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/exec=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by administrators

PUA - Seatbelt Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1526, T1087, T1083 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of the PUA/Recon tool Seatbelt via PE information of command line parameters
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Seatbelt Execution
-- Sigma ID:     38646daa-e78f-4ace-9de0-55547b2d30da
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1526, T1087, T1083
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_seatbelt.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Seatbelt.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Seatbelt.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Seatbelt')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% DpapiMasterKeys%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% InterestingProcesses%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% InterestingFiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CertificateThumbprints%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ChromiumBookmarks%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ChromiumHistory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ChromiumPresence%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CloudCredentials%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CredEnum%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CredGuard%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% FirefoxHistory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ProcessCreationEvents%')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=misc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=chromium%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=slack%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=system%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=user%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=all%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -outputfile=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

PUA - System Informer Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, discovery, T1082, T1564, T1543 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of System Informer, a task manager tool to view and manipulate processes, kernel options and other low level operations
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - System Informer Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5722dff1-4bdd-4949-86ab-fbaf707e767a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, discovery | T1082, T1564, T1543
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_system_informer.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    System Informer is regularly used legitimately by system administrators or developers. Apply additional filters accordingly
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SystemInformer.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SystemInformer.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'System Informer')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'System Informer'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=19426363A37C03C3ED6FEDF57B6696EC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=8B12C6DA8FAC0D5E8AB999C31E5EA04AF32D53DC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=8EE9D84DE50803545937A63C686822388A3338497CDDB660D5D69CF68B68F287%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=B68908ADAEB5D662F87F2528AF318F12%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: System Informer is regularly used legitimately by system administrators or developers. Apply additional filters accordingly

PUA - TruffleHog Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1083, T1552.001 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects execution of TruffleHog, a tool used to search for secrets in different platforms like Git, Jira, Slack, SharePoint, etc. that could be used maliciously. While it is a legitimate tool, intended for use in CI pipelines and security assessments, It was observed in the Shai-Hulud malware campaign targeting npm packages to steal sensitive information.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - TruffleHog Execution
-- Sigma ID:     44030449-b0df-4c94-aae1-502359ab28ee
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1083, T1552.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-09-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_trufflehog.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of TruffleHog by security teams or developers.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\trufflehog.exe'
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% docker --image %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Git %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% GitHub %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Jira %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Slack %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Confluence %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% SharePoint %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% s3 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% gcs %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --results=verified%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of TruffleHog by security teams or developers.

PUA - WebBrowserPassView Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1555.003 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of WebBrowserPassView.exe. A password recovery tool that reveals the passwords stored by the following Web browsers, Internet Explorer (Version 4.0 - 11.0), Mozilla Firefox (All Versions), Google Chrome, Safari, and Opera
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - WebBrowserPassView Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d0dae994-26c6-4d2d-83b5-b3c8b79ae513
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555.003
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_webbrowserpassview.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'Web Browser Password Viewer')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WebBrowserPassView.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

PUA - Wsudo Suspicious Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of wsudo (Windows Sudo Utility). Which is a tool that let the user execute programs with different permissions (System, Trusted Installer, Administrator...etc)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Wsudo Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     bdeeabc9-ff2a-4a51-be59-bb253aac7891
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_wsudo_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u System%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-uSystem%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u TrustedInstaller%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-uTrustedInstaller%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --ti %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\wsudo.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wsudo.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Windows sudo utility')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wsudo-bridge.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

PUA - Adidnsdump Execution

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: discovery, T1018 Author: frack113 Status: test
This tool enables enumeration and exporting of all DNS records in the zone for recon purposes of internal networks Python 3 and python.exe must be installed, Usee to Query/modify DNS records for Active Directory integrated DNS via LDAP
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Adidnsdump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     26d3f0a2-f514-4a3f-a8a7-e7e48a8d9160
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1018
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_adidnsdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\python.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%adidnsdump%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Python Inline Command Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of python using the "-c" flag. This is could be used as a way to launch a reverse shell or execute live python code.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Python Inline Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     899133d5-4d7c-4a7f-94ee-27355c879d90
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_inline_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Python libraries that use a flag starting with "-c". Filter according to your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Python libraries that use a flag starting with "-c". Filter according to your environment

Python Spawning Pretty TTY on Windows

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nextron Systems Status: test
Detects python spawning a pretty tty
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Python Spawning Pretty TTY on Windows
-- Sigma ID:     480e7e51-e797-47e3-8d72-ebfce65b6d8d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nextron Systems
-- Date:         2022-06-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_pty_spawn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%python.exe' OR procName LIKE '%python3.exe' OR procName LIKE '%python2.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potentially Suspicious Usage Of Qemu

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1090, T1572 Author: Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf), Hunter Juhan (@threatHNTR) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious execution of the Qemu utility in a Windows environment. Threat actors have leveraged this utility and this technique for achieving network access as reported by Kaspersky.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Usage Of Qemu
-- Sigma ID:     5fc297ae-25b6-488a-8f25-cc12ac29b744
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090, T1572
-- Author:       Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf), Hunter Juhan (@threatHNTR)
-- Date:         2024-06-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_qemu_suspicious_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 1M%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 2M%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 3M%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%restrict=off%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-netdev %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%connect=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-nographic%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Query Usage To Exfil Data

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of "query.exe" a system binary to exfil information such as "sessions" and "processes" for later use
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Query Usage To Exfil Data
-- Sigma ID:     53ef0cef-fa24-4f25-a34a-6c72dfa2e6e2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_query_session_exfil.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\query.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%session >%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%process >%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

QuickAssist Execution

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: T1219.002 Author: Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf) Status: experimental
Detects the execution of Microsoft Quick Assist tool "QuickAssist.exe". This utility can be used by attackers to gain remote access.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        QuickAssist Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e20b5b14-ce93-4230-88af-981983ef6e74
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf)
-- Date:         2024-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_quickassist_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Quick Assist in the environment.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\QuickAssist.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of Quick Assist in the environment.

Files Added To An Archive Using Rar.EXE

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: collection, T1560.001 Author: Timur Zinniatullin, E.M. Anhaus, oscd.community Status: test
Detects usage of "rar" to add files to an archive for potential compression. An adversary may compress data (e.g. sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Files Added To An Archive Using Rar.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     6f3e2987-db24-4c78-a860-b4f4095a7095
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1560.001
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, E.M. Anhaus, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_compress_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Highly likely if rar is a default archiver in the monitored environment.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rar.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% a %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Highly likely if rar is a default archiver in the monitored environment.

Rar Usage with Password and Compression Level

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: collection, T1560.001 Author: @ROxPinTeddy Status: test
Detects the use of rar.exe, on the command line, to create an archive with password protection or with a specific compression level. This is pretty indicative of malicious actions.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rar Usage with Password and Compression Level
-- Sigma ID:     faa48cae-6b25-4f00-a094-08947fef582f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1560.001
-- Author:       @ROxPinTeddy
-- Date:         2020-05-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_compression_with_password.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Winrar command line version; Other command line tools, that use these flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -hp%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% a %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of Winrar command line version; Other command line tools, that use these flags

Suspicious Greedy Compression Using Rar.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects RAR usage that creates an archive from a suspicious folder, either a system folder or one of the folders often used by attackers for staging purposes
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Greedy Compression Using Rar.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     afe52666-401e-4a02-b4ff-5d128990b8cb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_susp_greedy_compression.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious RASdial Activity

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: juju4 Status: test
Detects suspicious process related to rasdial.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious RASdial Activity
-- Sigma ID:     6bba49bf-7f8c-47d6-a1bb-6b4dece4640e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       juju4
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rasdial_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%rasdial.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment

RDP Enable or Disable via Win32_TerminalServiceSetting WMI Class

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1021.001, T1047 Author: Daniel Koifman (KoifSec), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects enabling or disabling of Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) using alternate methods such as WMIC or PowerShell. In PowerShell one-liner commands, the "SetAllowTSConnections" method of the "Win32_TerminalServiceSetting" class may be used to enable or disable RDP. In WMIC, the "rdtoggle" alias or "Win32_TerminalServiceSetting" class may be used for the same purpose.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        RDP Enable or Disable via Win32_TerminalServiceSetting WMI Class
-- Sigma ID:     4b8f6d3a-9c5e-4f2a-a7d8-6b9c3e5f2a8d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1021.001, T1047
-- Author:       Daniel Koifman (KoifSec), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rdp_enable_or_disable_via_win32_terminalservicesetting_wmi_class.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate system administrators enabling RDP for remote support; System configuration scripts during deployment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rdtoggle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_TerminalServiceSetting%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SetAllowTSConnections%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('wmic.exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate system administrators enabling RDP for remote support; System configuration scripts during deployment

Process Memory Dump via RdrLeakDiag.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1003.001 Author: Cedric MAURUGEON, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of the Microsoft Windows Resource Leak Diagnostic tool "rdrleakdiag.exe" to dump process memory
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Memory Dump via RdrLeakDiag.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     edadb1e5-5919-4e4c-8462-a9e643b02c4b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Cedric MAURUGEON, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-09-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rdrleakdiag_process_dumping.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '%/memdmp%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '%fullmemdmp%')
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% /o %' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% /p %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rdrleakdiag.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RdrLeakDiag.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Windows Recovery Environment Disabled Via Reagentc

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: impact, T1490 Author: Daniel Koifman (KoifSec), Michael Vilshin Status: experimental
Detects attempts to disable windows recovery environment using Reagentc. ReAgentc.exe is a command-line tool in Windows used to manage the Windows Recovery Environment (WinRE). It allows users to enable, disable, and configure WinRE, which is used for troubleshooting and repairing common boot issues.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Recovery Environment Disabled Via Reagentc
-- Sigma ID:     db1c21e4-cd66-4b4e-85ca-590f0780529c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        impact | T1490
-- Author:       Daniel Koifman (KoifSec), Michael Vilshin
-- Date:         2025-07-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reagentc_disable_windows_recovery_environment.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%/disable%'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reagentc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reagentc.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative activity

Potential Persistence Attempt Via Run Keys Using Reg.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1547.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious command line reg.exe tool adding key to RUN key in Registry
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Persistence Attempt Via Run Keys Using Reg.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     de587dce-915e-4218-aac4-835ca6af6f70
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1547.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-06-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_add_run_key.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate software automatically (mostly, during installation) sets up autorun keys for legitimate reasons.; Legitimate administrator sets up autorun keys for legitimate reasons.; Discord
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% add %')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Software\\WOW6432Node\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Policies\\Explorer\\Run%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate software automatically (mostly, during installation) sets up autorun keys for legitimate reasons.; Legitimate administrator sets up autorun keys for legitimate reasons.; Discord

Add SafeBoot Keys Via Reg Utility

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "reg.exe" commands with the "add" or "copy" flags on safe boot registry keys. Often used by attacker to allow the ransomware to work in safe mode as some security products do not
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Add SafeBoot Keys Via Reg Utility
-- Sigma ID:     d7662ff6-9e97-4596-a61d-9839e32dee8d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_add_safeboot.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% copy %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% add %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reg.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\SafeBoot%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Reg Add BitLocker

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1486 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects suspicious addition to BitLocker related registry keys via the reg.exe utility
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Reg Add BitLocker
-- Sigma ID:     0e0255bf-2548-47b8-9582-c0955c9283f5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1486
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_bitlocker.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%REG%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ADD%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SOFTWARE\\Policies\\Microsoft\\FVE%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/v%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/f%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnableBDEWithNoTPM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UseAdvancedStartup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UseTPM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UseTPMKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UseTPMKeyPIN%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RecoveryKeyMessageSource%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UseTPMPIN%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RecoveryKeyMessage%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Dropping Of Password Filter DLL

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1556.002 Author: Sreeman Status: test
Detects dropping of dll files in system32 that may be used to retrieve user credentials from LSASS
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Dropping Of Password Filter DLL
-- Sigma ID:     b7966f4a-b333-455b-8370-8ca53c229762
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1556.002
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-10-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_credential_access_via_password_filter.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKLM\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Lsa%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%scecli\\0*%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg add%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Windows Defender Folder Exclusion Added Via Reg.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the usage of "reg.exe" to add Defender folder exclusions. Qbot has been seen using this technique to add exclusions for folders within AppData and ProgramData.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Windows Defender Folder Exclusion Added Via Reg.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     48917adc-a28e-4f5d-b729-11e75da8941f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-02-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_defender_exclusion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Exclusions\\Paths%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft Antimalware\\Exclusions\\Paths%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ADD %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/t %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%REG\_DWORD %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/v %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/d %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

RunMRU Registry Key Deletion

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1070.003 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects deletion of the RunMRU registry key, which stores the history of commands executed via the Run dialog. In the clickfix techniques, the phishing lures instruct users to open a run dialog through (Win + R) and execute malicious commands. Adversaries may delete this key to cover their tracks after executing commands.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        RunMRU Registry Key Deletion
-- Sigma ID:     c11aecef-9c37-45a6-9c07-bc0782f963fd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1070.003
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-09-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_delete_runmru.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% del%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Explorer\\RunMRU%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reg.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

SafeBoot Registry Key Deleted Via Reg.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton Status: test
Detects execution of "reg.exe" commands with the "delete" flag on safe boot registry keys. Often used by attacker to prevent safeboot execution of security products
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SafeBoot Registry Key Deleted Via Reg.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     fc0e89b5-adb0-43c1-b749-c12a10ec37de
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2022-08-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_delete_safeboot.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% delete %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\SafeBoot%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%reg.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reg.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Service Registry Key Deleted Via Reg.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "reg.exe" commands with the "delete" flag on services registry key. Often used by attacker to remove AV software services
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Service Registry Key Deleted Via Reg.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     05b2aa93-1210-42c8-8d9a-2fcc13b284f5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_delete_services.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% delete %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%reg.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reg.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\services\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potentially Suspicious Desktop Background Change Using Reg.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, impact, T1112, T1491.001 Author: Stephen Lincoln @slincoln-aiq (AttackIQ) Status: test
Detects the execution of "reg.exe" to alter registry keys that would replace the user's desktop background. This is a common technique used by malware to change the desktop background to a ransom note or other image.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Desktop Background Change Using Reg.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     8cbc9475-8d05-4e27-9c32-df960716c701
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, impact | T1112, T1491.001
-- Author:       Stephen Lincoln @slincoln-aiq (AttackIQ)
-- Date:         2023-12-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_reg_desktop_background_change.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts that change the desktop background to a company logo or other image.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Control Panel\\Desktop%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CurrentVersion\\Policies\\ActiveDesktop%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CurrentVersion\\Policies\\System%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative scripts that change the desktop background to a company logo or other image.

Direct Autorun Keys Modification

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1547.001 Author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects direct modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry using reg.exe.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
