Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1219.002 Author: frack113 Status: test
An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks. These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment. Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Execution
-- Sigma ID:     57bff678-25d1-4d6c-8211-8ca106d12053
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-02-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the tool
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'ScreenConnect Service')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'ScreenConnect'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'ScreenConnect Software'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the tool

Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1133 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects ScreenConnect program starts that establish a remote access to a system.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution
-- Sigma ID:     75bfe6e6-cd8e-429e-91d3-03921e1d7962
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1133
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-02-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_installation_cli_param.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrative staff
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%e=Access&%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%y=Guest&%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&p=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&c=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&k=%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use by administrative staff

Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Remote Command Execution

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: execution, T1059.003 Author: Ali Alwashali Status: test
Detects the execution of a system command via the ScreenConnect RMM service.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Remote Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b1f73849-6329-4069-bc8f-78a604bb8b23
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003
-- Author:       Ali Alwashali
-- Date:         2023-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_remote_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of ScreenConnect. Disable this rule if ScreenConnect is heavily used.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TEMP\\ScreenConnect\\%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of ScreenConnect. Disable this rule if ScreenConnect is heavily used.

Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Potential Suspicious Remote Command Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1219.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious child processes launched via the ScreenConnect client service.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Potential Suspicious Remote Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7b582f1a-b318-4c6a-bf4e-66fe49bf55a5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale
-- Date:         2022-02-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_remote_execution_susp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    If the script being executed make use of any of the utilities mentioned in the detection then they should filtered out or allowed.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\TEMP\\ScreenConnect\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%run.cmd%')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\nltest.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wevtutil.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: If the script being executed make use of any of the utilities mentioned in the detection then they should filtered out or allowed.

Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Server Web Shell Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1190 Author: Jason Rathbun (Blackpoint Cyber) Status: test
Detects potential web shell execution from the ScreenConnect server process.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Server Web Shell Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b19146a3-25d4-41b4-928b-1e2a92641b1b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1190
-- Author:       Jason Rathbun (Blackpoint Cyber)
-- Date:         2024-02-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_webshell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ScreenConnect.Service.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Remote Access Tool - Simple Help Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1219.002 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks. These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment. Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Simple Help Execution
-- Sigma ID:     95e60a2b-4705-444b-b7da-ba0ea81a3ee2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_simple_help.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the tool
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\JWrapper-Remote Access\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\JWrapper-Remote Support\\%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\SimpleService.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the tool

Remote Access Tool - TacticalRMM Agent Registration to Potentially Attacker-Controlled Server

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1219, T1105 Author: Ahmed Nosir (@egycondor) Status: experimental
Detects TacticalRMM agent installations where the --api, --auth, and related flags are used on the command line. These parameters configure the agent to connect to a specific RMM server with authentication, client ID, and site ID. This technique could indicate a threat actor attempting to register the agent with an attacker-controlled RMM infrastructure silently.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - TacticalRMM Agent Registration to Potentially Attacker-Controlled Server
-- Sigma ID:     2db93a3f-3249-4f73-9e68-0e77a0f8ae7e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1219, T1105
-- Author:       Ahmed Nosir (@egycondor)
-- Date:         2025-05-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_tacticalrmm_agent_registration_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate system administrator deploying TacticalRMM
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\TacticalAgent\\tacticalrmm.exe%'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--api%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--auth%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--client-id%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--site-id%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--agent-type%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate system administrator deploying TacticalRMM

Remote Access Tool - Team Viewer Session Started On Windows Host

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: persistence, T1133 Author: Josh Nickels, Qi Nan Status: test
Detects the command line executed when TeamViewer starts a session started by a remote host. Once a connection has been started, an investigator can verify the connection details by viewing the "incoming_connections.txt" log file in the TeamViewer folder.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Team Viewer Session Started On Windows Host
-- Sigma ID:     ab70c354-d9ac-4e11-bbb6-ec8e3b153357
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1133
-- Author:       Josh Nickels, Qi Nan
-- Date:         2024-03-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_teamviewer_incoming_connection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of TeamViewer
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName = 'TeamViewer_Desktop.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'TeamViewer_Service.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TeamViewer\_Desktop.exe --IPCport 5939 --Module 1'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of TeamViewer

Remote Access Tool - UltraViewer Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1219.002 Author: frack113 Status: test
An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks. These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment. Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - UltraViewer Execution
-- Sigma ID:     88656cec-6c3b-487c-82c0-f73ebb805503
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-09-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_ultraviewer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'UltraViewer'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'DucFabulous Co,ltd'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'UltraViewer_Desktop.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

Discovery of a System Time

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: discovery, T1124 Author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community Status: test
Identifies use of various commands to query a systems time. This technique may be used before executing a scheduled task or to discover the time zone of a target system.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Discovery of a System Time
-- Sigma ID:     b243b280-65fe-48df-ba07-6ddea7646427
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1124
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_time_discovery.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the system utilities to discover system time for legitimate reason
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%time%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\w32tm.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tz%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of the system utilities to discover system time for legitimate reason

Renamed AdFind Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of a renamed Adfind.exe. AdFind continues to be seen across majority of breaches. It is used to domain trust discovery to plan out subsequent steps in the attack chain.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed AdFind Execution
-- Sigma ID:     df55196f-f105-44d3-a675-e9dfb6cc2f2b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_adfind.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\AdFind.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed AutoHotkey.EXE Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detects execution of a renamed autohotkey.exe binary based on PE metadata fields
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed AutoHotkey.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0f16d9cf-0616-45c8-8fad-becc11b5a41c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2023-02-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_autohotkey.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%AutoHotkey%'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%AutoHotkey%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('AutoHotkey.exe', 'AutoHotkey.rc')))
  AND NOT (((procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey32\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey64\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyA32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyA32\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU32\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU64\_UIA.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed AutoIt Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1027 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed AutoIt2.exe or AutoIt3.exe. AutoIt is a scripting language and automation tool for Windows systems. While primarily used for legitimate automation tasks, it can be misused in cyber attacks. Attackers can leverage AutoIt to create and distribute malware, including keyloggers, spyware, and botnets. A renamed AutoIt executable is particularly suspicious.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed AutoIt Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f4264e47-f522-4c38-a420-04525d5b880f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_autoit.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Defense Evasion Via Binary Rename

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1036.003 Author: Matthew Green @mgreen27, Ecco, James Pemberton @4A616D6573, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed binary often used by attackers or malware leveraging new Sysmon OriginalFileName datapoint.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Via Binary Rename
-- Sigma ID:     36480ae1-a1cb-4eaa-a0d6-29801d7e9142
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Matthew Green @mgreen27, Ecco, James Pemberton @4A616D6573, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)
-- Date:         2019-06-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_binary.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'CONHOST.EXE', '7z.exe', '7za.exe', 'WinRAR.exe', 'wevtutil.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'netsh.exe', 'InstallUtil.exe'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7z.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7za.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\WinRAR.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wevtutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\netsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\InstallUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist

Potential Defense Evasion Via Rename Of Highly Relevant Binaries

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.003 Author: Matthew Green - @mgreen27, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed binary often used by attackers or malware leveraging new Sysmon OriginalFileName datapoint.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Via Rename Of Highly Relevant Binaries
-- Sigma ID:     0ba1da6d-b6ce-4366-828c-18826c9de23e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Matthew Green - @mgreen27, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), frack113
-- Date:         2019-06-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_binary_highly_relevant.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist; PsExec installed via Windows Store doesn't contain original filename field (False negative)
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg = 'Execute processes remotely')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Sysinternals PsExec'))
  OR ((rawEventMsg LIKE 'Windows PowerShell%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE 'pwsh%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('certutil.exe', 'cmstp.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'IE4UINIT.EXE', 'finger.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'msiexec.exe', 'msxsl.exe', 'powershell_ise.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'psexec.c', 'psexec.exe', 'psexesvc.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe', 'WerMgr', 'wmic.exe', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmstp.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ie4uinit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\finger.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msxsl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\psexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\psexec64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PSEXESVC.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wermgr.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist; PsExec installed via Windows Store doesn't contain original filename field (False negative)

Renamed BOINC Client Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1553 Author: Matt Anderson (Huntress) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed BOINC binary.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed BOINC Client Execution
-- Sigma ID:     30d07da2-83ab-45d8-ae75-ec7c0edcaffc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2024-07-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_boinc.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'BOINC.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1090.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed "cloudflared" binary.

-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Cloudflared.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e0c69ebd-b54f-4aed-8ae3-e3467843f3f0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

Renamed CreateDump Utility Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036, T1003.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects uses of a renamed legitimate createdump.exe LOLOBIN utility to dump process memory
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed CreateDump Utility Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1a1ed54a-2ba4-4221-94d5-01dee560d71e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_createdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Command lines that use the same flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\createdump.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Command lines that use the same flags

Renamed CURL.EXE Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059, T1202 Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed "CURL.exe" binary based on the PE metadata fields
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed CURL.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7530cd3d-7671-43e3-b209-976966f6ea48
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1202
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_curl.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'The curl executable')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed ZOHO Dctask64 Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036, T1055.001, T1202, T1218 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a renamed "dctask64.exe" execution, a signed binary by ZOHO Corporation part of ManageEngine Endpoint Central. This binary can be abused for DLL injection, arbitrary command and process execution.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed ZOHO Dctask64 Execution
-- Sigma ID:     340a090b-c4e9-412e-bb36-b4b16fe96f9b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1055.001, T1202, T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-01-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_dctask64.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6834B1B94E49701D77CCB3C0895E1AFD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1BB6F93B129F398C7C4A76BB97450BBA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=FAA2AC19875FADE461C8D89DCF2710A3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=F1039CED4B91572AB7847D26032E6BBF%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed Jusched.EXE Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1036.003 Author: Markus Neis, Swisscom Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed "jusched.exe" as seen used by the cobalt group
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Jusched.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     edd8a48c-1b9f-4ba1-83aa-490338cd1ccb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1036.003
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Swisscom
-- Date:         2019-06-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_jusched.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg IN ('Java Update Scheduler', 'Java(TM) Update Scheduler')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\jusched.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed Mavinject.EXE Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1055.001, T1218.013 Author: frack113, Florian Roth Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed version of the "Mavinject" process. Which can be abused to perform process injection using the "/INJECTRUNNING" flag
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Mavinject.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e6474a1b-5390-49cd-ab41-8d88655f7394
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001, T1218.013
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_mavinject.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('mavinject32.exe', 'mavinject64.exe'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\mavinject32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mavinject64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'megasync.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\megasync.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;

Renamed NetSupport RAT Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed "client32.exe" (NetSupport RAT) via Imphash, Product and OriginalFileName strings
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed NetSupport RAT Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0afbd410-de03-4078-8491-f132303cb67d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_netsupport_rat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%NetSupport Remote Control%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%client32.exe%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=A9D50692E95B79723F3E76FCF70D023E%'))
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\client32.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Office Binary Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0b0cd537-fc77-4e6e-a973-e53495c1083d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_office_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Excel.exe', 'MSACCESS.EXE', 'MSPUB.EXE', 'OneNote.exe', 'OneNoteM.exe', 'OUTLOOK.EXE', 'POWERPNT.EXE', 'WinWord.exe', 'Olk.exe')))
  OR (rawEventMsg IN ('Microsoft Access', 'Microsoft Excel', 'Microsoft OneNote', 'Microsoft Outlook', 'Microsoft PowerPoint', 'Microsoft Publisher', 'Microsoft Word', 'Sent to OneNote Tool'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed PAExec Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1202 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jason Lynch Status: test
Detects execution of renamed version of PAExec. Often used by attackers
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed PAExec Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c4e49831-1496-40cf-8ce1-b53f942b02f9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jason Lynch
-- Date:         2021-05-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_paexec.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Weird admins that rename their tools; Software companies that bundle PAExec with their software and rename it, so that it is less embarrassing; When executed with the "-s" flag. PAExec will copy itself to the "C:\Windows\" directory with a different name. Usually like this "PAExec-[XXXXX]-[ComputerName]"
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'PAExec Application')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PAExec.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%PAExec%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=11D40A7B7876288F919AB819CC2D9802%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6444f8a34e99b8f7d9647de66aabe516%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=dfd6aa3f7b2b1035b76b718f1ddc689f%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1a6cca4d5460b1710a12dea39e4a592c%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Weird admins that rename their tools; Software companies that bundle PAExec with their software and rename it, so that it is less embarrassing; When executed with the "-s" flag. PAExec will copy itself to the "C:\Windows\" directory with a different name. Usually like this "PAExec-[XXXXX]-[ComputerName]"

Renamed PingCastle Binary Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059, T1202 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed "PingCastle" binary based on the PE metadata fields.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed PingCastle Binary Execution
-- Sigma ID:     2433a154-bb3d-42e4-86c3-a26bdac91c45
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_pingcastle.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PingCastleReporting.exe', 'PingCastleCloud.exe', 'PingCastle.exe')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner aclcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner computerversion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner foreignusers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner laps\_bitlocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner localadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession-trust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner oxidbindings%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner share%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb3querynetwork%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner spooler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner startup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner zerologon%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-enum-limit%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--level Full%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--server %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed Plink Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed version of the Plink binary
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Plink Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1c12727d-02bf-45ff-a9f3-d49806a3cf43
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_plink.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Plink'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -l forward%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -P %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -R %'))
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\plink.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Visual Studio NodejsTools PressAnyKey Renamed Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects renamed execution of "Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe", which can be abused as a LOLBIN to execute arbitrary binaries
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Visual Studio NodejsTools PressAnyKey Renamed Execution
-- Sigma ID:     65c3ca2c-525f-4ced-968e-246a713d164f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_pressanykey.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Renamed Rundll32 Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects when 'DllRegisterServer' is called in the commandline and the image is not rundll32. This could mean that the 'rundll32' utility has been renamed in order to avoid detection
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Renamed Rundll32 Execution
-- Sigma ID:     2569ed8c-1147-498a-9b8c-2ad3656b10ed
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_rundll32_dllregisterserver.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DllRegisterServer%')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Renamed Remote Utilities RAT (RURAT) Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, discovery Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of renamed Remote Utilities (RURAT) via Product PE header field
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Remote Utilities RAT (RURAT) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9ef27c24-4903-4192-881a-3adde7ff92a5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, discovery
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_rurat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Remote Utilities')
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\rutserv.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rfusclient.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Renamed Schtasks Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1036.003, T1053.005 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects the execution of renamed schtasks.exe binary, which is a legitimate Windows utility used for scheduling tasks. One of the very common persistence techniques is schedule malicious tasks using schtasks.exe. Since, it is heavily abused, it is also heavily monitored by security products. To evade detection, threat actors may rename the schtasks.exe binary to schedule their malicious tasks.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Schtasks Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f91e51c9-f344-4b32-969b-0b6f6b8537d4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1036.003, T1053.005
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_schtasks_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%schtasks%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Renamed SysInternals DebugView Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1588.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious renamed SysInternals DebugView execution
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed SysInternals DebugView Execution
-- Sigma ID:     cd764533-2e07-40d6-a718-cfeec7f2da7f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1588.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-05-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_sysinternals_debugview.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Sysinternals DebugView')
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Dbgview.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\Dbgview.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;

Renamed ProcDump Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.003 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a renamed ProcDump executable. This often done by attackers or malware in order to evade defensive mechanisms.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed ProcDump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4a0b2c7e-7cb2-495d-8b63-5f268e7bfd67
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-11-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_sysinternals_procdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Procdump illegally bundled with legitimate software.; Administrators who rename binaries (should be investigated).
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'procdump')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Procdump illegally bundled with legitimate software.; Administrators who rename binaries (should be investigated).

Renamed PsExec Service Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious launch of a renamed version of the PSEXESVC service with, which is not often used by legitimate administrators
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed PsExec Service Execution
-- Sigma ID:     51ae86a2-e2e1-4097-ad85-c46cb6851de4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_sysinternals_psexec_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative tasks
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'psexesvc.exe')
  AND NOT (procName = 'C:\Windows\PSEXESVC.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative tasks

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'sdelete.exe')
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\sdelete.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sdelete64.exe')))
