Capture Credentials with Rpcping.exe

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1003 Author: Julia Fomina, oscd.community Status: test
Detects using Rpcping.exe to send a RPC test connection to the target server (-s) and force the NTLM hash to be sent in the process.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Capture Credentials with Rpcping.exe
-- Sigma ID:     93671f99-04eb-4ab4-a161-70d446a84003
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rpcping_credential_capture.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Ruby Inline Command Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of ruby using the "-e" flag. This is could be used as a way to launch a reverse shell or execute live ruby code.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Ruby Inline Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     20a5ffa1-3848-4584-b6f8-c7c7fd9f69c8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ruby_inline_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -e%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ruby.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ruby.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Rundll32 Execution With DLL Stored In ADS

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: Harjot Singh, '@cyb3rjy0t' Status: test
Detects execution of rundll32 where the DLL being called is stored in an Alternate Data Stream (ADS).
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Rundll32 Execution With DLL Stored In ADS
-- Sigma ID:     9248c7e1-2bf3-4661-a22c-600a8040b446
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       Harjot Singh, '@cyb3rjy0t'
-- Date:         2023-01-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_ads_stored_dll_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '[Rr][Uu][Nn][Dd][Ll][Ll]32(\.[Ee][Xx][Ee])? \S+?\w:\S+?:'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Advpack Call Via Rundll32.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "rundll32" calling "advpack.dll" with potential obfuscated ordinal calls in order to leverage the "RegisterOCX" function
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Advpack Call Via Rundll32.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     a1473adb-5338-4a20-b4c3-126763e2d3d3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_advpack_obfuscated_ordinal_call.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%advpack%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#+%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%12%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#-%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Rundll32 Invoking Inline VBScript

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1055 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious process related to rundll32 based on command line that invokes inline VBScript as seen being used by UNC2452
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Rundll32 Invoking Inline VBScript
-- Sigma ID:     1cc50f3f-1fc8-4acf-b2e9-6f172e1fdebd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_inline_vbs.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Execute%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RegRead%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%window.close%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Rundll32 InstallScreenSaver Execution

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218.011 Author: Christopher Peacock @securepeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io, TactiKoolSec Status: test
An attacker may execute an application as a SCR File using rundll32.exe desk.cpl,InstallScreenSaver
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 InstallScreenSaver Execution
-- Sigma ID:     15bd98ea-55f4-4d37-b09a-e7caa0fa2221
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock @securepeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io, TactiKoolSec
-- Date:         2022-04-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_installscreensaver.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate installation of a new screensaver
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%InstallScreenSaver%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate installation of a new screensaver

Suspicious Key Manager Access

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1555.004 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the invocation of the Stored User Names and Passwords dialogue (Key Manager)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Key Manager Access
-- Sigma ID:     a4694263-59a8-4608-a3a0-6f8d3a51664c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_keymgr.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%keymgr%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KRShowKeyMgr%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity

Mshtml.DLL RunHTMLApplication Suspicious Usage

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels, frack113, Zaw Min Htun (ZETA) Status: test
Detects execution of commands that leverage the "mshtml.dll" RunHTMLApplication export to run arbitrary code via different protocol handlers (vbscript, javascript, file, http...)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Mshtml.DLL RunHTMLApplication Suspicious Usage
-- Sigma ID:     4782eb5a-a513-4523-a0ac-f3082b26ac5c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems),  Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels, frack113, Zaw Min Htun (ZETA)
-- Date:         2022-08-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_mshtml_runhtmlapplication.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\..\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshtml%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#135%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RunHTMLApplication%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Rundll32 Execution Without CommandLine Parameters

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1202 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious start of rundll32.exe without any parameters as found in CobaltStrike beacon activity
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 Execution Without CommandLine Parameters
-- Sigma ID:     1775e15e-b61b-4d14-a1a3-80981298085a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-05-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_no_params.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible but rare
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rundll32'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Edge\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Possible but rare

Suspicious NTLM Authentication on the Printer Spooler Service

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1212 Author: Elastic (idea), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a privilege elevation attempt by coercing NTLM authentication on the Printer Spooler service
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious NTLM Authentication on the Printer Spooler Service
-- Sigma ID:     bb76d96b-821c-47cf-944b-7ce377864492
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1212
-- Author:       Elastic (idea), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_ntlmrelay.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\windows\\system32\\davclnt.dll,DavSetCookie%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spoolss%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%srvsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/print/pipe/%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Obfuscated Ordinal Call Via Rundll32

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1027.010 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of "rundll32" with potential obfuscated ordinal calls
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Obfuscated Ordinal Call Via Rundll32
-- Sigma ID:     43fa5350-db63-4b8f-9a01-789a427074e1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.010
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_obfuscated_ordinal_call.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#+%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#-%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#655%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#656%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Rundll32 Spawned Via Explorer.EXE

Detects execution of "rundll32.exe" with a parent process of Explorer.exe. This has been observed by variants of Raspberry Robin, as first reported by Red Canary.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 Spawned Via Explorer.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1723e720-616d-4ddc-ab02-f7e3685a4713
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test

-- Author:       CD_ROM_

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;

Process Memory Dump Via Comsvcs.DLL

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036, T1003.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Modexp, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a process memory dump via "comsvcs.dll" using rundll32, covering multiple different techniques (ordinal, minidump function, etc.)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Memory Dump Via Comsvcs.DLL
-- Sigma ID:     646ea171-dded-4578-8a4d-65e9822892e3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Modexp, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-02-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_process_dump_via_comsvcs.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%24%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%comsvcs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%full%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% #%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%,#%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%, #%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%"#%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Rundll32 Registered COM Objects

load malicious registered COM objects

-- ============================================================
