Suspicious Service Path Modification

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003 Author: Victor Sergeev, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects service path modification via the "sc" binary to a suspicious command or path
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Service Path Modification
-- Sigma ID:     138d3531-8793-4f50-a2cd-f291b2863d78
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Victor Sergeev, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sc_service_path_modification.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%binPath%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%svchost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dllhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /k%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /r%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\TEMP\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential Persistence Attempt Via Existing Service Tampering

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003, T1574.011 Author: Sreeman Status: test
Detects the modification of an existing service in order to execute an arbitrary payload when the service is started or killed as a potential method for persistence.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Persistence Attempt Via Existing Service Tampering
-- Sigma ID:     38879043-7e1e-47a9-8d46-6bec88e201df
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003, T1574.011
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-09-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sc_service_tamper_for_persistence.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sc %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%binpath=%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sc %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%failure%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%command=%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bin$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msh$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.reg$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.scr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pl%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FailureCommand%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ImagePath%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Stop Windows Service Via Sc.EXE

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: impact, T1489 Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the "sc.exe" utility
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Stop Windows Service Via Sc.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     81bcb81b-5b1f-474b-b373-52c871aaa7b1
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489
-- Author:       Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sc_stop_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    There are many legitimate reasons to stop a service. This rule isn't looking for any suspicious behavior in particular. Filter legitimate activity accordingly
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% stop %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'sc.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: There are many legitimate reasons to stop a service. This rule isn't looking for any suspicious behavior in particular. Filter legitimate activity accordingly

Suspicious Schtasks Execution AppData Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005, T1059.001 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the creation of a schtask that executes a file from C:\Users\<USER>\AppData\Local
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Schtasks Execution AppData Folder
-- Sigma ID:     c5c00f49-b3f9-45a6-997e-cfdecc6e1967
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1059.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_appdata_local_system.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RU%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TR%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Users\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NT AUT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% SYSTEM %')))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%TeamViewer\_.exe%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TN TVInstallRestore%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Modification Of Scheduled Tasks

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects when an attacker tries to modify an already existing scheduled tasks to run from a suspicious location Attackers can create a simple looking task in order to avoid detection on creation as it's often the most focused on Instead they modify the task after creation to include their malicious payload
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Modification Of Scheduled Tasks
-- Sigma ID:     1c0e41cd-21bb-4433-9acc-4a2cd6367b9b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_change.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /Change %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /TN %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%certutil%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bitsadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bash.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bash %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%scrcons%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wmic %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wmic.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%forfiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%scriptrunner%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hh.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hh %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\WINDOWS\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temporary Internet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\ProgramData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Perflogs\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%ProgramData\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%appdata\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%comspec\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%localappdata\%%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Scheduled Task Creation Via Schtasks.EXE

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the creation of scheduled tasks by user accounts via the "schtasks" utility.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Creation Via Schtasks.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     92626ddd-662c-49e3-ac59-f6535f12d189
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_creation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity; Software installation
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /create %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity; Software installation

Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation Involving Temp Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the creation of scheduled tasks that involves a temporary folder and runs only once
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation Involving Temp Folder
-- Sigma ID:     39019a4e-317f-4ce3-ae63-309a8c6b53c5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_creation_temp_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity; Software installation
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /create %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /sc once %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity; Software installation

Scheduled Task Creation with Curl and PowerShell Execution Combo

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005, T1218, T1105 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects the creation of a scheduled task using schtasks.exe, potentially in combination with curl for downloading payloads and PowerShell for executing them. This facilitates executing malicious payloads or connecting with C&C server persistently without dropping the malware sample on the host.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Creation with Curl and PowerShell Execution Combo
-- Sigma ID:     1d174d38-8fda-4081-a9b6-56d9763c0cd8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1218, T1105
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_curl_and_powershell_combo.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of schtasks for administrative purposes.; Automation scripts combining curl and PowerShell in controlled environments.
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-o%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND rawEventMsg LIKE '% /create %')
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of schtasks for administrative purposes.; Automation scripts combining curl and PowerShell in controlled environments.

Delete Important Scheduled Task

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1489 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects when adversaries stop services or processes by deleting their respective scheduled tasks in order to conduct data destructive activities
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Delete Important Scheduled Task
-- Sigma ID:     dbc1f800-0fe0-4bc0-9c66-292c2abe3f78
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_delete.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/delete%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/tn%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\BitLocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\ExploitGuard%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\SystemRestore\\SR%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\UpdateOrchestrator\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Windows Defender\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\WindowsBackup\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\WindowsUpdate\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Delete All Scheduled Tasks

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1489 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the usage of schtasks with the delete flag and the asterisk symbol to delete all tasks from the schedule of the local computer, including tasks scheduled by other users.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Delete All Scheduled Tasks
-- Sigma ID:     220457c1-1c9f-4c2e-afe6-9598926222c1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_delete_all.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /delete %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/tn \\*%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /f%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Disable Important Scheduled Task

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1489 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior Status: test
Detects when adversaries stop services or processes by disabling their respective scheduled tasks in order to conduct data destructive activities
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Disable Important Scheduled Task
-- Sigma ID:     9ac94dc8-9042-493c-ba45-3b5e7c86b980
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior
-- Date:         2021-12-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_disable.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Change%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TN%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/disable%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\BitLocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\ExploitGuard%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\ExploitGuard\\ExploitGuard MDM policy Refresh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\SystemRestore\\SR%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\UpdateOrchestrator\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Windows Defender\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\WindowsBackup\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\WindowsUpdate\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Schedule Task Creation From Env Variable Or Potentially Suspicious Path Via Schtasks.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Schedule Task Creation From Env Variable Or Potentially Suspicious Path Via Schtasks.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     81325ce1-be01-4250-944f-b4789644556f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_env_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Benign scheduled tasks creations or executions that happen often during software installations; Software that uses the AppData folder and scheduled tasks to update the software in the AppData folders
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Benign scheduled tasks creations or executions that happen often during software installations; Software that uses the AppData folder and scheduled tasks to update the software in the AppData folders

Schtasks From Suspicious Folders

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects scheduled task creations that have suspicious action command and folder combinations
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Schtasks From Suspicious Folders
-- Sigma ID:     8a8379b8-780b-4dbf-b1e9-31c8d112fefb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_folder_combos.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\ProgramData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%ProgramData\%%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwsh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /create %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Scheduled Task Name As GUID

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects creation of a scheduled task with a GUID like name
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Scheduled Task Name As GUID
-- Sigma ID:     ff2fff64-4cd6-4a2b-ba7d-e28a30bbe66b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_guid_task_name.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate software naming their tasks as GUIDs
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%}"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%}'%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%} %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TN "{%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TN '{%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TN {%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate software naming their tasks as GUIDs

Uncommon One Time Only Scheduled Task At 00:00

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects scheduled task creation events that include suspicious actions, and is run once at 00:00
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon One Time Only Scheduled Task At 00:00
-- Sigma ID:     970823b7-273b-460a-8afc-3a6811998529
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_one_time_only_midnight_task.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software installation
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%vbscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wmic %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wmic.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%once%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%00:00%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Software installation

Potential SSH Tunnel Persistence Install Using A Scheduled Task

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Rory Duncan Status: experimental
Detects the creation of new scheduled tasks via commandline, using Schtasks.exe. This rule detects tasks creating that call OpenSSH, which may indicate the creation of reverse SSH tunnel to the attacker's server.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential SSH Tunnel Persistence Install Using A Scheduled Task
-- Sigma ID:     2daa93a0-a5fb-41c5-8cd8-3c11294bfd1f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Rory Duncan
-- Date:         2025-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_openssh_tunnelling.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Persistence Via Microsoft Compatibility Appraiser

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005 Author: Sreeman Status: test
Detects manual execution of the "Microsoft Compatibility Appraiser" task via schtasks. In order to trigger persistence stored in the "\AppCompatFlags\TelemetryController" registry key.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Persistence Via Microsoft Compatibility Appraiser
-- Sigma ID:     f548a603-c9f2-4c89-b511-b089f7e94549
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-09-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_persistence_windows_telemetry.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%run %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Application Experience\\Microsoft Compatibility Appraiser%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Persistence Via Powershell Search Order Hijacking - Task

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005, T1059.001 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious powershell execution via a schedule task where the command ends with an suspicious flags to hide the powershell instance instead of executeing scripts or commands. This could be a sign of persistence via PowerShell "Get-Variable" technique as seen being used in Colibri Loader
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Persistence Via Powershell Search Order Hijacking - Task
-- Sigma ID:     b66474aa-bd92-4333-a16c-298155b120df
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1059.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_powershell_persistence.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\WINDOWS\System32\svchost.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%-k netsvcs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%-s Schedule%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowstyle hidden' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -w hidden' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ep bypass' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noni')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Scheduled Task Executing Payload from Registry

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005, T1059.001 Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the creation of a schtasks that potentially executes a payload stored in the Windows Registry using PowerShell.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Executing Payload from Registry
-- Sigma ID:     86588b36-c6d3-465f-9cee-8f9093e07798
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1059.001
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_reg_loader.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Scheduled Task Executing Encoded Payload from Registry

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005, T1059.001 Author: pH-T (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport, X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the creation of a schtask that potentially executes a base64 encoded payload stored in the Windows Registry using PowerShell.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Executing Encoded Payload from Registry
-- Sigma ID:     c4eeeeae-89f4-43a7-8b48-8d1bdfa66c78
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1059.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport, X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_reg_loader_encoded.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%encodedcommand%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ItemProperty%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% gp %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKCU:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKLM:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%registry::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKEY\_%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Types

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects scheduled task creations or modification on a suspicious schedule type
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Types
-- Sigma ID:     24c8392b-aa3c-46b7-a545-43f71657fe98
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_schedule_type.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate processes that run at logon. Filter according to your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate processes that run at logon. Filter according to your environment

Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges
-- Sigma ID:     7a02e22e-b885-4404-b38b-1ddc7e65258a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_schedule_type_system.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some installers were seen using this method of creation unfortunately. Filter them in your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NT AUT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% SYSTEM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HIGHEST%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONLOGON %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONSTART %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONCE %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONIDLE %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Some installers were seen using this method of creation unfortunately. Filter them in your environment

Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation via Masqueraded XML File

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1036.005, T1053.005 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects the creation of a scheduled task using the "-XML" flag with a file without the '.xml' extension. This behavior could be indicative of potential defense evasion attempt during persistence
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation via Masqueraded XML File
-- Sigma ID:     dd2a821e-3b07-4d3b-a9ac-929fe4c6ca0c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1036.005, T1053.005
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2023-04-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_schedule_via_masqueraded_xml_file.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Command Patterns In Scheduled Task Creation

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1053.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects scheduled task creation using "schtasks" that contain potentially suspicious or uncommon commands
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Command Patterns In Scheduled Task Creation
-- Sigma ID:     f2c64357-b1d2-41b7-849f-34d2682c0fad
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_susp_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software installers that run from temporary folders and also install scheduled tasks are expected to generate some false positives
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -decode %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -w hidden %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% bypass %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% IEX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadData%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadFile%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c start /min %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta http%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta.exe http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Software installers that run from temporary folders and also install scheduled tasks are expected to generate some false positives

Schtasks Creation Or Modification With SYSTEM Privileges

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the creation or update of a scheduled task to run with "NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM" privileges
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Schtasks Creation Or Modification With SYSTEM Privileges
-- Sigma ID:     89ca78fd-b37c-4310-b3d3-81a023f83936

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Scheduled Task Creation Masquerading as System Processes

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, persistence, T1053.005, T1036.004, T1036.005 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects the creation of scheduled tasks that involve system processes, which may indicate malicious actors masquerading as or abusing these processes to execute payloads or maintain persistence.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Creation Masquerading as System Processes
-- Sigma ID:     9f8573c9-22b4-40e3-89c1-72bc2b8d49ab
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1036.004, T1036.005
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_system_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate system administration tasks scheduling trusted system processes.
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '% /create %'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% audiodg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% conhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% dwm.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% explorer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% lsass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% lsm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mmc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% msiexec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% services%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% spoolsv%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% svchost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% taskeng%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% taskhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% wininit%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% winlogon%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate system administration tasks scheduling trusted system processes.

Script Event Consumer Spawning Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1047 Author: Sittikorn S Status: test
Detects a suspicious child process of Script Event Consumer (scrcons.exe).
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Script Event Consumer Spawning Process
-- Sigma ID:     f6d1dd2f-b8ce-40ca-bc23-062efb686b34
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Sittikorn S
-- Date:         2021-06-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_scrcons_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\scrcons.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msbuild.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1

-- Title:        Uncommon Extension Shim Database Installation Via Sdbinst.EXE

  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC

Sdclt Child Processes

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1548.002 Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research) Status: test
A General detection for sdclt spawning new processes. This could be an indicator of sdclt being used for bypass UAC techniques.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sdclt Child Processes
-- Sigma ID:     da2738f2-fadb-4394-afa7-0a0674885afa
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
-- Date:         2020-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sdclt_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sdclt.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Sdiagnhost Calling Suspicious Child Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036, T1218 Author: Nextron Systems, @Kostastsale Status: test
Detects sdiagnhost.exe calling a suspicious child process (e.g. used in exploits for Follina / CVE-2022-30190)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sdiagnhost Calling Suspicious Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     f3d39c45-de1a-4486-a687-ab126124f744
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1218
-- Author:       Nextron Systems, @Kostastsale
-- Date:         2022-06-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sdiagnhost_susp_child.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sdiagnhost.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\taskkill.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Suspicious Activity Using SeCEdit

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, discovery, persistence, T1562.002, T1547.001, T1505.005, T1556.002, T1562, T1574.007, T1564.002, T1546.008, T1546.007, T1547.014, T1547.010, T1547.002, T1557, T1082 Author: Janantha Marasinghe Status: test
Detects potential suspicious behaviour using secedit.exe. Such as exporting or modifying the security policy
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Suspicious Activity Using SeCEdit
-- Sigma ID:     c2c76b77-32be-4d1f-82c9-7e544bdfe0eb
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, discovery, persistence | T1562.002, T1547.001, T1505.005, T1556.002, T1562, T1574.007, T1564.002, T1546.008, T1546.007, T1547.014, T1547.010, T1547.002, T1557, T1082
-- Author:       Janantha Marasinghe
-- Date:         2022-11-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_secedit_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\secedit.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SeCEdit'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrative use

NodeJS Execution of JavaScript File

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: execution, T1059.007 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects execution of JavaScript or JSC files using NodeJs binary node.exe, that could be potentially suspicious. Node.js is a popular open-source JavaScript runtime that runs code outside browsers and is widely used for both frontend and backend development. Adversaries have been observed abusing Node.js to disguise malware as legitimate processes, evade security defenses, and maintain persistence within target systems. Because Node.js is commonly used, this rule may generate false positives in some environments. However, if such activity is unusual in your environment, it is highly suspicious and warrants immediate investigation.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        NodeJS Execution of JavaScript File
-- Sigma ID:     ba3874b9-0fae-465f-836c-eb5d071a1789
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.007
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_security_susp_node_js_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of node.exe to execute JavaScript or JSC files on your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.js%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\node.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'node.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Node.js')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of node.exe to execute JavaScript or JSC files on your environment

Suspicious Serv-U Process Pattern

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1555 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious process pattern which could be a sign of an exploited Serv-U service
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Serv-U Process Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     58f4ea09-0fc2-4520-ba18-b85c540b0eaf
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_servu_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate uses in which users or programs use the SSH service of Serv-U for remote command execution
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Serv-U.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\forfiles.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scriptrunner.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate uses in which users or programs use the SSH service of Serv-U for remote command execution

Uncommon Child Process Of Setres.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218, T1202 Author: @gott_cyber, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects uncommon child process of Setres.EXE. Setres.EXE is a Windows server only process and tool that can be used to set the screen resolution. It can potentially be abused in order to launch any arbitrary file with a name containing the word "choice" from the current execution path.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Child Process Of Setres.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     835e75bf-4bfd-47a4-b8a6-b766cac8bcb7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1202
-- Author:       @gott_cyber, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setres_uncommon_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\setres.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\choice%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential SPN Enumeration Via Setspn.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1558.003 Author: Markus Neis, keepwatch Status: test
Detects service principal name (SPN) enumeration used for Kerberoasting
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential SPN Enumeration Via Setspn.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1eeed653-dbc8-4187-ad0c-eeebb20e6599
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1558.003
-- Author:       Markus Neis, keepwatch
-- Date:         2018-11-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setspn_spn_enumeration.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Administration activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -q %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /q %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\setspn.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'setspn.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Query or reset the computer%' AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%SPN attribute%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administration activity

Setup16.EXE Execution With Custom .Lst File

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1574.005 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the execution of "Setup16.EXE" and old installation utility with a custom ".lst" file. These ".lst" file can contain references to external program that "Setup16.EXE" will execute. Attackers and adversaries might leverage this as a living of the land utility.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Setup16.EXE Execution With Custom .Lst File
-- Sigma ID:     99c8be4f-3087-4f9f-9c24-8c7e257b442e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1574.005
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2024-12-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setup16_custom_lst_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    On modern Windows system, the "Setup16" utility is practically never used, hence false positive should be very rare.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\setup16.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% -m %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: On modern Windows system, the "Setup16" utility is practically never used, hence false positive should be very rare.

Suspicious Execution of Shutdown

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: impact, T1529 Author: frack113 Status: test
Use of the commandline to shutdown or reboot windows
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Execution of Shutdown
-- Sigma ID:     34ebb878-1b15-4895-b352-ca2eeb99b274
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1529
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_shutdown_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\shutdown.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/s %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: impact, T1529 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects the rare use of the command line tool shutdown to logoff a user

  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,

  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\shutdown.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/l%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
