Audio Capture via SoundRecorder

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1123 Author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community Status: test
Detect attacker collecting audio via SoundRecorder application.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Audio Capture via SoundRecorder
-- Sigma ID:     83865853-59aa-449e-9600-74b9d89a6d6e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1123
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_soundrecorder_audio_capture.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate audio capture by legitimate user.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SoundRecorder.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/FILE%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate audio capture by legitimate user.

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0

Suspicious Spool Service Child Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1203, T1068 Author: Justin C. (@endisphotic), @dreadphones (detection), Thomas Patzke (Sigma rule) Status: test
Detects suspicious print spool service (spoolsv.exe) child processes.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Spool Service Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     dcdbc940-0bff-46b2-95f3-2d73f848e33b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1203, T1068
-- Author:       Justin C. (@endisphotic), @dreadphones (detection), Thomas Patzke (Sigma rule)
-- Date:         2021-07-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_spoolsv_susp_child_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\spoolsv.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('System', 'S-1-16-16384')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%start%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.spl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%route add%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%program files%'))))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\netsh.exe'
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add portopening%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rule name%'))))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.spl%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Veeam Backup Database Suspicious Query

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious SQL queries using SQLCmd targeting the Veeam backup databases in order to steal information.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Veeam Backup Database Suspicious Query
-- Sigma ID:     696bfb54-227e-4602-ac5b-30d9d2053312
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sqlcmd_veeam_db_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BackupRepositories%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Backups%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Credentials%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HostCreds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SmbFileShares%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ssh\_creds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VSphereInfo%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sqlcmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VeeamBackup%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%From %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

VeeamBackup Database Credentials Dump Via Sqlcmd.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: collection, T1005 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects dump of credentials in VeeamBackup dbo
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        VeeamBackup Database Credentials Dump Via Sqlcmd.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b57ba453-b384-4ab9-9f40-1038086b4e53
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1005
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sqlcmd_veeam_dump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SELECT%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TOP%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[VeeamBackup].[dbo].[Credentials]%')
  AND procName LIKE '%\\sqlcmd.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

SQLite Chromium Profile Data DB Access

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: collection, T1539, T1555.003, T1005 Author: TropChaud Status: test
Detect usage of the "sqlite" binary to query databases in Chromium-based browsers for potential data stealing.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SQLite Chromium Profile Data DB Access
-- Sigma ID:     24c77512-782b-448a-8950-eddb0785fc71
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1539, T1555.003, T1005
-- Author:       TropChaud
-- Date:         2022-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sqlite_chromium_profile_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\User Data\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\ChromiumViewer\\%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Login Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Cookies%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Web Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%History%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Bookmarks%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SQLite'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\sqlite.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sqlite3.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

SQLite Firefox Profile Data DB Access

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: collection, T1539, T1005 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detect usage of the "sqlite" binary to query databases in Firefox and other Gecko-based browsers for potential data stealing.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SQLite Firefox Profile Data DB Access
-- Sigma ID:     4833155a-4053-4c9c-a997-777fcea0baa7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1539, T1005
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-04-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sqlite_firefox_gecko_profile_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cookies.sqlite%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%places.sqlite%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SQLite'))

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;

Arbitrary File Download Via Squirrel.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community Status: test
Detects the usage of the "Squirrel.exe" to download arbitrary files. This binary is part of multiple Electron based software installations (Slack, Teams, Discord, etc.)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via Squirrel.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1e75c1cc-c5d4-42aa-ac3d-91b0b68b3b4c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2022-06-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_squirrel_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Expected FP with some Electron based applications such as (1Clipboard, Beaker Browser, Caret, Discord, GitHub Desktop, etc.)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --download %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --update %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --updateRollback=%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\squirrel.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\update.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Expected FP with some Electron based applications such as (1Clipboard, Beaker Browser, Caret, Discord, GitHub Desktop, etc.)

Process Proxy Execution Via Squirrel.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community Status: test
Detects the usage of the "Squirrel.exe" binary to execute arbitrary processes. This binary is part of multiple Electron based software installations (Slack, Teams, Discord, etc.)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Proxy Execution Via Squirrel.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     45239e6a-b035-4aaf-b339-8ad379fcb67e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2022-06-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_squirrel_proxy_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Expected FP with some Electron based applications such as (1Clipboard, Beaker Browser, Caret, Discord, GitHub Desktop, etc.)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Expected FP with some Electron based applications such as (1Clipboard, Beaker Browser, Caret, Discord, GitHub Desktop, etc.)

Port Forwarding Activity Via SSH.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1572, T1021.001, T1021.004 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects port forwarding activity via SSH.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Port Forwarding Activity Via SSH.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     327f48c1-a6db-4eb8-875a-f6981f1b0183
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572, T1021.001, T1021.004
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_port_forward.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity using a remote port forwarding to a local port
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ssh.exe'
    AND rawEventMsg LIKE '% -R %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity using a remote port forwarding to a local port

Program Executed Using Proxy/Local Command Via SSH.EXE

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detect usage of the "ssh.exe" binary as a proxy to launch other programs.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Program Executed Using Proxy/Local Command Via SSH.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     7d6d30b8-5b91-4b90-a891-46cccaf29598
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-12-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_proxy_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage for administration purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\sshd.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProxyCommand=%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PermitLocalCommand=yes%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% LocalCommand%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ssh.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'OpenSSH for Windows'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=55b4964d29aad5438b9e950052dbbbc0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=334d66c33503ccbf647c15b47c27eef4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=27b0da080ef92afb37983d30d839141e%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=977eb4c263d384e47daa0712d34713ab%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3eaadce9ae43d5a918bb082065815c3b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=980fe6cf0d996ab1eedf877222e722aa%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5f959422308ac3d721010d66647e100e%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=a49aaa3d03d1cd9c8dc7fca60f7f480b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=dd335f759b6d5d6a8382b71dd9d65791%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage for administration purposes

Potential RDP Tunneling Via SSH

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1572 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Execution of ssh.exe to perform data exfiltration and tunneling through RDP
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential RDP Tunneling Via SSH
-- Sigma ID:     f7d7ebd5-a016-46e2-9c54-f9932f2d386d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_rdp_tunneling.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ssh.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:3389%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Amazon SSM Agent Hijacking

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1219.002 Author: Muhammad Faisal Status: test
Detects potential Amazon SSM agent hijack attempts as outlined in the Mitiga research report.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Amazon SSM Agent Hijacking
-- Sigma ID:     d20ee2f4-822c-4827-9e15-41500b1fff10
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1219.002
-- Author:       Muhammad Faisal
-- Date:         2023-08-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssm_agent_abuse.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate activity of system administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\amazon-ssm-agent.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-register %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-code %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-id %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-region %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate activity of system administrators

Execution via stordiag.exe

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218 Author: Austin Songer (@austinsonger) Status: test
Detects the use of stordiag.exe to execute schtasks.exe systeminfo.exe and fltmc.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution via stordiag.exe
-- Sigma ID:     961e0abb-1b1e-4c84-a453-aafe56ad0d34
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Austin Songer (@austinsonger)
-- Date:         2021-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_stordiag_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of stordiag.exe.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\stordiag.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\systeminfo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\fltmc.exe'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE 'c:\\windows\\system32\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE 'c:\\windows\\syswow64\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of stordiag.exe.

Start of NT Virtual DOS Machine

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: frack113 Status: test
Ntvdm.exe allows the execution of 16-bit Windows applications on 32-bit Windows operating systems, as well as the execution of both 16-bit and 32-bit DOS applications
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Start of NT Virtual DOS Machine
-- Sigma ID:     16905e21-66ee-42fe-b256-1318ada2d770
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-07-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_16bit_application.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ntvdm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csrstub.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use

Abused Debug Privilege by Arbitrary Parent Processes

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1548 Author: Semanur Guneysu @semanurtg, oscd.community Status: test
Detection of unusual child processes by different system processes
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Abused Debug Privilege by Arbitrary Parent Processes
-- Sigma ID:     d522eca2-2973-4391-a3e0-ef0374321dae
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548
-- Author:       Semanur Guneysu @semanurtg, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_abusing_debug_privilege.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% route %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ADD %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

User Added to Local Administrators Group

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1098 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects addition of users to the local administrator group via "Net" or "Add-LocalGroupMember".
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Added to Local Administrators Group
-- Sigma ID:     ad720b90-25ad-43ff-9b5e-5c841facc8e5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1098
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_add_user_local_admin_group.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% administrators %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% administrateur%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%localgroup %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /add%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-LocalGroupMember %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Group %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity

User Added To Highly Privileged Group

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1098 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects addition of users to highly privileged groups via "Net" or "Add-LocalGroupMember".
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Added To Highly Privileged Group
-- Sigma ID:     10fb649c-3600-4d37-b1e6-56ea90bb7e09
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1098
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_add_user_privileged_group.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity that must be investigated
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Group Policy Creator Owners%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Schema Admins%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%localgroup %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /add%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-LocalGroupMember %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Group %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity that must be investigated

User Added to Remote Desktop Users Group

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1133, T1136.001, T1021.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects addition of users to the local Remote Desktop Users group via "Net" or "Add-LocalGroupMember".
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Added to Remote Desktop Users Group
-- Sigma ID:     ffa28e60-bdb1-46e0-9f82-05f7a61cc06e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1133, T1136.001, T1021.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_add_user_remote_desktop_group.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remote Desktop Users%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Utilisateurs du Bureau à distance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Usuarios de escritorio remoto%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%localgroup %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /add%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-LocalGroupMember %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Group %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity

Execute From Alternate Data Streams

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects execution from an Alternate Data Stream (ADS). Adversaries may use NTFS file attributes to hide their malicious data in order to evade detection
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute From Alternate Data Streams
-- Sigma ID:     7f43c430-5001-4f8b-aaa9-c3b88f18fa5c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-09-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_alternate_data_streams.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%txt:%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Always Install Elevated Windows Installer

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1548.002 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community Status: test
Detects Windows Installer service (msiexec.exe) trying to install MSI packages with SYSTEM privilege
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Always Install Elevated Windows Installer
-- Sigma ID:     cd951fdc-4b2f-47f5-ba99-a33bf61e3770
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_always_install_elevated_windows_installer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    System administrator usage; Anti virus products; WindowsApps located in "C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\"
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (user LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR user LIKE '%AUTORI%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: System administrator usage; Anti virus products; WindowsApps located in "C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\"

Potentially Suspicious Windows App Activity

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious child process of applications launched from inside the WindowsApps directory. This could be a sign of a rogue ".appx" package installation/execution
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Windows App Activity
-- Sigma ID:     f91ed517-a6ba-471d-9910-b3b4a398c0f3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_appx_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate packages that make use of external binaries such as Windows Terminal
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate packages that make use of external binaries such as Windows Terminal

Arbitrary Shell Command Execution Via Settingcontent-Ms

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1204, T1566.001 Author: Sreeman Status: test
The .SettingContent-ms file type was introduced in Windows 10 and allows a user to create "shortcuts" to various Windows 10 setting pages. These files are simply XML and contain paths to various Windows 10 settings binaries.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary Shell Command Execution Via Settingcontent-Ms
-- Sigma ID:     24de4f3b-804c-4165-b442-5a06a2302c7e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204, T1566.001
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-03-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_arbitrary_shell_execution_via_settingcontent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.SettingContent-ms%')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%immersivecontrolpanel%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Phishing Pattern ISO in Archive

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1566 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects cases in which an ISO files is opend within an archiver like 7Zip or Winrar, which is a sign of phishing as threat actors put small ISO files in archives as email attachments to bypass certain filters and protective measures (mark of web)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Phishing Pattern ISO in Archive
-- Sigma ID:     fcdf69e5-a3d3-452a-9724-26f2308bf2b1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1566
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_archiver_iso_phishing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate cases in which archives contain ISO or IMG files and the user opens the archive and the image via clicking and not extraction
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Winrar.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\7zFM.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\peazip.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\isoburn.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PowerISO.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ImgBurn.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate cases in which archives contain ISO or IMG files and the user opens the archive and the image via clicking and not extraction

Automated Collection Command Prompt

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1119, T1552.001 Author: frack113 Status: test
Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Automated Collection Command Prompt
-- Sigma ID:     f576a613-2392-4067-9d1a-9345fb58d8d1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1119, T1552.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_automated_collection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.docx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xlsx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pptx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Bad Opsec Defaults Sacrificial Processes With Improper Arguments

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218.011 Author: Oleg Kolesnikov @securonix invrep_de, oscd.community, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects attackers using tooling with bad opsec defaults. E.g. spawning a sacrificial process to inject a capability into the process without taking into account how the process is normally run. One trivial example of this is using rundll32.exe without arguments as a sacrificial process (default in CS, now highlighted by c2lint), running WerFault without arguments (Kraken - credit am0nsec), and other examples.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Bad Opsec Defaults Sacrificial Processes With Improper Arguments
-- Sigma ID:     a7c3d773-caef-227e-a7e7-c2f13c622329
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Oleg Kolesnikov @securonix invrep_de, oscd.community, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-10-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_bad_opsec_sacrificial_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential Suspicious Browser Launch From Document Reader Process

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1204.002 Author: Joseph Kamau Status: test
Detects when a browser process or browser tab is launched from an application that handles document files such as Adobe, Microsoft Office, etc. And connects to a web application over http(s), this could indicate a possible phishing attempt.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Suspicious Browser Launch From Document Reader Process
-- Sigma ID:     1193d960-2369-499f-a158-7b50a31df682
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.002
-- Author:       Joseph Kamau
-- Date:         2024-05-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_browser_launch_from_document_reader_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely in most cases, further investigation should be done in the commandline of the browser process to determine the context of the URL accessed.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%Acrobat Reader%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%Microsoft Office%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%PDF Reader%'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\firefox.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\maxthon.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\seamonkey.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely in most cases, further investigation should be done in the commandline of the browser process to determine the context of the URL accessed.

Suspicious Child Process Created as System

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1134.002 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Roberto Rodriguez (@Cyb3rWard0g), Open Threat Research (OTR) Status: test
Detection of child processes spawned with SYSTEM privileges by parents with LOCAL SERVICE or NETWORK SERVICE accounts
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Child Process Created as System
-- Sigma ID:     590a5f4c-6c8c-4f10-8307-89afe9453a9d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Roberto Rodriguez (@Cyb3rWard0g), Open Threat Research (OTR)
-- Date:         2019-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_child_process_as_system_.yml
-- Unmapped:     ParentUser
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: ParentUser

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '%AUTORI%')
    AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%\\NETWORK SERVICE' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '%\\LOCAL SERVICE')
    AND (user LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR user LIKE '%AUTORI%')
    AND (user LIKE '%\\SYSTEM' OR user LIKE '%\\Système' OR user LIKE '%\\СИСТЕМА')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('System', 'S-1-16-16384')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Commandline Obfuscation Using Escape Characters

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1140 Author: juju4 Status: test
Detects potential commandline obfuscation using known escape characters
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Commandline Obfuscation Using Escape Characters
-- Sigma ID:     f0cdd048-82dc-4f7a-8a7a-b87a52b6d0fd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1140
-- Author:       juju4
-- Date:         2018-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cli_obfuscation_escape_char.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%h^t^t^p%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%h"t"t"p%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential CommandLine Obfuscation Using Unicode Characters From Suspicious Image

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1027 Author: frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels Status: test
Detects potential commandline obfuscation using unicode characters. Adversaries may attempt to make an executable or file difficult to discover or analyze by encrypting, encoding, or otherwise obfuscating its contents on the system or in transit.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential CommandLine Obfuscation Using Unicode Characters From Suspicious Image
-- Sigma ID:     584bca0f-3608-4402-80fd-4075ff6072e3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels
-- Date:         2024-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cli_obfuscation_unicode_img.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.EXE', 'cscript.exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ˣ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%˪%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ˢ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%∕%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%⁄%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%―%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%—%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%¯%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%®%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%¶%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%⠀%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious ClickFix/FileFix Execution Pattern

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1204.001, T1204.004 Author: montysecurity, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects suspicious execution patterns where users are tricked into running malicious commands via clipboard manipulation, either through the Windows Run dialog (ClickFix) or File Explorer address bar (FileFix). Attackers leverage social engineering campaigns—such as fake CAPTCHA challenges or urgent alerts—encouraging victims to paste clipboard contents, often executing mshta.exe, powershell.exe, or similar commands to infect systems.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious ClickFix/FileFix Execution Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     d487ed4a-fd24-436d-a0b2-f4e95f7b2635
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.001, T1204.004
-- Author:       montysecurity, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_clickfix_filefix_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%account%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anti-bot%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%botcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%captcha%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%challenge%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%confirmation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fraud%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%human%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%identification%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%identificator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%identity%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%robot%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%validation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verification%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verify%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Explorer Process with Whitespace Padding - ClickFix/FileFix

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1204.004, T1027.010 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects process creation with suspicious whitespace padding followed by a '#' character, which may indicate ClickFix or FileFix techniques used to conceal malicious commands from visual inspection. ClickFix and FileFix are social engineering attack techniques where adversaries distribute phishing documents or malicious links that deceive users into opening the Windows Run dialog box or File Explorer search bar. The victims are then instructed to paste commands from their clipboard, which contain extensive whitespace padding using various Unicode space characters to push the actual malicious command far to the right, effectively hiding it from immediate view.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Explorer Process with Whitespace Padding - ClickFix/FileFix
-- Sigma ID:     3ae9974a-eb09-4044-8e70-8980a50c12c8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.004, T1027.010
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_clickfix_filefix_whitespace_padding.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Usage of For Loop with Recursive Directory Search in CMD

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.003, T1027.010 Author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk Status: experimental
Detects suspicious usage of the cmd.exe 'for /f' loop combined with the 'tokens=' parameter and a recursive directory listing. This pattern may indicate an attempt to discover and execute system binaries dynamically, for example powershell, a technique sometimes used by attackers to evade detection. This behavior has been observed in various malicious lnk files.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Usage of For Loop with Recursive Directory Search in CMD
-- Sigma ID:     2782fbd8-b662-4eb5-9962-5bfbfb671e7b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003, T1027.010
-- Author:       Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
-- Date:         2025-11-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cmd_for_loop_execution_with_recursive_directory_search.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for /f%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tokens=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%in (%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dir%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%for /f%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%tokens=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%in (%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%dir%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Command Line Path Traversal Evasion Attempt

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1036 Author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potential evasion or obfuscation attempts using bogus path traversal via the commandline
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Command Line Path Traversal Evasion Attempt
-- Sigma ID:     1327381e-6ab0-4f38-b583-4c1b8346a56b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_commandline_path_traversal_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Google Drive; Citrix
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Google Drive; Citrix

Potential Browser Data Stealing

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1555.003 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Adversaries may acquire credentials from web browsers by reading files specific to the target browser. Web browsers commonly save credentials such as website usernames and passwords so that they do not need to be entered manually in the future. Web browsers typically store the credentials in an encrypted format within a credential store.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Browser Data Stealing
-- Sigma ID:     47147b5b-9e17-4d76-b8d2-7bac24c5ce1b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_browser_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy-item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cpi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% cp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%move %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%move-item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mv %')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\esentutl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\xcopy.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\robocopy.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('esentutl.exe', 'XCOPY.EXE', 'robocopy.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Amigo\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\BraveSoftware\\Brave-Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\CentBrowser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Chromium\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\CocCoc\\Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Comodo\\Dragon\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Elements Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Epic Privacy Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Google\\Chrome Beta\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Google\\Chrome SxS\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Google\\Chrome\\User Data\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Kometa\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Maxthon5\\Users%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Edge\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Mozilla\\Firefox\\Profiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Nichrome\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\Opera GX Stable\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\Opera Neon\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\Opera Stable\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Orbitum\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\QIP Surf\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Sputnik\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Torch\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\uCozMedia\\Uran\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Vivaldi\\User Data%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, exfiltration, T1039, T1048, T1021.002 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detects a copy command or a copy utility execution to or from an Admin share or remote
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder
-- Sigma ID:     855bc8b5-2ae8-402e-a9ed-b889e6df1900
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, exfiltration | T1039, T1048, T1021.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2019-12-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_lateral_movement.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\*\\\\*$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Sysvol\\%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\robocopy.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\xcopy.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('robocopy.exe', 'XCOPY.EXE'))))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative scripts

Suspicious Copy From or To System Directory

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1036.003 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Tim Shelton (HAWK.IO), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious copy operation that tries to copy a program from system (System32, SysWOW64, WinSxS) directories to another on disk. Often used to move LOLBINs such as 'certutil' or 'desktopimgdownldr' to a different location with a different name in order to bypass detections based on locations.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Copy From or To System Directory
-- Sigma ID:     fff9d2b7-e11c-4a69-93d3-40ef66189767
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Tim Shelton (HAWK.IO), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_system_dir.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment (For example an admin scripts like https://www.itexperience.net/sccm-batch-files-and-32-bits-processes-on-64-bits-os/); When cmd.exe and xcopy.exe are called directly; When the command contains the keywords but not in the correct order
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: re|i

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%\\s['"]?C:\\\\Windows\\\\(System32|SysWOW64|WinSxS)%'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment (For example an admin scripts like https://www.itexperience.net/sccm-batch-files-and-32-bits-processes-on-64-bits-os/); When cmd.exe and xcopy.exe are called directly; When the command contains the keywords but not in the correct order

LOL-Binary Copied From System Directory

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.003 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious copy operation that tries to copy a known LOLBIN from system (System32, SysWOW64, WinSxS) directories to another on disk in order to bypass detections based on locations.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        LOL-Binary Copied From System Directory
-- Sigma ID:     f5d19838-41b5-476c-98d8-ba8af4929ee2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
