-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_system_dir_lolbin.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Crypto Mining Activity

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1496 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: stable
Detects command line parameters or strings often used by crypto miners
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Crypto Mining Activity
-- Sigma ID:     66c3b204-9f88-4d0a-a7f7-8a57d521ca55
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        impact | T1496
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_crypto_mining_monero.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of crypto miners; Some build frameworks
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --cpu-priority=%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--donate-level=0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o pool.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --nicehash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --algo=rx/0 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stratum+tcp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stratum+udp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LS1kb25hdGUtbGV2ZWw9%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0tZG9uYXRlLWxldmVsP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tLWRvbmF0ZS1sZXZlbD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%c3RyYXR1bSt0Y3A6Ly%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%N0cmF0dW0rdGNwOi8v%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zdHJhdHVtK3RjcDovL%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%c3RyYXR1bSt1ZHA6Ly%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%N0cmF0dW0rdWRwOi8v%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zdHJhdHVtK3VkcDovL%'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% pool.c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% pool.o %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gcc -%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of crypto miners; Some build frameworks

Potential Data Exfiltration Activity Via CommandLine Tools

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of various CLI utilities exfiltrating data via web requests
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Data Exfiltration Activity Via CommandLine Tools
-- Sigma ID:     7d1aaf3d-4304-425c-b7c3-162055e0b3ab
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_data_exfiltration_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%irm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ur%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -me%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -b%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% POST %'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--ur%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -d %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --data %')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\wget.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--post-data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--post-file%')))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'net\s+view') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'sc\s+query'))))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Content%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetBytes%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hostname%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ifconfig%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipconfig%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%netstat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nltest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%qprocess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%systeminfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tasklist%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ToBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%whoami%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% > %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% C:\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Raccine Uninstall

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects commands that indicate a Raccine removal from an end system. Raccine is a free ransomware protection tool.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Raccine Uninstall
-- Sigma ID:     a31eeaed-3fd5-478e-a8ba-e62c6b3f9ecc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-01-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_disable_raccine.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate deinstallation by administrative staff
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%taskkill %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RaccineSettings.exe%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%delete%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Raccine Tray%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%schtasks%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/DELETE%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Raccine Rules Updater%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate deinstallation by administrative staff

Suspicious Double Extension File Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1566.001 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), @blu3_team (idea), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: stable
Detects suspicious use of an .exe extension after a non-executable file extension like .pdf.exe, a set of spaces or underlines to cloak the executable file in spear phishing campaigns
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Double Extension File Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1cdd9a09-06c9-4769-99ff-626e2b3991b8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        T1566.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), @blu3_team (idea), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-06-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_double_extension.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%      .exe' OR procName LIKE '%\_\_\_\_\_\_.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.doc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.doc.js' OR procName LIKE '%.docx.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.docx.js' OR procName LIKE '%.gif.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.jpeg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.jpg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mkv.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mov.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mp3.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mp4.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.pdf.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.pdf.js' OR procName LIKE '%.png.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.ppt.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.ppt.js' OR procName LIKE '%.pptx.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.pptx.js' OR procName LIKE '%.rtf.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.rtf.js' OR procName LIKE '%.svg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.txt.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.txt.js' OR procName LIKE '%.xls.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.xls.js' OR procName LIKE '%.xlsx.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.xlsx.js' OR procName LIKE '%⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%      .exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\_\_\_\_\_\_.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.docx.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.docx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mkv.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mov.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp3.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp4.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pptx.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pptx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.svg.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xlsx.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xlsx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀.exe%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Parent Double Extension File Execution

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.007 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detect execution of suspicious double extension files in ParentCommandLine
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Parent Double Extension File Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5e6a80c8-2d45-4633-9ef4-fa2671a39c5c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.007
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_double_extension_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.doc.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.docx.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xls.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xlsx.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.ppt.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pptx.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.rtf.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pdf.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.txt.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.doc.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.docx.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xls.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xlsx.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.ppt.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pptx.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.rtf.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pdf.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.txt.js')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.doc.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.docx.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xls.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xlsx.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.ppt.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pptx.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.rtf.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pdf.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.txt.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.doc.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.docx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xls.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xlsx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.ppt.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pptx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.rtf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pdf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.txt.js%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Download from Office Domain

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1105, T1608 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious ways to download files from Microsoft domains that are used to store attachments in Emails or OneNote documents
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Download from Office Domain
-- Sigma ID:     00d49ed5-4491-4271-a8db-650a4ef6f8c1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105, T1608
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_download_office_domain.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Scripts or tools that download attachments from these domains (OneNote, Outlook 365)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://attachment.outlook.live.net/owa/%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://onenoteonlinesync.onenote.com/onenoteonlinesync/%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wget.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Start-BitsTransfer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadFile(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadString(%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Scripts or tools that download attachments from these domains (OneNote, Outlook 365)

DumpStack.log Defender Evasion

critical FSM Severity: 9 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of the filename DumpStack.log to evade Microsoft Defender
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DumpStack.log Defender Evasion
-- Sigma ID:     4f647cfa-b598-4e12-ad69-c68dd16caef8
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_dumpstack_log_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\DumpStack.log'
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o DumpStack.log%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Always Install Elevated MSI Spawned Cmd And Powershell

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1548.002 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community Status: test
Detects Windows Installer service (msiexec.exe) spawning "cmd" or "powershell"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Always Install Elevated MSI Spawned Cmd And Powershell
-- Sigma ID:     1e53dd56-8d83-4eb4-a43e-b790a05510aa
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_elavated_msi_spawned_shell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Installer\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%msi%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%tmp')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Electron Application Child Processes

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious child processes of electron apps (teams, discord, slack, etc.). This could be a potential sign of ".asar" file tampering (See reference section for more information) or binary execution proxy through specific CLI arguments (see related rule)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Electron Application Child Processes
-- Sigma ID:     f26eb764-fd89-464b-85e2-dc4a8e6e77b8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_electron_app_children.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\discord.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\GitHubDesktop.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\keybase.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msedgewebview2.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msteams.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\slack.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\teams.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potentially Suspicious Electron Application CommandLine

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious CommandLine of electron apps (teams, discord, slack, etc.). This could be a sign of abuse to proxy execution through a signed binary.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Electron Application CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     378a05d8-963c-46c9-bcce-13c7657eac99
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_electron_execution_proxy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage for debugging purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--browser-subprocess-path%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--gpu-launcher%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--renderer-cmd-prefix%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--utility-cmd-prefix%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\code.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\discord.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\GitHubDesktop.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\keybase.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge\_proxy.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedgewebview2.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msteams.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\slack.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Teams.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('chrome.exe', 'code.exe', 'discord.exe', 'GitHubDesktop.exe', 'keybase.exe', 'msedge_proxy.exe', 'msedge.exe', 'msedgewebview2.exe', 'msteams.exe', 'slack.exe', 'Teams.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage for debugging purposes

Elevated System Shell Spawned From Uncommon Parent Location

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: frack113, Tim Shelton (update fp) Status: test
Detects when a shell program such as the Windows command prompt or PowerShell is launched with system privileges from a uncommon parent location.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Elevated System Shell Spawned From Uncommon Parent Location
-- Sigma ID:     178e615d-e666-498b-9630-9ed363038101
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       frack113, Tim Shelton (update fp)
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_elevated_system_shell_uncommon_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some legitimate applications may spawn shells from uncommon parent locations. Apply additional filters and perform an initial baseline before deploying.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Some legitimate applications may spawn shells from uncommon parent locations. Apply additional filters and perform an initial baseline before deploying.

Hidden Powershell in Link File Pattern

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: frack113 Status: test
Detects events that appear when a user click on a link file with a powershell command in it
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hidden Powershell in Link File Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     30e92f50-bb5a-4884-98b5-d20aa80f3d7a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-02-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_embed_exe_lnk.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate commands in .lnk files
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe')
    AND procName = 'C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.lnk%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate commands in .lnk files

Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 1

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport Status: test
Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 1
-- Sigma ID:     4a30ac0c-b9d6-4e01-b71a-5f851bbf4259
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_1.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%😀%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%😃%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙆🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙆🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙆🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙋🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙋🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙋🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧏🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧏🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧏🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤦🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤦🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤦🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤷🏼‍♀️%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 2

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport Status: test
Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 2
-- Sigma ID:     c98f2a0d-e1b8-4f76-90d3-359caf88d6b9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_2.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤷🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤷🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙎🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙎🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙎🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙍🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙍🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙍🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%💇🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%💇🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%💇🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%💆🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%💆🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%💆🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧖🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧖🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤾🏿‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤾🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤾🏿‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤹🏿‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤹🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤹🏿‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧘🏿‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧘🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧘🏿‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🛀🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🛌🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐶%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐱%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐭%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐹%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐰%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦊%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐻‍❄️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐨%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐯%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦁%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐮%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐷%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐸%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐵%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙈%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙉%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙊%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐒%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐔%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐧%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐦%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐤%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐣%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐥%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 3

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport Status: test
Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 3
-- Sigma ID:     f9578658-9e71-4711-b634-3f9b50cd3c06
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_3.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦆%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦅%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦉%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦇%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐺%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐗%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐴%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦄%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐝%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🪱%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🐛%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦋%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔺%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔻%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 4

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport Status: test
Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 4
-- Sigma ID:     225274c4-8dd1-40db-9e09-71dff4f6fb3c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_4.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔸%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔹%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔶%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔷%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔳%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔲%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%▪️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%▫️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%◾️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%◽️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%◼️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%◻️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🟥%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🟧%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🟨%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🟩%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏽‍❤️‍🧑🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏽‍❤️‍🧑🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏾‍❤️‍🧑🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏾‍❤️‍🧑🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👨🏽‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👨🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👨🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👨🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👨🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👨🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏻‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏻‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏼‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏽‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏽‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏽‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏽‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏾‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👨🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%👩🏿‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏻‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏻‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏻‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏻‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏼‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏼‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏼‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏼‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏽‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏽‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏽‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏾%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏽‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏾‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏾‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏾‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏾‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏿%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏿‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏻%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏿‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏿‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏽%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🧑🏿‍❤️‍💋‍🧑🏾%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes Via CommandLine

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1562 Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research) Status: test
Detects changes to environment variables related to ETW logging via the CommandLine. This could indicate potential adversaries stopping ETW providers recording loaded .NET assemblies.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     41421f44-58f9-455d-838a-c398859841d4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
-- Date:         2020-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_etw_modification_cmdline.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%COMPlus\_ETWEnabled%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%COMPlus\_ETWFlags%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

ETW Trace Evasion Activity

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1070, T1562.006 Author: @neu5ron, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community Status: test
Detects command line activity that tries to clear or disable any ETW trace log which could be a sign of logging evasion.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ETW Trace Evasion Activity
-- Sigma ID:     a238b5d0-ce2d-4414-a676-7a531b3d13d6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1070, T1562.006
-- Author:       @neu5ron, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-03-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_etw_trace_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cl%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Trace%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%clear-log%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Trace%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sl%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/e:false%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set-log%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/e:false%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%logman%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%update%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trace%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--p%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ets%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-EtwTraceProvider%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-EtwTraceProvider%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0x11%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Eventlog Clearing or Configuration Change Activity

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1070.001, T1562.002 Author: Ecco, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, D3F7A5105, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: stable
Detects the clearing or configuration tampering of EventLog using utilities such as "wevtutil", "powershell" and "wmic". This technique were seen used by threat actors and ransomware strains in order to evade defenses.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Eventlog Clearing or Configuration Change Activity
-- Sigma ID:     cc36992a-4671-4f21-a91d-6c2b72a2edf5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        T1070.001, T1562.002
-- Author:       Ecco, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, D3F7A5105, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-09-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_eventlog_clear.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Admin activity; Scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment; Maintenance activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ClearEventLog%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Admin activity; Scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment; Maintenance activity

Potentially Suspicious EventLog Recon Activity Using Log Query Utilities

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1552, T1087 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of different log query utilities and commands to search and dump the content of specific event logs or look for specific event IDs. This technique is used by threat actors in order to extract sensitive information from events logs such as usernames, IP addresses, hostnames, etc.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious EventLog Recon Activity Using Log Query Utilities
-- Sigma ID:     beaa66d6-aa1b-4e3c-80f5-e0145369bfaf
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1552, T1087
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_eventlog_content_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the utility by administrators to query the event log
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Select%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_NTLogEvent%')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% qe %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% query-events %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wevtutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wevtutil.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ntevent%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WinEvent %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%get-eventlog %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the utility by administrators to query the event log

Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1564, T1059 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a potentially suspicious execution of a parent process located in the "\Users\Public" folder executing a child process containing references to shell or scripting binaries and commandlines.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder
-- Sigma ID:     69bd9b97-2be2-41b6-9816-fb08757a4d1a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1564, T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_execution_from_public_folder_as_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bitsadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%certutil%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Process Execution From A Potentially Suspicious Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton Status: test
Detects a potentially suspicious execution from an uncommon folder.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Execution From A Potentially Suspicious Folder
-- Sigma ID:     3dfd06d2-eaf4-4532-9555-68aca59f57c4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_execution_path.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%:\\Perflogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\All Users\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\Default\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\NetworkService\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\addins\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\debug\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Fonts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Help\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\IME\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Media\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\repair\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\security\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%$Recycle.bin%' OR procName LIKE '%\\config\\systemprofile\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Intel\\Logs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\RSA\\MachineKeys\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious File Characteristics Due to Missing Fields

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.006 Author: Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing Status: test
Detects Executables in the Downloads folder without FileVersion,Description,Product,Company likely created with py2exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Characteristics Due to Missing Fields
-- Sigma ID:     9637e8a5-7131-4f7f-bdc7-2b05d8670c43
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.006
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing
-- Date:         2018-11-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_file_characteristics.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description, FileVersion
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: FileVersion

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = '\?'
    AND rawEventMsg = '\?')
  OR (rawEventMsg = '\?'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = '\?'))
  OR ((rawEventMsg = '\?'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = '\?'))
  AND procName LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious FileFix Execution Pattern

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1204.004 Author: 0xFustang, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects suspicious FileFix execution patterns where users are tricked into running malicious commands through browser file upload dialog manipulation. This attack typically begins when users visit malicious websites impersonating legitimate services or news platforms, which may display fake CAPTCHA challenges or direct instructions to open file explorer and paste clipboard content. The clipboard content usually contains commands that download and execute malware, such as information stealing tools.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious FileFix Execution Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     b5b29e4e-31fa-4fdf-b058-296e7a1aa0c2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.004
-- Author:       0xFustang, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_filefix_execution_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of PowerShell or other utilities launched from browser extensions or automation tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\firefox.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msedge.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate use of PowerShell or other utilities launched from browser extensions or automation tools

Suspicious Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, execution, T1615, T1059.005 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects execution of the built-in script located in "C:\Windows\System32\gatherNetworkInfo.vbs". Which can be used to gather information about the target machine
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS
-- Sigma ID:     07aa184a-870d-413d-893a-157f317f6f58
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, execution | T1615, T1059.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_gather_network_info_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gatherNetworkInfo.vbs%')
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Hidden Directory Creation Via NTFS INDEX_ALLOCATION Stream - CLI

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Scoubi (@ScoubiMtl) Status: test
Detects command line containing reference to the "::$index_allocation" stream, which can be used as a technique to prevent access to folders or files from tooling such as "explorer.exe" or "powershell.exe"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Hidden Directory Creation Via NTFS INDEX_ALLOCATION Stream - CLI
-- Sigma ID:     0900463c-b33b-49a8-be1d-552a3b553dae
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Scoubi (@ScoubiMtl)
-- Date:         2023-10-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_hidden_dir_index_allocation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::$index\_allocation%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Writing Of Malicious Files To The Fonts Folder

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1211, T1059 Author: Sreeman Status: test
Monitors for the hiding possible malicious files in the C:\Windows\Fonts\ location. This folder doesn't require admin privillege to be written and executed from.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Writing Of Malicious Files To The Fonts Folder
-- Sigma ID:     ae9b0bd7-8888-4606-b444-0ed7410cb728
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1211, T1059
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_hiding_malware_in_fonts_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%echo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%file createnew%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cacls%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\Fonts\\%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.reg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.scr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.inf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cpl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Homoglyph Attack Using Lookalike Characters

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1036, T1036.003 Author: Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski Status: test
Detects the presence of unicode characters which are homoglyphs, or identical in appearance, to ASCII letter characters. This is used as an obfuscation and masquerading techniques. Only "perfect" homoglyphs are included; these are characters that are indistinguishable from ASCII characters and thus may make excellent candidates for homoglyph attack characters.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Homoglyph Attack Using Lookalike Characters
-- Sigma ID:     32e280f1-8ad4-46ef-9e80-910657611fbc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1036.003
-- Author:       Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski
-- Date:         2023-05-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_homoglyph_cyrillic_lookalikes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Commandlines with legitimate Cyrillic text; will likely require tuning (or not be usable) in countries where these alphabets are in use.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%а%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%е%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%о%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%р%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%с%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%х%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ѕ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%і%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ӏ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ј%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%һ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ԁ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ԛ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ԝ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ο%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%А%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%В%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Е%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%К%' OR
