metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%М%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Н%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%О%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Р%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%С%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Т%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Х%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ѕ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%І%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ј%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ү%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ӏ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ԍ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ԛ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ԝ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Α%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Β%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ε%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ζ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Η%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ι%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Κ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Μ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ν%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ο%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ρ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Τ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Υ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Χ%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Commandlines with legitimate Cyrillic text; will likely require tuning (or not be usable) in countries where these alphabets are in use.

Execution Of Non-Existing File

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Checks whether the image specified in a process creation event is not a full, absolute path (caused by process ghosting or other unorthodox methods to start a process)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution Of Non-Existing File
-- Sigma ID:     71158e3f-df67-472b-930e-7d287acaa3e1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_image_missing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Base64 MZ Header In CommandLine

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects encoded base64 MZ header in the commandline
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Base64 MZ Header In CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     22e58743-4ac8-4a9f-bf19-00a0428d8c5f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_base64_mz_header.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVqAAAEAAAAEABAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVoAAAAAAAAAAAAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVpTAQEAAAAEAAAA%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potentially Suspicious Inline JavaScript Execution via NodeJS Binary

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.007 Author: Microsoft (idea), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects potentially suspicious inline JavaScript execution using Node.js with specific keywords in the command line.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Inline JavaScript Execution via NodeJS Binary
-- Sigma ID:     8537c866-072e-460d-bfff-aaf39cbd73d3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.007
-- Author:       Microsoft (idea), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_node_js_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate scripts using Node.js with these modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%execSync%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spawn%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%path%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zlib%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\node.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'node.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Node.js')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate scripts using Node.js with these modules

Potential WinAPI Calls Via CommandLine

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1106 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the use of WinAPI Functions via the commandline. As seen used by threat actors via the tool winapiexec
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential WinAPI Calls Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     ba3f5c1b-6272-4119-9dbd-0bc8d21c2702
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1106
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_win_api_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some legitimate action or applications may use these functions. Investigate further to determine the legitimacy of the activity.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AddSecurityPackage%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AdjustTokenPrivileges%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Advapi32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CloseHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateProcessWithToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreatePseudoConsole%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateRemoteThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateUserThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DangerousGetHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DuplicateTokenEx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnumerateSecurityPackages%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FreeHGlobal%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FreeLibrary%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetDelegateForFunctionPointer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetLogonSessionData%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetModuleHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetProcAddress%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetProcessHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetTokenInformation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ImpersonateLoggedOnUser%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kernel32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LoadLibrary%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%memcpy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MiniDumpWriteDump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntdll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenDesktop%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenProcess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenProcessToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenThreadToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenWindowStation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PtrToString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QueueUserApc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ReadProcessMemory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RevertToSelf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RtlCreateUserThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%secur32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SetThreadToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirtualAlloc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirtualFree%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirtualProtect%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WaitForSingleObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WriteInt32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WriteProcessMemory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZeroFreeGlobalAllocUnicode%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Some legitimate action or applications may use these functions. Investigate further to determine the legitimacy of the activity.

Potentially Suspicious JWT Token Search Via CLI

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1528, T1552.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), kagebunsher Status: test
Detects potentially suspicious search for JWT tokens via CLI by looking for the string "eyJ0eX" or "eyJhbG". JWT tokens are often used for access-tokens across various applications and services like Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS, Google Cloud, and others. Threat actors may search for these tokens to steal them for lateral movement or privilege escalation.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious JWT Token Search Via CLI
-- Sigma ID:     6d3a3952-6530-44a3-8554-cf17c116c615
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1528, T1552.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), kagebunsher
-- Date:         2022-10-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_jwt_token_search.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%eyJ0eXAiOi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%eyJhbGciOi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% eyJ0eX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% "eyJ0eX"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 'eyJ0eX'%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% eyJhbG%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% "eyJhbG"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 'eyJhbG'%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%find %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%find.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%findstr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%select-string %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%strings%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious LNK Command-Line Padding with Whitespace Characters

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1204.002 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects exploitation of LNK file command-line length discrepancy, where attackers hide malicious commands beyond the 260-character UI limit while the actual command-line argument field supports 4096 characters using whitespace padding (e.g., 0x20, 0x09-0x0D). Adversaries insert non-printable whitespace characters (e.g., Line Feed \x0A, Carriage Return \x0D) to pad the visible section of the LNK file, pushing malicious commands past the UI-visible boundary. The hidden payload, executed at runtime but invisible in Windows Explorer properties, enables stealthy execution and evasion—commonly used for social engineering attacks. This rule flags suspicious use of such padding observed in real-world attacks.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious LNK Command-Line Padding with Whitespace Characters
-- Sigma ID:     dd8756e7-a3a0-4768-b47e-8f545d1a751c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.002
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-03-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lnk_exec_hidden_cmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%                 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0009%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0011%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0012%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0013%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000B%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000D%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\n\n\n\n\n\n')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.lnk%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Local Accounts Discovery

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: discovery, T1033, T1087.001 Author: Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community Status: test
Local accounts, System Owner/User discovery using operating systems utilities
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Local Accounts Discovery
-- Sigma ID:     502b42de-4306-40b4-9596-6f590c81f073
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033, T1087.001
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_local_system_owner_account_discovery.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator or user enumerates local users for legitimate reason
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /c%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dir %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\%'))
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% rmdir %')))
  OR (((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%user%'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/domain%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/add%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/delete%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/active%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/expires%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/passwordreq%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/scriptpath%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/times%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/workstations%'))))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmdkey.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /l%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\whoami.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\quser.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\qwinsta.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('whoami.exe', 'quser.exe', 'qwinsta.exe')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%useraccount%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%get%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrator or user enumerates local users for legitimate reason

LOLBIN Execution From Abnormal Drive

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io', Angelo Violetti - SEC Consult '@angelo_violetti', Aaron Herman Status: test
Detects LOLBINs executing from an abnormal or uncommon drive such as a mounted ISO.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        LOLBIN Execution From Abnormal Drive
-- Sigma ID:     d4ca7c59-e9e4-42d8-bf57-91a776efcb87
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io', Angelo Violetti - SEC Consult '@angelo_violetti', Aaron Herman
-- Date:         2022-01-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lolbin_exec_from_non_c_drive.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Rare false positives could occur on servers with multiple drives.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmstp.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\installutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('CALC.EXE', 'CertUtil.exe', 'CMSTP.EXE', 'cscript.exe', 'installutil.exe', 'MSHTA.EXE', 'REGSVR32.EXE', 'RUNDLL32.EXE', 'wscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Rare false positives could occur on servers with multiple drives.

LSASS Dump Keyword In CommandLine

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1003.001 Author: E.M. Anhaus, Tony Lambert, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the presence of the keywords "lsass" and ".dmp" in the commandline, which could indicate a potential attempt to dump or create a dump of the lsass process.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        LSASS Dump Keyword In CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     ffa6861c-4461-4f59-8a41-578c39f3f23e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus, Tony Lambert, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lsass_dmp_cli_keywords.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass.zip%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass.rar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Andrew.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Coredump.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NotLSASS.zip%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass\_2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsassdump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsassdmp%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLDmpr%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mdmp%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nanodump%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Potential File Download Via MS-AppInstaller Protocol Handler

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1218 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel Status: test
Detects usage of the "ms-appinstaller" protocol handler via command line to potentially download arbitrary files via AppInstaller.EXE The downloaded files are temporarly stored in ":\Users\%username%\AppData\Local\Packages\Microsoft.DesktopAppInstaller_8wekyb3d8bbwe\AC\INetCache\<RANDOM-8-CHAR-DIRECTORY>"
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential File Download Via MS-AppInstaller Protocol Handler
-- Sigma ID:     180c7c5c-d64b-4a63-86e9-68910451bc8b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2023-11-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ms_appinstaller_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ms-appinstaller://?source=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Network Command

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: discovery, T1016 Author: frack113, Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io' Status: test
Adversaries may look for details about the network configuration and settings of systems they access or through information discovery of remote systems
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Network Command
-- Sigma ID:     a29c1813-ab1f-4dde-b489-330b952e91ae
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1016
-- Author:       frack113, Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io'
-- Date:         2021-12-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_command.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrator, hotline ask to user
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'ipconfig\s+/all') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'netsh\s+interface show interface') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'arp\s+-a') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'nbtstat\s+-n') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'net\s+config') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'route\s+print')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrator, hotline ask to user

Suspicious Scan Loop Network

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, discovery, T1059, T1018 Author: frack113 Status: test
Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of other systems by IP address, hostname, or other logical identifier on a network that may be used for Lateral Movement from the current system
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Scan Loop Network
-- Sigma ID:     f8ad2e2c-40b6-4117-84d7-20b89896ab23
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, discovery | T1059, T1018
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-03-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_scan_loop.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate script
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%foreach %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nslookup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ping%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate script

Potential Network Sniffing Activity Using Network Tools

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery, T1040 Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potential network sniffing via use of network tools such as "tshark", "windump". Network sniffing refers to using the network interface on a system to monitor or capture information sent over a wired or wireless connection. An adversary may place a network interface into promiscuous mode to passively access data in transit over the network, or use span ports to capture a larger amount of data.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Network Sniffing Activity Using Network Tools
-- Sigma ID:     ba1f7802-adc7-48b4-9ecb-81e227fddfd5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1040
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_sniffing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administration activity to troubleshoot network issues
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\tshark.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-i%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\windump.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administration activity to troubleshoot network issues

Process Launched Without Image Name

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: Matt Anderson (Huntress) Status: test
Detect the use of processes with no name (".exe"), which can be used to evade Image-based detections.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Launched Without Image Name
-- Sigma ID:     f208d6d8-d83a-4c2c-960d-877c37da84e5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2024-07-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_no_image_name.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Rare legitimate software.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Rare legitimate software.

Execution of Suspicious File Type Extension

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects whether the image specified in a process creation event doesn't refer to an ".exe" (or other known executable extension) file. This can be caused by process ghosting or other unorthodox methods to start a process. This rule might require some initial baselining to align with some third party tooling in the user environment.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution of Suspicious File Type Extension
-- Sigma ID:     c09dad97-1c78-4f71-b127-7edb2b8e491a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_non_exe_image.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%.bin' OR procName LIKE '%.cgi' OR procName LIKE '%.com' OR procName LIKE '%.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.scr' OR procName LIKE '%.tmp'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Non-privileged Usage of Reg or Powershell

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1112 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Ryan Plas (rule), oscd.community Status: test
Search for usage of reg or Powershell by non-privileged users to modify service configuration in registry
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Non-privileged Usage of Reg or Powershell
-- Sigma ID:     8f02c935-effe-45b3-8fc9-ef8696a9e41d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1112
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Ryan Plas (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_non_priv_reg_or_ps.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set-itemproperty%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% sp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%new-itemproperty%')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('Medium', 'S-1-16-8192'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ControlSet%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Services%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ImagePath%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FailureCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ServiceDLL%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Process Patterns NTDS.DIT Exfil

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1003.003 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious process patterns used in NTDS.DIT exfiltration
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Patterns NTDS.DIT Exfil
-- Sigma ID:     8bc64091-6875-4881-aaf9-7bd25b5dda08
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntds.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ac i ntds%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create full%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c copy %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\windows\\ntds\\ntds.dit%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%activate instance ntds%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create full%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntds.dit%')
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\NTDSDump.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NTDSDumpEx.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%system.hiv%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NTDSgrab.ps1%'))
  OR (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\apache%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\tomcat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\PerfLogs\\%')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\apache%' OR procName LIKE '%\\tomcat%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\PerfLogs\\%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntds.dit%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potentially Suspicious Call To Win32_NTEventlogFile Class

high FSM Severity: 7 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of the WMI class "Win32_NTEventlogFile" in a potentially suspicious way (delete, backup, change permissions, etc.) from a PowerShell script
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Call To Win32_NTEventlogFile Class
-- Sigma ID:     caf201a9-c2ce-4a26-9c3a-2b9525413711
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_nteventlogfile_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_NTEventlogFile%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.BackupEventlog(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ChangeSecurityPermissions(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ChangeSecurityPermissionsEx(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ClearEventLog(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Delete(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DeleteEx(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Rename(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.TakeOwnerShip(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.TakeOwnerShipEx(%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Use Short Name Path in Image

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali Status: test
Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid Image detection
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use Short Name Path in Image
-- Sigma ID:     a96970af-f126-420d-90e1-d37bf25e50e1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-08-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_path_use_image.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%~1\\%' OR procName LIKE '%~2\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.

Use NTFS Short Name in Command Line

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid command-line detection
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use NTFS Short Name in Command Line
-- Sigma ID:     dd6b39d9-d9be-4a3b-8fe0-fe3c6a5c1795
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_use_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.msi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.msi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.hta%'))
  AND NOT (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WebEx\\WebexHost.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\thor\\thor64.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\xampp\\vcredist\\VCREDI~1.EXE%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.

Use NTFS Short Name in Image

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1564.004 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid Image based detection
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use NTFS Short Name in Image
-- Sigma ID:     3ef5605c-9eb9-47b0-9a71-b727e6aa5c3b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_use_image.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software Installers
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%~1.bat%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.dll%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.exe%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.hta%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.js%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.msi%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.ps1%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.tmp%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.vbe%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.vbs%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.bat%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.dll%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.exe%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.hta%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.js%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.msi%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.ps1%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.tmp%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.vbe%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.vbs%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Software Installers

Obfuscated IP Download Activity

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects use of an encoded/obfuscated version of an IP address (hex, octal...) in an URL combined with a download command
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Obfuscated IP Download Activity
-- Sigma ID:     cb5a2333-56cf-4562-8fcb-22ba1bca728d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_obfuscated_ip_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%irm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadFile%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadString%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Obfuscated IP Via CLI

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: discovery Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects usage of an encoded/obfuscated version of an IP address (hex, octal, etc.) via command line
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Obfuscated IP Via CLI
-- Sigma ID:     56d19cb4-6414-4769-9644-1ed35ffbb148
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)

-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ping.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\arp.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Process Parents

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious parent processes that should not have any children or should only have a single possible child program
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Parents
-- Sigma ID:     cbec226f-63d9-4eca-9f52-dfb6652f24df
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_parents.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\minesweeper.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\winver.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential PowerShell Execution Via DLL

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218.011 Author: Markus Neis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects potential PowerShell execution from a DLL instead of the usual PowerShell process as seen used in PowerShdll. This detection assumes that PowerShell commands are passed via the CommandLine.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Execution Via DLL
-- Sigma ID:     6812a10b-60ea-420c-832f-dfcc33b646ba
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2018-08-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_powershell_execution_via_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Default.GetString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ICM %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Command%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Expression%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\InstallUtil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\RegAsm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\RegSvcs.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('InstallUtil.exe', 'RegAsm.exe', 'RegSvcs.exe', 'REGSVR32.EXE', 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Privilege Escalation via Named Pipe Impersonation

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1021 Author: Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects a remote file copy attempt to a hidden network share. This may indicate lateral movement or data staging activity.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Privilege Escalation via Named Pipe Impersonation
-- Sigma ID:     9bd04a79-dabe-4f1f-a5ff-92430265c96b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_priv_escalation_via_named_pipe.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Other programs that cause these patterns (please report)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%echo%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%>%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\.\\\\pipe\\\\%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'PowerShell.EXE'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Other programs that cause these patterns (please report)

Private Keys Reconnaissance Via CommandLine Tools

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1552.004 Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Adversaries may search for private key certificate files on compromised systems for insecurely stored credential
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Private Keys Reconnaissance Via CommandLine Tools
-- Sigma ID:     213d6a77-3d55-4ce8-ba74-fcfef741974e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1552.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_private_keys_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.key%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pgp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.p12%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pem%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pfx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.p7b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.asc%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ChildItem %')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\findstr.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'FINDSTR.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious RunAs-Like Flag Combination

medium FSM Severity: 5 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious command line flags that let the user set a target user and command as e.g. seen in PsExec-like tools
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious RunAs-Like Flag Combination
-- Sigma ID:     50d66fb0-03f8-4da0-8add-84e77d12a020
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-11-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_privilege_escalation_cli_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c "cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c "powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --command cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --command powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c whoami%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c cscript%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --user system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u NT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u "NT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u 'NT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u administrator %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Windows Processes Suspicious Parent Directory

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: T1036.003, T1036.005 Author: vburov Status: test
Detect suspicious parent processes of well-known Windows processes
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Processes Suspicious Parent Directory
-- Sigma ID:     96036718-71cc-4027-a538-d1587e0006a7
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003, T1036.005
-- Author:       vburov
-- Date:         2019-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_proc_wrong_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some security products seem to spawn these
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\taskhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsass.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsaiso.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csrss.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wininit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winlogon.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Some security products seem to spawn these

Suspicious Program Names

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects suspicious patterns in program names or folders that are often found in malicious samples or hacktools
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Program Names
-- Sigma ID:     efdd8dd5-cee8-4e59-9390-7d4d5e4dd6f6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_progname.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate tools that accidentally match on the searched patterns
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%inject.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-CVE%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pupy.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%payload.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%beacon.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PowerView.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bypass.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfuscated.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfusc.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfus.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfs.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%evil.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MiniDogz.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\_enc.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\shell.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rshell.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%revshell.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\av.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\av\_test.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%adrecon.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mimikatz.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\PowerUp\_%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powerup.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\a.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\p.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\1.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Hound.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%encode.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powercat.ps1%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\CVE-202%' OR procName LIKE '%\\CVE202%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\poc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact\_protected.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact32big.exe' OR procName LIKE '%obfuscated.exe' OR procName LIKE '%obfusc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\meterpreter'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate tools that accidentally match on the searched patterns

Recon Information for Export with Command Prompt

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: collection, T1119 Author: frack113 Status: test
Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Recon Information for Export with Command Prompt
-- Sigma ID:     aa2efee7-34dd-446e-8a37-40790a66efd7
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1119
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\tree.com' OR procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\doskey.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('wmic.exe', 'DOSKEY.EXE', 'sc.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% > \%TEMP\%\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% > \%TMP\%\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Process Execution From Fake Recycle.Bin Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence Author: X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects process execution from a fake recycle bin folder, often used to avoid security solution.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Execution From Fake Recycle.Bin Folder
-- Sigma ID:     5ce0f04e-3efc-42af-839d-5b3a543b76c0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_recycle_bin_fake_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%RECYCLERS.BIN\\%' OR procName LIKE '%RECYCLER.BIN\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Redirection to Local Admin Share

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: exfiltration, T1048 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious output redirection to the local admins share, this technique is often found in malicious scripts or hacktool stagers
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Redirection to Local Admin Share
-- Sigma ID:     ab9e3b40-0c85-4ba1-aede-455d226fd124
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1048
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_redirect_local_admin_share.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%>%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\127.0.0.1\\\\admin$\\\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\localhost\\\\admin$\\\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Registry Modification of MS-settings Protocol Handler

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: persistence, T1548.002, T1546.001, T1112 Author: frack113, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects registry modifications to the 'ms-settings' protocol handler, which is frequently targeted for UAC bypass or persistence. Attackers can modify this registry to execute malicious code with elevated privileges by hijacking the command execution path.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Registry Modification of MS-settings Protocol Handler
-- Sigma ID:     dd3ee8cc-f751-41c9-ba53-5a32ed47e563
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1548.002, T1546.001, T1112
-- Author:       frack113, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_registry_modification_of_ms_setting_protocol_handler.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
