  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\ms-settings\\shell\\open\\command%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Remote Desktop Tunneling

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1021 Author: Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) Status: test
Detects potential use of an SSH utility to establish RDP over a reverse SSH Tunnel. This can be used by attackers to enable routing of network packets that would otherwise not reach their intended destination.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Remote Desktop Tunneling
-- Sigma ID:     8a3038e8-9c9d-46f8-b184-66234a160f6f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_remote_desktop_tunneling.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:3389%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -L %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -P %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -R %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -pw %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ssh %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Potential Defense Evasion Via Right-to-Left Override

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.002 Author: Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the presence of the "u202+E" character, which causes a terminal, browser, or operating system to render text in a right-to-left sequence. This is used as an obfuscation and masquerading techniques.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Via Right-to-Left Override
-- Sigma ID:     ad691d92-15f2-4181-9aa4-723c74f9ddc3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.002
-- Author:       Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_right_to_left_override.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Commandlines that contains scriptures such as arabic or hebrew might make use of this character
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u202e%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[U+202E]%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Commandlines that contains scriptures such as arabic or hebrew might make use of this character

Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious script execution in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
-- Sigma ID:     1228c958-e64e-4e71-92ad-7d429f4138ba
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_script_exec_from_env_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton Status: test
Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
-- Sigma ID:     a6a39bdb-935c-4f0a-ab77-35f4bbf44d33
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2021-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_script_exec_from_temp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temporary Internet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%TEMP\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%TMP\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%LocalAppData\%\\Temp%')))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% >%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Out-File%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-Json%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-WindowStyle hidden -Verb runAs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\system32\\config\\systemprofile\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\Amazon\\EC2-Windows\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative scripts

Sensitive File Access Via Volume Shadow Copy Backup

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1490 Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a command that accesses the VolumeShadowCopy in order to extract sensitive files such as the Security or SAM registry hives or the AD database (ntds.dit)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sensitive File Access Via Volume Shadow Copy Backup
-- Sigma ID:     f57f8d16-1f39-4dcb-a604-6c73d9b54b3d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1490
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_sensitive_file_access_shadowcopy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\\\?\\\\GLOBALROOT\\\\Device\\\\HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\NTDS.dit%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\SYSTEM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\SECURITY%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious New Service Creation

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1543.003 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects creation of a new service via "sc" command or the powershell "new-service" cmdlet with suspicious binary paths
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious New Service Creation
-- Sigma ID:     17a1be64-8d88-40bf-b5ff-a4f7a50ebcc8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_creation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%svchost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dllhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\TEMP\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Suspicious Service Binary Directory

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1202 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a service binary running in a suspicious directory
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Service Binary Directory
-- Sigma ID:     883faa95-175a-4e22-8181-e5761aeb373c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_dir.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\$Recycle.bin%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\All Users\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Default\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Contacts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Searches\\%' OR procName LIKE '%C:\\Perflogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\config\\systemprofile\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Fonts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\IME\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\addins\\%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious Windows Service Tampering

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1489, T1562.001 Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 , X__Junior (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause, disable or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Windows Service Tampering
-- Sigma ID:     ce72ef99-22f1-43d4-8695-419dcb5d9330
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489, T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 , X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_tamper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrators or tools shutting down the services due to upgrade or removal purposes. If you experience some false positive, please consider adding filters to the parent process launching this command and not removing the entry
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%143Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Acronis VSS Provider%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AcronisAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AcrSch2Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AdobeARMservice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHS Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Apache4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ARSM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%aswBcc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AteraAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Avast Business Console Client Antivirus Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%avast! Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AVG Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%avgAdminClient%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AvgAdminServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AVP1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BackupExec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bedbg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BITS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BrokerInfrastructure%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CASLicenceServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CASWebServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Client Agent 7.60%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Core Browsing Protection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Core Mail Protection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Core Scanning Server%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DCAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dwmrcs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EhttpSr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ekrn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Enterprise Client Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%epag%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EPIntegrationService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EPProtectedService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EPRedline%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EPSecurityService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EPUpdateService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EraserSvc11710%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EsgShKernel%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ESHASRV%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FA\_Scheduler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FirebirdGuardianDefaultInstance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FirebirdServerDefaultInstance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FontCache3.0.0.0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HealthTLService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hmpalertsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HMS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HostControllerService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hvdsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IAStorDataMgrSvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IBMHPS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ibmspsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IISAdmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IMANSVC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IMAP4Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%instance2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KAVFS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KAVFSGT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kavfsslp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KeyIso%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klbackupdisk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klbackupflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klhk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KLIF%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klim6%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klkbdflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klmouflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klnagent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%klpd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kltap%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KSDE1.0.0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LogProcessorService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%M8EndpointAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%macmnsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%masvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MBAMService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MBCloudEA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MBEndpointAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%McAfeeDLPAgentService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%McAfeeEngineService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MCAFEEEVENTPARSERSRV%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%McAfeeFramework%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MCAFEETOMCATSRV530%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%McShield%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%McTaskManager%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mfefire%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mfemms%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mfevto%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mfevtp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mfewc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MMS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mozyprobackup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mpssvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSComplianceAudit%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSDTC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MsDtsServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSExchange%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%msftesq1SPROO%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%msftesql$PROD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%msftesql$SQLEXPRESS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSOLAP$SQL\_2008%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSOLAP$SYSTEM\_BGC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSOLAP$TPS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSOLAP$TPSAMA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSOLAPSTPS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSOLAPSTPSAMA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mssecflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSSQ!I.SPROFXENGAGEMEHT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSSQ0SHAREPOINT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSSQ0SOPHOS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSSQL%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MSSQLFDLauncher$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MySQL%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NanoServiceMain%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NetMsmqActivator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NetPipeActivator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%netprofm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NetTcpActivator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NetTcpPortSharing%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntrtscan%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nvspwmi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ofcservice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Online Protection System%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OracleClientCache80%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OracleDBConsole%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OracleMTSRecoveryService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OracleOraDb11g\_home1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OracleService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OracleVssWriter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%osppsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PandaAetherAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PccNTUpd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PDVFSService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%POP3Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%postgresql-x64-9.4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%POVFSService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PSUAService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Quick Update Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RepairService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ReportServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ReportServer$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RESvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RpcEptMapper%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sacsvr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SamSs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SAVAdminService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SAVService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ScSecSvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SDRSVC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SearchExchangeTracing%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sense%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SentinelAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SentinelHelperService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SepMasterService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ShMonitor%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Smcinst%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SmcService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SMTPSvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SNAC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SntpService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQ1SafeOLRService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQL Backups%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQL Server%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLANYs\_Sage\_FAS\_Fixed\_Assets%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLBrowser%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLsafe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLSERVERAGENT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLTELEMETRY%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLWriter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SSISTELEMETRY130%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SstpSvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%svcGenericHost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%swc\_service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%swi\_filter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%swi\_service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%swi\_update%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Symantec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sysmon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TeamViewer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Telemetryserver%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ThreatLockerService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TMBMServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TmCCSF%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TmFilter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TMiCRCScanService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tmlisten%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TMLWCSService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TmPfw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TmPreFilter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TmProxy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TMSmartRelayService%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tmusa%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Tomcat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Trend Micro Deep Security Manager%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TrueKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UFNet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UI0Detect%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UniFi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UTODetect%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%vds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Veeam%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VeeamDeploySvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Veritas System Recovery%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%vmic%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VMTools%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%vmvss%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VSApiNt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VSS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%W3Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wbengine%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WdNisSvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WeanClOudSve%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Weems JY%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WinDefend%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wmms%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wozyprobackup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WPFFontCache\_v0400%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WRSVC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wsbexchange%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WSearch%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Zoolz 2 Service%'))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% delete %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.delete()%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% pause %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% stop %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Stop-Service %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-Service %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%start=disabled%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'psservice.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'sc.exe', 'wmic.exe')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PowerShell\_ISE.EXE' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PsService.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PsService64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrators or tools shutting down the services due to upgrade or removal purposes. If you experience some false positive, please consider adding filters to the parent process launching this command and not removing the entry

Shadow Copies Creation Using Operating Systems Utilities

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1003, T1003.002, T1003.003 Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community Status: test
Shadow Copies creation using operating systems utilities, possible credential access
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Shadow Copies Creation Using Operating Systems Utilities
-- Sigma ID:     b17ea6f7-6e90-447e-a799-e6c0a493d6ce
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003, T1003.002, T1003.003
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_shadow_copies_creation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator working with shadow copies, access for backup purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shadow%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vssadmin.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'wmic.exe', 'VSSADMIN.EXE'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrator working with shadow copies, access for backup purposes

Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: impact, T1070, T1490 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades) Status: stable
Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
-- Sigma ID:     c947b146-0abc-4c87-9c64-b17e9d7274a2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        impact | T1070, T1490
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)
-- Date:         2019-10-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_shadow_copies_deletion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate Administrator deletes Shadow Copies using operating systems utilities for legitimate reason; LANDesk LDClient Ivanti-PSModule (PS EncodedCommand)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate Administrator deletes Shadow Copies using operating systems utilities for legitimate reason; LANDesk LDClient Ivanti-PSModule (PS EncodedCommand)

Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: execution, T1059.005, T1059.001, T1218 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton Status: test
Detects suspicious child processes of a Windows shell and scripting processes such as wscript, rundll32, powershell, mshta...etc.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs
-- Sigma ID:     3a6586ad-127a-4d3b-a677-1e6eacdf8fde
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.005, T1059.001, T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2018-04-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_shell_spawn_susp_program.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts; Microsoft SCCM
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wmiprvse.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\nslookup.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative scripts; Microsoft SCCM

Process Creation Using Sysnative Folder

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1055 Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects process creation events that use the Sysnative folder (common for CobaltStrike spawns)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Creation Using Sysnative Folder
-- Sigma ID:     3c1b5fb0-c72f-45ba-abd1-4d4c353144ab
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_sysnative.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Sysnative\\%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Sysnative\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

System File Execution Location Anomaly

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects the execution of a Windows system binary that is usually located in the system folder from an uncommon location.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        System File Execution Location Anomaly
-- Sigma ID:     e4a6b256-3e47-40fc-89d2-7a477edd6915
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2017-11-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_system_exe_anomaly.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\atbroker.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\audiodg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bcdedit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certreq.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmstp.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\consent.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csrss.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dashost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\defrag.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dfrgui.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dism.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dllhst3g.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dwm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\eventvwr.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\fsquirt.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\finger.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\logonui.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\LsaIso.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsass.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ntoskrnl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\runonce.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\RuntimeBroker.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sihost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\smartscreen.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\smss.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\spoolsv.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\taskhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\taskhostw.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Taskmgr.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\userinit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\werfault.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\werfaultsecure.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wininit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winlogon.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winver.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wlanext.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wsl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wsmprovhost.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Suspicious SYSTEM User Process Creation

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1134, T1003, T1027 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), David ANDRE (additional keywords) Status: test
Detects a suspicious process creation as SYSTEM user (suspicious program or command line parameter)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious SYSTEM User Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     2617e7ed-adb7-40ba-b0f3-8f9945fe6c09
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134, T1003, T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), David ANDRE (additional keywords)
-- Date:         2021-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_system_user_anomaly.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity; Scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment; Monitoring activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity; Scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment; Monitoring activity

Suspicious SYSVOL Domain Group Policy Access

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1552.006 Author: Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community Status: test
Detects Access to Domain Group Policies stored in SYSVOL
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious SYSVOL Domain Group Policy Access
-- Sigma ID:     05f3c945-dcc8-4393-9f3d-af65077a8f86
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1552.006
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2018-04-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_sysvol_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\SYSVOL\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\policies\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative activity

Tasks Folder Evasion

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, execution, T1574.001 Author: Sreeman Status: test
The Tasks folder in system32 and syswow64 are globally writable paths. Adversaries can take advantage of this and load or influence any script hosts or ANY .NET Application in Tasks to load and execute a custom assembly into cscript, wscript, regsvr32, mshta, eventvwr
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Tasks Folder Evasion
-- Sigma ID:     cc4e02ba-9c06-48e2-b09e-2500cace9ae0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1574.001
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-01-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_task_folder_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%echo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%file createnew%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% C:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% C:\\Windows\\SysWow64\\Tasks\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Malicious Windows Script Components File Execution by TAEF Detection

low FSM Severity: 3 MITRE: T1218 Author: Agro (@agro_sev) oscd.community Status: test
Windows Test Authoring and Execution Framework (TAEF) framework allows you to run automation by executing tests files written on different languages (C, C#, Microsoft COM Scripting interfaces Adversaries may execute malicious code (such as WSC file with VBScript, dll and so on) directly by running te.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Malicious Windows Script Components File Execution by TAEF Detection
-- Sigma ID:     634b00d5-ccc3-4a06-ae3b-0ec8444dd51b
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Agro (@agro_sev) oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_use_of_te_bin.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    It's not an uncommon to use te.exe directly to execute legal TAEF tests
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\te.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\te.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = '\te.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: It's not an uncommon to use te.exe directly to execute legal TAEF tests

Malicious PE Execution by Microsoft Visual Studio Debugger

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1218 Author: Agro (@agro_sev), Ensar Şamil (@sblmsrsn), oscd.community Status: test
There is an option for a MS VS Just-In-Time Debugger "vsjitdebugger.exe" to launch specified executable and attach a debugger. This option may be used adversaries to execute malicious code by signed verified binary. The debugger is installed alongside with Microsoft Visual Studio package.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Malicious PE Execution by Microsoft Visual Studio Debugger
-- Sigma ID:     15c7904e-6ad1-4a45-9b46-5fb25df37fd2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Agro (@agro_sev), Ensar Şamil (@sblmsrsn), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_use_of_vsjitdebugger_bin.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    The process spawned by vsjitdebugger.exe is uncommon.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\vsjitdebugger.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\vsimmersiveactivatehelper*.exe'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\devenv.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: The process spawned by vsjitdebugger.exe is uncommon.

Suspicious Userinit Child Process

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1055 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Samir Bousseaden (idea) Status: test
Detects a suspicious child process of userinit
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Userinit Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     b655a06a-31c0-477a-95c2-3726b83d649d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Samir Bousseaden (idea)
-- Date:         2019-06-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_userinit_child.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\userinit.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Administrative scripts

Suspicious Velociraptor Child Process

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: persistence, T1219 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) Status: experimental
Detects the suspicious use of the Velociraptor DFIR tool to execute other tools or download additional payloads, as seen in a campaign where it was abused for remote access and to stage further attacks.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Velociraptor Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     4bc90587-e6ca-4b41-be0b-ed4d04e4ed0c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1219
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-08-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_velociraptor_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrators or incident responders might use Velociraptor to execute scripts or tools. However, the combination of Velociraptor spawning these specific processes with these command lines is suspicious. Tuning may be required to exclude known administrative actions or specific scripts.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Velociraptor.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate administrators or incident responders might use Velociraptor to execute scripts or tools. However, the combination of Velociraptor spawning these specific processes with these command lines is suspicious. Tuning may be required to exclude known administrative actions or specific scripts.

Weak or Abused Passwords In CLI

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects weak passwords or often abused passwords (seen used by threat actors) via the CLI. An example would be a threat actor creating a new user via the net command and providing the password inline
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Weak or Abused Passwords In CLI
-- Sigma ID:     91edcfb1-2529-4ac2-9ecc-7617f895c7e4
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_weak_or_abused_passwords.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the passwords by users via commandline (should be discouraged); Other currently unknown false positives
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%123456789%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%123123qwE%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Asd123.aaaa%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Decryptme%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%P@ssw0rd!%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Pass8080%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%password123%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%test@202%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the passwords by users via commandline (should be discouraged); Other currently unknown false positives

Usage Of Web Request Commands And Cmdlets

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: execution, T1059.001 Author: James Pemberton / @4A616D6573, Endgame, JHasenbusch, oscd.community, Austin Songer @austinsonger Status: test
Detects the use of various web request commands with commandline tools and Windows PowerShell cmdlets (including aliases) via CommandLine
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Usage Of Web Request Commands And Cmdlets
-- Sigma ID:     9fc51a3c-81b3-4fa7-b35f-7c02cf10fd2d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       James Pemberton / @4A616D6573, Endgame, JHasenbusch, oscd.community, Austin Songer @austinsonger
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_web_request_cmd_and_cmdlets.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Use of Get-Command and Get-Help modules to reference Invoke-WebRequest and Start-BitsTransfer.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[System.Net.WebRequest]::create%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% irm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Resume-BitsTransfer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Start-BitsTransfer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WinHttp.WinHttpRequest%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Use of Get-Command and Get-Help modules to reference Invoke-WebRequest and Start-BitsTransfer.

WhoAmI as Parameter

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: discovery, T1033 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a suspicious process command line that uses whoami as first parameter (as e.g. used by EfsPotato)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        WhoAmI as Parameter
-- Sigma ID:     e9142d84-fbe0-401d-ac50-3e519fb00c89
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-11-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_whoami_as_param.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe whoami%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Execution via WorkFolders.exe

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1218 Author: Maxime Thiebaut (@0xThiebaut) Status: test
Detects using WorkFolders.exe to execute an arbitrary control.exe
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution via WorkFolders.exe
-- Sigma ID:     0bbc6369-43e3-453d-9944-cae58821c173
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Maxime Thiebaut (@0xThiebaut)
-- Date:         2021-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_workfolders.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the uncommon Windows Work Folders feature.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\control.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WorkFolders.exe'))
  AND NOT (procName = 'C:\Windows\System32\control.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Legitimate usage of the uncommon Windows Work Folders feature.

Suspect Svchost Activity

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1055 Author: David Burkett, @signalblur Status: test
It is extremely abnormal for svchost.exe to spawn without any CLI arguments and is normally observed when a malicious process spawns the process and injects code into the process memory space.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspect Svchost Activity
-- Sigma ID:     16c37b52-b141-42a5-a3ea-bbe098444397
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055
-- Author:       David Burkett, @signalblur
-- Date:         2019-12-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_svchost_execution_with_no_cli_flags.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Rpcnet.exe / rpcnetp.exe which is a lojack style software. https://www.blackhat.com/docs/us-14/materials/us-14-Kamlyuk-Kamluk-Computrace-Backdoor-Revisited.pdf
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%svchost.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe')
  AND NOT (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rpcnet.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rpcnetp.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] = 'None'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Rpcnet.exe / rpcnetp.exe which is a lojack style software. https://www.blackhat.com/docs/us-14/materials/us-14-Kamlyuk-Kamluk-Computrace-Backdoor-Revisited.pdf

Suspicious Process Masquerading As SvcHost.EXE

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.005 Author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel Status: test
Detects a suspicious process that is masquerading as the legitimate "svchost.exe" by naming its binary "svchost.exe" and executing from an uncommon location. Adversaries often disguise their malicious binaries by naming them after legitimate system processes like "svchost.exe" to evade detection.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Masquerading As SvcHost.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     be58d2e2-06c8-4f58-b666-b99f6dc3b6cd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.005
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2024-08-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_svchost_masqueraded_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Terminal Service Process Spawn

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1190, T1210 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects a process spawned by the terminal service server process (this could be an indicator for an exploitation of CVE-2019-0708)
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Terminal Service Process Spawn
-- Sigma ID:     1012f107-b8f1-4271-af30-5aed2de89b39
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1190, T1210
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-05-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_svchost_termserv_proc_spawn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%termsvcs%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unknown

Uncommon Svchost Command Line Parameter

high FSM Severity: 7 MITRE: T1036.005, T1055, T1055.012 Author: Liran Ravich Status: experimental
Detects instances of svchost.exe running with an unusual or uncommon command line parameter by excluding known legitimate or common patterns. This could point at a file masquerading as svchost, a process injection, or hollowing of a legitimate svchost instance.
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Svchost Command Line Parameter
-- Sigma ID:     f17211f1-1f24-4d0c-829f-31e28dc93cdd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1036.005, T1055, T1055.012
-- Author:       Liran Ravich
-- Date:         2025-11-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_svchost_uncommon_command_line_flags.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
False Positives: Unlikely

Uncommon Svchost Parent Process

medium FSM Severity: 5 MITRE: T1036.005 Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) Status: test
Detects an uncommon svchost parent process
View on GitHub ↗ 
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Svchost Parent Process

-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test

-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2017-08-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_svchost_uncommon_parent_process.yml

SELECT
